Chaque fois qu'une créature échoue à un jet de sauvegarde de Sagesse ou de Charisme contre un pouvoir de la Force ou une fonctionnalité de classe que vous utilisez, vous pouvez gagner des points de vie temporaires égaux à la moitié de votre niveau opérationnel + votre Charisme. modificateur (minimum de +1).

Vous pouvez utiliser cette fonctionnalité cinq fois. Vous gagnez un usage supplémentaire au niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous les usages dépensés lorsque vous terminez un short ou un repos long.

distracting-countenance.name: Mine Distrayante
distracting-countenance.description:
Beguiler Practice: niveau 17

As a action bonus, you can mask yourpersonnelle with the Force pendant 1 minute or until you are incapacitated. For the duration, whenever any creature tries to attack you for the first time on a turn, the attacker must make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Charisma modificateur). On a failed sauvegarde, it can't attack you on this turn, and it must choose a new target for its attack or the attack is wasted. On a successful sauvegarde, it can attack you on this turn, but it has disavantage on any jet de sauvegarde it makes against your powers on your next turn.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

fascinating-display.name: Spectacle Fascinant
fascinating-display.description:
Beguiler Practice: niveau 3

Vous pouvez dépenser 1 minute attemping to distract and enthrall those around you. Choose a number of humanoids within 60 mètres of you who watched your display for the duration, up to a number equal to your Charisma modificateur (minimum of one). Each target must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Charisma modificateur) or be charmé by you. While charmé in this way, la cible idolizes you, speaking glowingly of you to anyone who talks to it. De plus, it hinders anyone who opposes you, although it avoids violence unless it was already inclined to fight on your behalf. Cet effet ends on a target after 1 hour, if it takes any dégâts, if you attack it, or if it witnesses you attacking or damaging any of its allies. If a target succeeds on this jet de sauvegarde, la cible has no hint you tried to charm it.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a repos long before you can use it again.

mesmerizing-presence.name: Présence Hypnotisante
mesmerizing-presence.description:
Beguiler Practice: niveau 9

You have avantage on attack rolls against creatures charmé by you.

epicenter.name: Épicentre
epicenter.description:
Biochem Engineering: niveau 14

As a réaction when you take dégâts from a creature within 15 mètres of you that you can see, you can use one of your mixtures. The effects of the mixture release in a 15-foot-radius sphere centered on you, and if the mixture requires a jet de sauvegarde, you automatically succeed on it. De plus, the affected area is difficult terrain to creatures other than you jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

masterful-mixtures.name: Mélanges Magistraux
masterful-mixtures.description:
Biochem Engineering: niveau 18

When you deal acid or poison dégâts using a pouvoir technique or class feature, you ignore resistance and treat immunity as resistance.

biochemists-touch.name: Toucher du Biochimiste
biochemists-touch.description:
Biochem Engineering: niveau 3

Whenever you grant points de vie temporaires, or deal acid or poison dégâts using a pouvoir technique or class feature, you may expend one use of your Potent Aptitude to increase the potency. When you do so, the amount of points de vie temporaires you grant or dégâts you deal is increased by the amount rolled on the die. The dégâts is the same type as the original dégâts.

corrosive-mixture.name: Mélange Corrosif
corrosive-mixture.description: Your distributor emits a burst of acid. La cible must make a Dexterity sav-ing throw. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d6]] + your Intelligence modificateur acid dégâts. This mixture's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

invigorating-mixture.name: Mélange Revigorant
invigorating-mixture.description: Your distributor emits a bolt of kolto. La cible gains [[/r 1d6]] + your Intelligence modificateur points de vie temporaires, which last jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. The points de vie temporaires granted by this mixture increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

modified-biochemists-pack.name: Pack du Biochimiste Modifié
modified-biochemists-pack.description:
Biochem Engineering: niveau 3

You learn to modify and combine your biochemist's kit and poisoner's kit, creating a mobile laboratory using your chemistry expertise. Over the course of a repos long, you can create your modified biochemist's pack. You must have a biochemist's kit, a poisoner's kit, and materials in order to perform this modification.

Your biochemist's pack is enhanced, requires attunement, can only be used by you, and counts as a tech focus for your pouvoir techniques while you are attuned to it. Your modified biochemist's pack has 4 modification slots, and it gains more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Modification Slots column of the engineer table. For each modification installed in excess of your bonus de maîtrise, your tech point maximum is reduced by 1. Over the course of a repos long, you can install, replace, or remove a number of modifications up to your Intelligence modificateur (minimum of one).

Some modification effects require jet de sauvegardes. When you use such an effect from this class, the DD equals your tech sauvegarde DD.

Your modified biochemist's pack comes equipped with a chemical distribution system, complete with three chemical mixtures: corrosive, invigorating, and noxious. As an action, you can activate your distributor and target a creature within 30 mètres, with an effect determined by the mixture.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.9eigvr3eDzFroJA6]{Corrosive Mixture}

Your distributor emits a burst of acid. La cible must make a Dexterity sav-ing throw. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d6]] + your Intelligence modificateur acid dégâts. This mixture's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.VxN7BdfTkAlck9Sx]{Invigorating Mixture}

Your distributor emits a bolt of kolto. La cible gains [[/r 1d6]] + your Intelligence modificateur points de vie temporaires, which last jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. The points de vie temporaires granted by this mixture increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.MtUsOc7DDG7bD2Lh]{Noxious Mixture}

Your distributor emits a cloud of poison. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d6]] + your Intelligence modificateur poison dégâts. This mixture's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

noxious-mixture.name: Mélange Nocif
noxious-mixture.description: Your distributor emits a cloud of poison. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d6]] + your Intelligence modificateur poison dégâts. This mixture's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 5 ([[/r 2d6]]), niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]), and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

potent-mixtures.name: Mélanges Puissants
potent-mixtures.description:
Biochem Engineering: niveau 6

When you cast a pouvoir technique of 1st-niveau or higher that grants points de vie temporaires, or deals acid or poison dégâts, you add your Intelligence modificateur (a minimum of +1) to the roll.

more-machine-than-man.name: Plus Machine qu'Homme
more-machine-than-man.description:
Ing?nierie BioTech : niveau 14

While you have points de vie temporaires, when you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a jet de sauvegarde to take only half dégâts, you instead take no dégâts si vous réussissez on a jet de sauvegarde, and only half dégâts si vous échouez.

focused-augmentation.name: Augmentation Ciblée
focused-augmentation.description:
Ing?nierie BioTech : niveau 18

Vous ajoutez votre modificateur d'Intelligence au Jet de sauvegardes de Constitution que vous effectuez pour maintenir la concentration.

De plus, lorsque vous lancez un pouvoir qui nécessite de la concentration et n'affecterait qu'une cible, vous pouvez cibler une créature supplémentaire avec ce pouvoir.

modified-self.name: Soi Modifié
modified-self.description:
Ing?nierie BioTech : niveau 3

You've learned to make modifications to your body, cybernetically augmenting yourpersonnelle. Over the course of a repos long, you can modify yourpersonnelle with cybernetic augmentations. You must have biotech's implements in order to perform this modification.

While you have at least one cybernetic augmentation installed, your body counts as a tech focus for your pouvoir techniques. De plus, you have 4 modification slots, and you gain more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Modification Slots column of the engineer table. For each modification installed in excess of your bonus de maîtrise, your tech point maximum is reduced by 1. Over the course of a repos long, you can install, replace, or remove a number of modifications up to your Intelligence modificateur (minimum of one).

Some modification effects require jet de sauvegardes. When you use such an effect from this class, the DD equals your tech sauvegarde DD.

quick-release-stimulant.name: Stimulant à Libération Rapide
quick-release-stimulant.description:
Ing?nierie BioTech : niveau 3

When you are dealt dégâts by an attack while you have at least one cybernetic augmentation installed, you can use your réaction and expend one use of your Potent Aptitude to reduce the dégâts you take. The dégâts is reduced by an amount equal to [[/r 1d10]] + your Constitution modificateur + your engineer niveau. If you reduce the dégâts to 0, you can gain points de vie temporaires equal to the remaining dégâts reduction.

overclock-body.name: Surcharger le Corps
overclock-body.description:
Ing?nierie BioTech : niveau 6

Vous avez appris à utiliser votre corps comme conduit pour vos techniques de pouvoir. Lorsque vous lancez une technique de pouvoir, vous pouvez choisir de payer jusqu'à la moitié du coût de la technique de pouvoir en utilisant vos points de vie au lieu de vos points techniques. Lorsque vous le faites, votre maximum de points de vie est réduit du même montant jusqu'à ce que vous complétiez un repos long.

resilient-fighting.name: Combat Résilient
resilient-fighting.description:
Blademaster Specialist: niveau 10

When you expend a use of your Adaptive Fighting, you gain resistance to energy and kinetic dégâts dealt by weapons jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

adrenaline-rush.name: Montée d'Adrénaline
adrenaline-rush.description:
Spécialiste Blademaster : niveau 15

Lorsque vous utilisez votre fonction Action Surge, vous pouvez bénéficier d'un bonus d'action supplémentaire en plus de l'action supplémentaire.

bladestorm.name: Tempête de Lames
bladestorm.description:
Blademaster Specialist: niveau 18

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour make a single attaque d'arme au corps à corps against chaque créature within your reach. Make a separate attack roll against each target. The first attack gains a +1 bonus to its attack roll, and each attack after the first gains an additional +1 bonus to its attack roll, cumulatively, to a maximum bonus of +6. If you are wielding two light- or vibro-weapons, or a weapon with the double property, you also add this bonus to your jet de dégâtss, and you can use your action bonus to engage in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

adaptive-fighting.name: Combat Adaptatif
adaptive-fighting.description:
Blademaster Specialist: niveau 3

You've learned to make adaptations to your fighting style on the fly. You have three such effects: Change Up, Draw, and Stow. When you use your Adaptive Fighting, you choose which effect to create.

You can use this features un nombre de fois égal à your Strength or Dexterity modificateur (your choice, a minimum of once). Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.AYrI7vGnNnOUMVys]{Change Up}

You can use your object interaction and expend a use of your Adaptive Fighting to change the Fighting Style option granted to you by your fighter class feature.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.VXIVX5zNmRTZB7zJ]{Draw}

When you use your object interaction to draw one or more weapons, you can expend a use of your Adaptive Fighting (no action required) to increase your critical hit range by 1 with the weapon(s) jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.FH71n755Agnlql2b]{Stow}

When you use your object interaction to stow a weapon, you can expend a use of your Adaptive Fighting (no action required) to take the Disengage action.

change-up.name: Changement
change-up.description: Vous pouvez utiliser votre interaction avec un objet et dépenser une utilisation de votre combat adaptatif pour modifier l'option de style de combat qui vous est accordée par la fonctionnalité de votre classe de combattant.

draw.name: Dessiner
draw.description: When you use your object interaction to draw one or more weapons, you can expend a use of your Adaptive Fighting (no action required) to increase your critical hit range by 1 with the weapon(s) jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

stow.name: Ranger
stow.description: Lorsque vous utilisez votre interaction avec un objet pour ranger une arme, vous pouvez dépenser une utilisation de votre Combat adaptatif (aucune action requise) pour effectuer l'action Désengagement.

unarmored-defense.name: Défense Sans Armure
unarmored-defense.description:
Blademaster Specialist: niveau 3

Alors que vous ne portez aucune armure et ne portez pas de bouclier, votre CA est égale à 10 + votre modificateur de Dextérité + votre modificateur de Force.

dervish.name: Derviche
dervish.description:
Blademaster Specialist: niveau 7

When you score a critical hit with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you regain an expended use of your Adaptive Fighting.

fling-people.name: Projeter les Gens
fling-people.description:
Bloodstorm Approach: niveau 10

You learn to throw creatures as easily as you throw your weapons. When you successfully grapple a creature, you may immediately throw la créature.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.YDSKOTBsH2rWpOkk]{Throw Friend}

If la créature is a willing ally and volunteers to be agrippé, you throw la cible into any unoccupied space within 60 mètres. That creature may immediately use its réaction to make one attaque d'arme au corps à corps, adding your Strength modificateur to the attack's jet de dégâts.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.OgGqrG1OD9ELC4Dd]{Throw Foe}

If la créature is an opponent, you throw la cible into any unoccupied space within 30 mètres, where it takes dégâts equal to your Strength modificateur and falls à terre.

throw-foe.name: Projeter un Ennemi
throw-foe.description: If la créature is an opponent, you throw la cible into any unoccupied space within 30 mètres, where it takes dégâts equal to your Strength modificateur and falls à terre.

throw-friend.name: Projeter un Allié
throw-friend.description: If la créature is a willing ally and volunteers to be agrippé, you throw la cible into any unoccupied space within 60 mètres. That creature may immediately use its réaction to make one attaque d'arme au corps à corps, adding your Strength modificateur to the attack's jet de dégâts.

raging-whirlwind.name: Tourbillon Enragé
raging-whirlwind.description:
Bloodstorm Approach: niveau 14

You can send your weapon spinning into a gravity-defying whirlwind of pain. Once per rage as an action, you may throw a weapon with the thrown property to a point you choose within 60 mètres. The weapon fills the air as a cyclone in a 10 foot radius sphere centered on that point. A creature takes dégâts equal to the thrown weapon's dégâts + your Strength modificateur + your Rage Damage when it enter's the whirlwind's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there. Cet effet ends when you command the weapon to return to you (no action required) or your rage ends.

furious-throw.name: Lancer Furieux
furious-throw.description:
Bloodstorm Approach: niveau 3

Your throwing techniques have become a perfect extension of your melee prowess. When you throw a weapon with which you are proficient, you can benefit from your class features that only apply to attaque d'arme au corps à corpss, such as Rage or Reckless Attack.

returning-attacks.name: Attaques de Retour
returning-attacks.description:
Bloodstorm Approche : niveau 3

Toute arme que vous lancez peut ricocher vers vous lorsque vous le commandez. Lorsque vous effectuez une attaque d'arme lancée, vous pouvez faire revenir l'arme dans votre main immédiatement après l'attaque.

throw-anything.name: Lancer N'Importe Quoi
throw-anything.description:
Bloodstorm Approach: niveau 6

Votre force et votre maîtrise des techniques de lancer vous ont permis de lancer des vibroaxes aussi facilement que d'autres lancent des vibrodaggers. Lorsque vous maniez une arme légère ou vibrante que vous maîtrisez, elle acquiert la propriété de lancer (portée 20/60).

ambush-tactics.name: Tactiques d'Embuscade
ambush-tactics.description:
Bolstering Practice: niveau 13

When attempting to move stealthily as a group, you may choose a number of creatures equal to your Charisma modificateur. Those creatures may add their maîtrise to any Dexterity (Stealth) checks they make as long as they remain within 60 mètres of you and they do not already add their bonus de maîtrise.

De plus, each ally other than you that surprises a creature and hits it with an attack on their first turn in combat rolls two dice equal to the size of your Sneak Attack dice, dealing additional dégâts of the same type to la créature.

articulate-authority.name: Autorité Articulée
articulate-authority.description:
Bolstering Practice: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

When you use your Cunning Action feature to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide actions, a number of friendly creatures up to your Charisma modificateur within 30 mètres of you who can hear you and who can understand you can use their réaction to gain an effect, determined by the action you took:

  • Dash: The creature can move up to half their speed. They must end this movement within 30 mètres of you.
  • Disengage: The creature can move up to 5 mètres. If this movement would provoke an attaque d'opportunité, the attaque d'opportunité is made with disavantage.
  • Hide: The creature has avantage on the first attack roll they make before the end of their next turn against a creature you successfully hide from.

You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a short or repos long.

squad-goals.name: Objectifs d'Équipe
squad-goals.description:
Bolstering Practice: niveau 17

By niveau 17, you have such skill at maintaining the faith your allies have in you, that the very sight of you in danger can spur them into action. When seeing you take dégâts from an enemy's attack, a number of allies equal to your charisma modificateur within 60 mètres of you, that can see you, may immediately make a single attack of opportunity against the enemy, no action required. You may use this feature once, regaining the ability to do so when you finish a short or repos long.

bolstering-strike.name: Frappe Renforcée
bolstering-strike.description: You choose a friendly creature within 60 mètres of you who can see or hear you. Once before the start of your next turn, if cette créature hits la créature against which you forwent two Sneak Attack dégâts dice, they deal additional dégâts to la cible equal to the maximum of the two Sneak Attack dice.

fireteam-commander.name: Commandant d'Équipe de Feu
fireteam-commander.description:
Bolstering Practice: niveau 3

You learn a number of squad maneuvers you can use to assist allies or exploit enemies. When you deal Sneak Attack dégâts to a creature, you may choose to forgo two of your Sneak Attack dice to make the attack a squad maneuver.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.BHjjIuqhaEVLc5qU]{Fortifying Strike}

You inspire a friendly creature within 60 mètres of you who can see or hear you and roll two Sneak Attack dice. That ally immediately gains points de vie temporaires equal to the amount of rolled.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.EN8ryKU2ETXAcjxN]{Reaffirming Strike}

You use the authority your attacks carry to help your ally focus on the task at hand. Choose a creature within 60 mètres of you who can see or hear you and that is currently charmé or effrayé by la créature you would deal Sneak Attack dégâts to. The condition immediately ends on cette créature.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.lxTzTk1sCStxWo1b]{Bolstering Strike}

You choose a friendly creature within 60 mètres of you who can see or hear you. Once before the start of your next turn, if cette créature hits la créature against which you forwent two Sneak Attack dégâts dice, they deal additional dégâts to la cible equal to the maximum of the two Sneak Attack dice.

fortifying-strike.name: Frappe Fortifiante
fortifying-strike.description: You inspire a friendly creature within 60 mètres of you who can see or hear you and roll two Sneak Attack dice. That ally immediately gains points de vie temporaires equal to the amount of rolled.

reaffirming-strike.name: Frappe Réaffirmante
reaffirming-strike.description: You use the authority your attacks carry to help your ally focus on the task at hand. Choose a creature within 60 mètres of you who can see or hear you and that is currently charmé or effrayé by la créature you would deal Sneak Attack dégâts to. The condition immediately ends on cette créature.

open-opportunity.name: Opportunité Ouverte
open-opportunity.description:
Bolstering Practice: niveau 9

Une fois par tour, when you take the Attack action and hit a creature without applying your Sneak Attack dégâts to it, you can forgo your Sneak Attack dégâts for the turn and use your action bonus to throw la créature off balance. The next ally to hit cette créature before the start of your next turn may add your Sneak Attack dice to the dégâts of their attack.

mighty-leap.name: Bond Puissant
mighty-leap.description:
Approche cyclonique : niveau 10

La distance que vous pouvez sauter est doublée, et vous ne provoquez pas d'attaques d'opportunité si vous quittez la portée d'une créature hostile en sautant.

stop-hitting-each-other.name: Arrêtez de Vous Frapper
stop-hitting-each-other.description:
Approche de la Baston : niveau 10

You can grapple creatures two sizes larger than you, instead of one.

De plus, you can use creatures you have agrippé that are at least one size smaller than you as improvised weapons. When you do so, quand vous contactez with an attack using a creature as a weapon, it takes dégâts equal to your Strength modificateur. While raging, you can instead use creatures your size or smaller as improvised weapons.

enforcer.name: Homme de Main
enforcer.description:
Approche de la Baston : niveau 14

When you would make an unarmed strike or attack with an improvised weapon with avantage, vous pouvez choisir to forgo the avantage. If you do so, your critical hit range increases by 1 for that attack, and on a hit, you deal maximum dégâts instead of rolling.

Cyclone Approach

The Cyclone Approach empowers the berserker's ability to fight with weapons in each hand. Followers of this approach learn to move quickly to avoid attacks and can become a whirlwind of fury and steel, cleaving through hordes of enemies.

bracing-strike.name: Frappe d'Appui
bracing-strike.description: You gain points de vie temporaires equal to your rage dégâts bonus. If la cible is agrippé by you, you instead gain points de vie temporaires equal to twice your rage dégâts bonus.

double-swing.name: Double Balayage
double-swing.description:
Cyclone Approach: niveau 3

Une fois par chacun de vos tours when you miss with an attack while raging, you can immediately make a attaque au corps à corps with the weapon in your other hand.

dual-wielder.name: Ambidextrie
dual-wielder.description:
Cyclone Approach: niveau 3

When you engage in Two-Weapon Fighting, you can add your Strength or Dexterity modificateur (your choice) to the dégâts of your Two-Weapon Fighting attack as long as it doesn't already include that modificateur.

fists-of-fury.name: Poings de Fureur
fists-of-fury.description:
Approche de la Baston : niveau 3

You've learned to hone your rage through your fists. Your unarmed strike dégâts increases by one step (from 1 to [[/r d4]], [[/r d4]] to [[/r d6]], or [[/r d6]] to [[/r d8]]).

punishing-strike.name: Frappe Punitive
punishing-strike.description: Your target must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature is assourdi until the start of its next turn. If la cible is agrippé by you, it is instead incapacitated until the start of its next turn.

reckless-strikes.name: Frappes Téméraires
reckless-strikes.description:
Approche de la Baston : niveau 3

While you are raging, not wearing heavy armor, and not wielding a shield, quand vous contactez a creature with an unarmed strike or improvised weapon, vous pouvez choisir to forgo your rage dégâts to make the attack a reckless strike.

Some of your reckless strikes require your target to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the reckless strike's effects. The jet de sauvegarde DD is calculated as follows:

_

Reckless Strike sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Strength modificateur

_

You can use these features a combined number of times equal to your bonus de maîtrise, as shown in the berserker table. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.JD2IapKPhDbtUULD]{Bracing Strike}

You gain points de vie temporaires equal to your rage dégâts bonus. If la cible is agrippé by you, you instead gain points de vie temporaires equal to twice your rage dégâts bonus.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.z1GbnjuzJwMIDqrC]{Punishing Strike}

Your target must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature is assourdi until the start of its next turn. If la cible is agrippé by you, it is instead incapacitated until the start of its next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.noDt2WpQUR3hLzxK]{Staggering Strike}

Your target must make a Strength or Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (la cible chooses the score de caractéristique to use). On a failed sauvegarde, your target is pushed back 5 mètres. If la cible is agrippé by you, it is instead knocked à terre.

staggering-strike.name: Frappe Étourdissante
staggering-strike.description: Your target must make a Strength or Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (la cible chooses the score de caractéristique to use). On a failed sauvegarde, your target is pushed back 5 mètres. If la cible is agrippé by you, it is instead knocked à terre.

shattering-strikes.name: Frappes Brisantes
shattering-strikes.description:
Approche de la Baston : niveau 6

Your rage causes your strikes to overcome the hardest of materials. While raging, you gain the following benefits:

  • Your unarmed strikes and improved weapons count as enhanced for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to unenhanced attacks and dégâts.
  • Your unarmed strikes deal double dégâts against structures.

twisting-winds.name: Vents Tourbillonnants
twisting-winds.description:
Cyclone Approach: niveau 6

Your unpredictable movement makes you harder to hit and pin down. When you make a jet de sauvegarde or test de caractéristiques to avoid being knocked à terre, pushed, agrippé, or entravé, it gains a bonus equal to your Strength or Dexterity modificateur (your choice) as long as it doesn't already include that modificateur.

projected-barrier.name: Barrière Projetée
projected-barrier.description:
Way of Balance: niveau 6

When a creature that you can see within 30 mètres of you takes dégâts, you can use your réaction to cause your Force Barrier to absorb that dégâts. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, the warded creature takes any remaining dégâts.

projected-maelstrom.name: Maelström Projeté
projected-maelstrom.description:
You create an unstable energy maelstrom in a 5-foot cube at a point you can see within 30 mètres that lasts jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. A creature takes [[/r 4d4]] energy dégâts when it enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there. You can maintain the barrier by spending an additional barrier point de vie at the start of each of your turns (no action required).

Cette aptitude's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d4]] when you reach niveau 11 ([[/r 5d4]]) and niveau 17 ([[/r 6d4]]).

projected-sphere.name: Sphère Projetée
projected-sphere.description: You create a protective spherical barrier in a 5-foot-radius sphere a point you can see within 30 mètres that lasts jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. Creatures within the barrier have three-quarters cover from attacks originating from outside the barrier. You can maintain the barrier by spending an additional barrier point de vie at the start of each of your turns (no action required).

projected-wave.name: Vague Projetée
projected-wave.description:
You create a wave of barrier energy in a cône de 4,5 mètres. Each creature within the cone must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 2d6]] energy dégâts and is pushed back to the edge of the cone. On a success, they take half dégâts and aren't pushed.

Cette aptitude's dégâts increases by [[/r 1d6]] when you reach niveau 11 ([[/r 3d6]]) and niveau 17 ([[/r 4d6]]).

regenerative-shielding.name: Protection Régénérative
regenerative-shielding.description:
Bulwark Technique: niveau 11

Quand une créature hostile vous oblige à faire un jet de sauvegarde et que vous réussissez, votre barrière personnelle regagne des points de vie égaux à votre modificateur d'Intelligence.

adaptive-barrier.name: Barrière Adaptative
adaptive-barrier.description:
Ing?nierie Gadget : niveau 18

When a creature who has one of your barriers within 30 mètres of you that you can see takes dégâts, and that dégâts is of a type that could be affected by that barrier, you can use your réaction to grant them resistance to the triggering dégâts. If that dégâts is the same type as the barrier's chosen dégâts, you instead grant them immunity. Whether resistance or immunity, the barrier immediately drops to 0 points de vie.

mark-of-the-bulwark.name: Marque du Rempart
mark-of-the-bulwark.description:
Bulwark Technique: niveau 3

When la cible of your Ranger's Quarry feature makes a attaque au corps à corps against a friendly creature within 5 mètres of you, you can use your réaction to force the attack to target you instead. If the attack hits, and your Personal Barrier has points de vie, the attacking creature takes bonus dégâts equal to your Ranger's Quarry Damage Die.

personal-barrier.name: Barrière Personnelle
personal-barrier.description:
Bulwark Technique: niveau 3

You gain access to a powerful personal barrier. Whenever you complete a short or repos long, you create a barrier on yourpersonnelle that lasts until you finish a short or repos long. That barrier has points de vie equal to twice your scout niveau + your Intelligence modificateur. Your barrier can never have points de vie greater than twice your scout niveau + your Intelligence modificateur.

Whenever you take dégâts, the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, you take any remaining dégâts.

While the barrier has 0 points de vie, it can't absorb dégâts, but its power remains. Whenever you cast a pouvoir technique of niveau 1 or higher, your barrier regains points de vie equal to the number of tech points spent.

De plus, for as long as your barrier has points de vie, you gain the following benefits:

  • You are considered proficient in Constitution jet de sauvegardes for the purpose of maintaining concentration on pouvoir techniques.
  • Hostile creatures that hit you with attaque au corps à corpss take energy dégâts equal to your Intelligence modificateur (minimum of one).

battlefield-euphoria.name: Euphorie du Champ de Bataille
battlefield-euphoria.description:
Champion Approach: niveau 10

While raging, when you score a critical hit with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, and when you reduce a hostile creature to 0 points de vie with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you recover an expended dé de supériorité.

furious-influence.name: Influence Furieuse
furious-influence.description:
Champion Approach: niveau 14

While raging, you gain the following benefits:

-You are resistant to psychic dégâts.

-When you affect an ally with a maneuver, they gain the benefit of one of your dégâts resistances jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

champion-superiority.name: Supériorité du Champion
champion-superiority.description:
Champion Approach: niveau 3

You learn maneuvers that are fueled by special dice called dés de supériorité. See chapter 13 for the maneuvers list.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.VlxRu3b3jxcOBPy6]{Maneuvers Known}

You learn two maneuvers de votre choix, and you earn more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Maneuvers Known column of the Champion Superiority table. Many maneuvers enhance an attack in some way. You can use only one maneuver per attack, and you may only use each maneuver une fois par tour.

Each time you learn new maneuvers, you can also replace one maneuver you know with a different one.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.OTPEBk9GeSPdIJOo]{Superiority Dice}

You have two dés de supériorité, which are d4s, and you earn more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Superiority Dice Quantity column of the Champion Superiority table. This die changes as you gain berserker niveaus, as shown in the Superiority Dice Size column of the Champion Superiority table. A dé de supériorité is expended quand vous utilisez it.

Vous regagnez tous of your expended dés de supériorité when you finish a short or repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.okyJ09ep0SX9rfk1]{Maneuver Ability}

Your maneuver ability varies based on the type of the maneuver you use. You use Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution for physical maneuvers (your choice), Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma for mental maneuvers (your choice), and an ability de votre choix for general maneuvers. You use this ability whenever a maneuver refers to your maneuver ability. De plus, you use this modificateur de caractéristique when setting the jet de sauvegarde DD for a maneuver you use.

_

Maneuver sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your maneuver modificateur de caractéristique

_

maneuver-ability.name: Capacité de Maneuvre
maneuver-ability.description:
Your maneuver ability varies based on the type of the maneuver you use. You use Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution for physical maneuvers (your choice), Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma for mental maneuvers (your choice), and an ability de votre choix for general maneuvers. You use this ability whenever a maneuver refers to your maneuver ability. De plus, you use this modificateur de caractéristique when setting the jet de sauvegarde DD for a maneuver you use.

_

Maneuver sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your maneuver modificateur de caractéristique

_

maneuvers-known.name: Maneuvres Connus
maneuvers-known.description:
Vous apprenez deux manœuvres de votre choix et vous gagnez davantage aux niveaux supérieurs, comme indiqué dans la colonne Manœuvres connues du tableau de supériorité Maverick. De nombreuses manœuvres améliorent une attaque d’une manière ou d’une autre. Vous ne pouvez utiliser qu'une seule manœuvre par attaque, et vous ne pouvez utiliser chaque manœuvre qu'une fois par tour.

Chaque fois que vous apprenez de nouvelles manœuvres, vous pouvez également remplacer une manœuvre que vous connaissez par une autre.

reckless-maneuvers.name: Maneuvres Téméraires
reckless-maneuvers.description:
Champion Approach: niveau 3

When you use your Reckless Attack feature, you have avantage on dé de supériorité rolls that would be added to the attack or jet de dégâtss of your affected attacks.

superiority-dice.name: Dés de Supériorité
superiority-dice.description:
You have two dés de supériorité, which are d4s, and you earn more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Superiority Dice Quantity column of the Maverick Superiority table. This die changes as you gain operative niveaus, as shown in the Superiority Dice Size column of the Maverick Superiority table. A dé de supériorité is expended quand vous utilisez it.

Vous regagnez tous of your expended dés de supériorité when you finish a short or repos long.

the-thrill.name: Le Frisson
the-thrill.description:
Champion Approach: niveau 6

You have avantage on test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being charmé or effrayé, and creatures can't have avantage on test de caractéristiques or jet de sauvegardes to avoid being charmé or effrayé by effects that you control.

heroes-feast.name: Festin des Héros
heroes-feast.description:
Chef Pursuit: niveau 17

You have developed a signature feast that is the purest distillation of your knowledge and talent as a chef.

Over the course of a repos long, you can expend rare culinary supplies worth 1,000 cr to create your feast, which can feed a number of creatures equal to twice your Critical Analysis ability modifer. Any creature partaking in the feast gains the following benefits:

  • It is cured of all poisons and disease, and becomes immune to poison and disease.
  • It makes Wisdom jet de sauvegardes to avoid being effrayé with avantage.
  • Its point de vie maximum and current points de vie increase by [[/r 2d10]].

These benefits last until the end of la créature's next repos long or 24 hours have passed. Cette aptitude has no effect on droids or constructs.

culinary-knowledge.name: Connaissance Culinaire
culinary-knowledge.description:
Chef Pursuit: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise with chef's kits and your choice of the Nature or Survival skills. De plus, you can't have disavantage on checks you make with them.

emergency-supplements.name: Suppléments d'Urgence
emergency-supplements.description:
Chef Pursuit: niveau 3

You are prepared to assist allies with specially prepared, instantly effective supplements. When an ally is la cible of your Critical Analysis feature and within 5 mètres of you, you may expend a dé de supériorité and give that ally the benefits of any discovery that utilizes a dé de supériorité and is exclusive to the Chef Pursuit, regardless of whether or not you've chosen it.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

balanced-diet.name: Régime Équilibré
balanced-diet.description:
Chef Pursuit: niveau 6

Your cooking is so nutritionally balanced that it allows allies to stave off the effects of continued rigorous activity. Creatures de votre choix who eat food prepared by you have avantage on Constitution jet de sauvegardes to avoid épuisement, as described in chapter 8, until the end of their next repos long.

comfort-food.name: Aliment Réconfortant
comfort-food.description:
Chef Pursuit: niveau 9

If you or any friendly creatures who have consumed food you prepared during a repos court regain points de vie by spending dés de vie at the end of the repos court, each of those creatures regains an extra [[/r 1d8]] points de vie.

The extra points de vie increase when you reach certain niveaus in this class: to [[/r 1d10]] at niveau 11, and to [[/r 1d12]] at niveau 15.

bridge.name: Pont
bridge.description:
You deploy a bridge up to 30 mètres long, 10 mètres wide, and 3 mètres thick. The bridge starts from the point at which you deploy it, and extends in a direction de votre choix. When you dismantle your bridge, it retracts to the point at which you initially deployed it. Both ends of the bridge must be supported in some fashion; one end cannot be suspended in the air or on unstable terrain. The bridge can hold up to 1,000 lbs., any weight above which causes the bridge to instantly drop to 0 points de vie, destroying it. If a creature is on the bridge when it is destroyed or dismantled, it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a successful jet de sauvegarde, it reaches the closest part of the bridge that has stable support, or it maintains a grip on your bridge as it retracts, as appropriate. On a failed sauvegarde, it falls.

When you reach niveau 11, the bridge can now extend up to 45 mètres long, 15 mètres wide, and it can support up to 2,000 lbs. When you reach niveau 17, the bridge can now extend up to 60 mètres long, 20 mètres wide, and it can support up to 4,000 lbs.

cage.name: Cage
cage.description:
You create a cage that surrounds a cube up to 10 mètres on each side centered on la cible location. The cube is surrounded on all sides except the ground by 2-foot-thick walls. The walls and roof are completely opaque, and you choose whether the structure has a light source when you deploy it that provides bright light within the cube. Otherwise, the space within the cube is in complete darkness. The cage is permeable, allowing air, water, and sound to pass through it. You can attempt to trap unwilling Medium or smaller creatures inside the cage. When you deploy this structure in an unwilling creature's space, it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a successful sauvegarde, it can immediately move to nearest unoccupied space outside of the cage. Otherwise, it is trapped within the structure when it is deployed.

When you reach niveau 11, the cage can extend up to 15 mètres on each side, and it can trap creatures of Large size or smaller. When you reach niveau 17, the cage can extend up to 20 mètres on each side, and it can trap creatures of Huge size or smaller.

portable-structure.name: Structure Portable
portable-structure.description:
Construction Engineering: 3rd, 11th, and niveau 17

You have constructed a set of malleable, portable fortifications that can elevate you and your allies. Over the course of a repos long, you create a portable structure that travels with you.

Your portable structure can only be directed by you, and you must have a tech focus in order to direct it remotely. If you lack a tech focus, you can instead direct it while it is within 5 mètres of you. Your portable structure has the following features:

  • Its AC equals your tech sauvegarde DD.
  • It has a number of points de vie equal to 5 x your engineer niveau. If your structure is reduced to 0 points de vie, it collapses and can't be used again until you spend 1 hour repairing it, which can be done during a short or repos long.
  • You can restore missing points de vie to your structure by casting the mending pouvoir technique on it, or by completing a short or repos long. Casting the mending pouvoir technique restores a number of missing points de vie equal to your Intelligence modificateur (minimum of one), but it can't be repaired to more than half its point de vie maximum in this way. Completing a repos court restores your structure to half its point de vie maximum, and completing a repos repos longores it to its point de vie maximum.
  • Your structure has two modes: dismantled and deployed. While dismantled, your structure's speed equals your own, it hovers 5 mètres off the ground, takes up the space of a 5-foot cube, and weighs 500 lbs. This increases to a 10-foot cube and 1,000 lbs. at niveau 11, and a 15-foot cube and 2,000 lbs. at niveau 17 as you upgrade it. While deployed, your structure's speed is 0 and it takes up space dictated by how its deployed.

As an action, you can remotely deploy your structure at a space you can see on the ground within 30 mètres of you, provided there is sufficient space to support it. This range increases to 60 mètres at niveau 11 and 120 mètres at niveau 17. Automatic dismantling of your structure takes 1 minute, and can be initiated on your turn (no action required).

You can deploy your choice from these structures a combined total of four times, and you gain more uses at higher niveaus, as shown in the Modification Slots column of the engineer table. Each time you use this feature in excess of your bonus de maîtrise, your tech point maximum is reduced by 1 until you complete a repos long. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.3lzwd2q1VO1B0l6E]{Bridge}

You deploy a bridge up to 30 mètres long, 10 mètres wide, and 3 mètres thick. The bridge starts from the point at which you deploy it, and extends in a direction de votre choix. When you dismantle your bridge, it retracts to the point at which you initially deployed it. Both ends of the bridge must be supported in some fashion; one end cannot be suspended in the air or on unstable terrain. The bridge can hold up to 1,000 lbs., any weight above which causes the bridge to instantly drop to 0 points de vie, destroying it. If a creature is on the bridge when it is destroyed or dismantled, it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a successful jet de sauvegarde, it reaches the closest part of the bridge that has stable support, or it maintains a grip on your bridge as it retracts, as appropriate. On a failed sauvegarde, it falls.

When you reach niveau 11, the bridge can now extend up to 45 mètres long, 15 mètres wide, and it can support up to 2,000 lbs. When you reach niveau 17, the bridge can now extend up to 60 mètres long, 20 mètres wide, and it can support up to 4,000 lbs.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.vLz3RnxZXsAtMNIN]{Cage}

You create a cage that surrounds a cube up to 10 mètres on each side centered on la cible location. The cube is surrounded on all sides except the ground by 2-foot-thick walls. The walls and roof are completely opaque, and you choose whether the structure has a light source when you deploy it that provides bright light within the cube. Otherwise, the space within the cube is in complete darkness. The cage is permeable, allowing air, water, and sound to pass through it. You can attempt to trap unwilling Medium or smaller creatures inside the cage. When you deploy this structure in an unwilling creature's space, it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a successful sauvegarde, it can immediately move to nearest unoccupied space outside of the cage. Otherwise, it is trapped within the structure when it is deployed.

When you reach niveau 11, the cage can extend up to 15 mètres on each side, and it can trap creatures of Large size or smaller. When you reach niveau 17, the cage can extend up to 20 mètres on each side, and it can trap creatures of Huge size or smaller.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.Lx4AdR12TurVTJ3D]{Shelter}

You erect a shelter up to 15 mètres long, 10 mètres wide, and 10 mètres tall, with one-foot-thick walls, a roof, and a floor. It has a single door along its walls in a location de votre choix. The building has temperature control and lighting systems, and can withstand harsh winds, heavy rain and snow. Any creature inside the shelter is protected from hazardous environmental effects outside the shelter such as extreme heat or cold. The structure does not provide additional breathing air for anyone inside if the environment it is placed in is not breathable. The shelter can comfortably support up to 5 Medium creatures. For each Medium creature, it can instead support 2 Small creatures. For each Small creature, it can instead support 2 Tiny creatures.

When you reach niveau 11, the shelter can extend up to 30 mètres long, 15 mètres wide, 15 mètres tall, and it can now comfortably support up to 10 Medium creatures. For each Medium creature, it can instead support 2 Small creatures. For each Small creature, it can instead support 2 Tiny creatures. De plus, when a creature completes a repos long while within your shelter, they regain all spent Hit Dice, instead of only half. When you reach niveau 17, the shelter can extend up to 45 mètres long, 20 mètres wide, 20 mètres tall, and it can now comfortably support up to 10 Large creatures. For each Large creature, it can instead support 2 Medium creatures. For each Medium creature, it can instead support 2 Small creatures. For each Small creature, it can instead support 2 Tiny creatures. De plus, when a creature completes a repos long while within your shelter, their épuisement niveau is reduced by 2, instead of only 1.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.CQAL3aR5lknSTWqI]{Tower}

You erect a tower from a case de 1,5 mètre platform centered on la cible location that rises up to 30 mètres. If the tower is created under a creature, cette créature must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or be lifted by the tower. A creature can choose to fail the sauvegarde. The tower comes equipped with a ladder that reaches from the ground to the platform.

When you reach niveau 11, the tower's platform can extend 5 mètres by 10 mètres and rise up to 40 mètres. When you reach niveau 17, the tower's platform can cover a case de 3 mètres, and rise up to 50 mètres. De plus, any creature on the tower's platform has avantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.U3jN3Yfm6bmLOTbk]{Wall}

You deploy a wall up to 30 mètres long, 10 mètres high, and 3 mètres thick, or a ringed wall up to 10 mètres in diameter, 10 mètres high, and 3 mètres thick. The wall features ramparts deep enough to support creatures of Medium size or smaller, and provides one-quarter cover to any creature on its ramparts. The wall includes a ladder on the side de votre choix. You choose whether the wall contains any openings otherwise. Any openings chosen in this way can be seen through on both sides. The wall can be climbed, but requires a Strength (Athletics) check against your tech sauvegarde DD for any creature without a climbing speed. A creature can only make this check une fois par tour.

When you reach niveau 11, the wall can deploy up to 45 mètres long and 15 mètres high, or a ringed wall up to 15 mètres in diameter and 15 mètres high. De plus, the wall now provides half cover to any creature on its ramparts. When you reach niveau 17, the wall can deploy up to 60 mètres long and 20 mètres high, or a ringed wall up to 20 mètres in diameter and 20 mètres high. De plus, the wall now provides three-quarters cover to any creature on its ramparts.

shelter.name: Abri
shelter.description:
You erect a shelter up to 15 mètres long, 10 mètres wide, and 10 mètres tall, with one-foot-thick walls, a roof, and a floor. It has a single door along its walls in a location de votre choix. The building has temperature control and lighting systems, and can withstand harsh winds, heavy rain and snow. Any creature inside the shelter is protected from hazardous environmental effects outside the shelter such as extreme heat or cold. The structure does not provide additional breathing air for anyone inside if the environment it is placed in is not breathable. The shelter can comfortably support up to 5 Medium creatures. For each Medium creature, it can instead support 2 Small creatures. For each Small creature, it can instead support 2 Tiny creatures.

When you reach niveau 11, the shelter can extend up to 30 mètres long, 15 mètres wide, 15 mètres tall, and it can now comfortably support up to 10 Medium creatures. For each Medium creature, it can instead support 2 Small creatures. For each Small creature, it can instead support 2 Tiny creatures. De plus, when a creature completes a repos long while within your shelter, they regain all spent Hit Dice, instead of only half. When you reach niveau 17, the shelter can extend up to 45 mètres long, 20 mètres wide, 20 mètres tall, and it can now comfortably support up to 10 Large creatures. For each Large creature, it can instead support 2 Medium creatures. For each Medium creature, it can instead support 2 Small creatures. For each Small creature, it can instead support 2 Tiny creatures. De plus, when a creature completes a repos long while within your shelter, their épuisement niveau is reduced by 2, instead of only 1.

tower.name: Tour
tower.description:
You erect a tower from a case de 1,5 mètre platform centered on la cible location that rises up to 30 mètres. If the tower is created under a creature, cette créature must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or be lifted by the tower. A creature can choose to fail the sauvegarde. The tower comes equipped with a ladder that reaches from the ground to the platform.

When you reach niveau 11, the tower's platform can extend 5 mètres by 10 mètres and rise up to 40 mètres. When you reach niveau 17, the tower's platform can cover a case de 3 mètres, and rise up to 50 mètres. De plus, any creature on the tower's platform has avantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

wall.name: Mur
wall.description:
You deploy a wall up to 30 mètres long, 10 mètres high, and 3 mètres thick, or a ringed wall up to 10 mètres in diameter, 10 mètres high, and 3 mètres thick. The wall features ramparts deep enough to support creatures of Medium size or smaller, and provides one-quarter cover to any creature on its ramparts. The wall includes a ladder on the side de votre choix. You choose whether the wall contains any openings otherwise. Any openings chosen in this way can be seen through on both sides. The wall can be climbed, but requires a Strength (Athletics) check against your tech sauvegarde DD for any creature without a climbing speed. A creature can only make this check une fois par tour.

When you reach niveau 11, the wall can deploy up to 45 mètres long and 15 mètres high, or a ringed wall up to 15 mètres in diameter and 15 mètres high. De plus, the wall now provides half cover to any creature on its ramparts. When you reach niveau 17, the wall can deploy up to 60 mètres long and 20 mètres high, or a ringed wall up to 20 mètres in diameter and 20 mètres high. De plus, the wall now provides three-quarters cover to any creature on its ramparts.

structural-knowledge.name: Connaissance Structurelle
structural-knowledge.description:
Construction Engineering: niveau 14

Vous pouvez dépenser 1 hour inspecting and looking over a structure you can see from every angle available to you and comparing it to data you have on hand. At the end of the hour, you learn the basic blueprints for the structure, including but not limited to:

  • The structure's total points de vie.
  • Any common materials that make up the structures.
  • Whether or not the structure is in use or abandoned.
  • The total floor count for the structure, as well as the general purpose of each floor if it was created to suit a specific purpose.
  • All non-secret entrances (including doors, windows, vents, pipe systems) and where you could find them.
  • A basic map-layout of every floor and ventilation system for the building.
  • The history of the building such as what company or species could have constructed it, as well as how long it's been built.
  • Any structural weak points it might have.

De plus, quand vous faites an Investigation check while searching this structure for hidden structural elements, such as doors or passages, if you have constructor's implements, you can treat a [[/r d20]] roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

master-builder.name: Maître Bâtisseur
master-builder.description:
Construction Engineering: niveau 18

Your ability with your portable structures has reached untold superiority. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can have two structures active at a time, instead of only one, as you learn to more efficiently use your portable structure.
  • Your structures no longer take double dégâts from the siege property.
  • Your structures no longer automatically fail Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution jet de sauvegardes. Instead, your structure adds your bonus de maîtrise to the [[/r d20]] roll when it makes one of these jet de sauvegardes.

potent-fortifications.name: Fortifications Puissantes
potent-fortifications.description:
Construction Engineering: niveau 3

When a friendly creature other than you that you can see is hit with a attaque à distance while within 5 mètres of your deployed portable structure, you can use your réaction and expend one use of your Potent Aptitude to have your structure take the dégâts instead. If your structure would normally have immunity or resistance to this dégâts, it loses that immunity or resistance for this attack. When you do so, the dégâts is reduced by an amount equal to [[/r 1d10]] + your Intelligence modificateur + your engineer niveau.

build-and-destroy.name: Construire et Détruire
build-and-destroy.description:
Construction Engineering: niveau 6

You've learned how to manipulate the weak points in structures with your technology. Your pouvoir techniques and attaque d'armes gain the siege property, and your portable structures have resistance to kinetic, energy, and ion dégâts dealt by weapons.

crimson-squall.name: Rafale Cramoisie
crimson-squall.description:
Crimson Order: 6th, 11th, and niveau 17

You've learned to enhance your kata. As a action bonus while wielding a monk weapon, you can expend 1 focus point to cause the area within 5 mètres of you to become difficult terrain for hostile creatures pendant 1 minute. This area travels with you, and affected creatures within the area can not make attaque d'opportunités.

At niveau 11, the range of this area increases to 15 mètres, and at niveau 17, the range of this area increases to 30 mètres.

vigilant-sentinel.name: Sentinelle Vigilante
vigilant-sentinel.description:
Crimson Order: niveau 11

When you attempt to perceive your surroundings on your turn, you can opt to not move on that turn. If you avoid moving, you gain a +10 bonus to your Wisdom (Perception) checks jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. You lose this benefit if you move or fall à terre, either voluntarily or because of some external effect.

sovereign-protector.name: Protecteur Souverain
sovereign-protector.description:
Ordre Crimson : niveau 17

Votre maîtrise de la concentration vous a permis de libérer tout votre potentiel au combat. En bonus d'action, vous pouvez gagner les effets suivants pendant 1 minute.

  • Votre vitesse est doublée.
  • Votre CA augmente de 2.
  • Vous bénéficiez d'un avantage sur les jets de sauvegardes de Dextérité.
  • Vous gagnez une action supplémentaire à chacun de vos tours. Cette action ne peut être utilisée que pour effectuer l'action Attaque (une seule attaque d'arme), Se précipiter, Se désengager, Se cacher ou Utiliser un objet.

Cet effet se termine plus tôt si vous êtes frappé d'incapacité ou si vous mourez. Une fois que vous avez utilisé cette fonctionnalité, vous ne pouvez plus l'utiliser tant que vous n'avez pas terminé un dépôt long.

crimson-armaments.name: Armements Cramoisis
crimson-armaments.description:
Crimson Order: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise in light and medium armor. If you are already proficient in light and medium armor, you instead gain maîtrise in heavy armor. De plus, you can now gain the benefits of your Martial Arts and Unarmored Movement features while wearing armor as long as you are not wielding a shield.

De plus, you've learned to adapt to new weaponry. Over the course of an hour, which can be performed during a repos court, you can perform a kata with a weapon de votre choix. You gain maîtrise in that weapon if you do not already have maîtrise, and it becomes a monk weapon for you. You can only adapt to one weapon at a time, and if you attempt to adapt to another weapon you immediately lose your maîtrise with the chosen weapon.

adaptable-applications.name: Applications Adaptables
adaptable-applications.description:
Cybertech Engineering (Old): 6th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

When you cast a pouvoir technique of niveau 1 or higher, vous pouvez choisir to deal additional dégâts or provide additional healing with that power. The additional dégâts or healing equals half your engineer niveau.

You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

combat-contrivances.name: Astuces de Combat
combat-contrivances.description:
Cybertech Engineering (Old): niveau 14

Lorsque vous utilisez votre action pour lancer une technique de pouvoir 1er niveau ou supérieur, vous pouvez utiliser votre bonus d'action pour gagner des points de vie temporaires égaux au niveau du pouvoir technique + votre Intelligence modificateur.

severe-fallout.name: Retombées Sévères
severe-fallout.description:
Ing?nierie CyberTech : niveau 14

Whenever a creature rolls a natural 1 on a jet de sauvegarde against one of your pouvoir techniques they take double dégâts from that power. If the power doesn't deal dégâts, instead they have disavantage on their next jet de sauvegarde against a pouvoir technique you cast.

maximum-output.name: Rendement Maximum
maximum-output.description:
Heavy Weapons Specialist: niveau 7

When you take the Attack action while wielding a weapon with the heavy or strength properties, you can forgo one or more attacks. If you do so, the first time you deal dégâts with the weapon before the start of your next turn, you deal additional dégâts of the same type as the weapon's dégâts. If this instance would deal dégâts to multiple creatures, you can only apply this additional dégâts to one of them. For each attack you forgo, you deal additional dégâts equal to [[/r 1d12]] + half your fighter niveau. If you miss with the first attack roll you make before the end of your next turn, or une cible succeeds on the jet de sauvegarde against your weapon's burst or rapid property, you instead deal normal weapon dégâts.

perfected-purposing.name: Utilisation Perfectionnée
perfected-purposing.description:
Cybertech Engineering (Old): niveau 18

When you cast a pouvoir technique, vous pouvez choisir to deal maximum dégâts or provide maximum healing with that power.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

cyberpad.name: Cyberpad
cyberpad.description:
Ing?nierie CyberTech : niveau 3

Over the course of a repos long, you can modify your wristpad. You must have a wristpad and cybertech's implements in order to perform this modification.

Your wristpad requires attunement, can only be used by you, and counts as a tech focus for your pouvoir techniques while you are attuned to it. Your modified wristpad has 4 modification slots, and it gains more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Modification Slots column of the engineer class table. For each modification installed in excess of your bonus de maîtrise, your tech point maximum is reduced by 1. Over the course of a repos long, you can replace or remove a number of modifications up to your Intelligence modificateur (minimum of one).

Some modification effects require jet de sauvegardes. When you use such an effect from this class, the DD equals your tech sauvegarde DD.

cybertech-contraptions.name: Inventions CyberTech
cybertech-contraptions.description:
Cybertech Engineering (Old): niveau 3

You learn modify gadgets and wristpads utilizing your cybertech knowledge. Over the course of a repos long, you can modify your wristpad. You must have a wristpad and cybertech's implements in order to perform this modification.

Your wristpad requires attunement, can only be used by you, and counts as a tech focus for your pouvoir techniques while you are attuned to it. Your modified wristpad has 4 modification slots, and it gains more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Modification Slots column of the engineer table. For each modification installed in excess of your bonus de maîtrise, your tech point maximum is reduced by 1. Over the course of a repos long, you can install, replace, or remove a number of modifications up to your Intelligence modificateur (minimum of one).

Some modification effects require jet de sauvegardes. When you use such an effect from this class, the DD equals your tech sauvegarde DD.

insightful-casting.name: Incantation Perspicace
insightful-casting.description:
Ing?nierie CyberTech : niveau 3

Vous pouvez dépenser des utilisations de votre Potent Aptitude pour gagner des points technologiques supplémentaires, ou dépenser des points technologiques pour gagner des utilisations supplémentaires de Potent Aptitude.

Création de points technologiques. Vous pouvez transformer une seule utilisation de Potent Aptitude en deux points technologiques sous forme de bonus d'action pendant votre tour. Ces points technologiques supplémentaires peuvent dépasser votre maximum. Tous les points technologiques que vous créez avec cette fonctionnalité disparaissent lorsque vous terminez un terrain de repos.

Création d'une aptitude puissante. En guise de bonus d'action à votre tour, vous pouvez dépenser deux points technologiques pour obtenir une seule utilisation de votre aptitude puissante.

potent-techcasting.name: Incantation Technique Puissante
potent-techcasting.description:
Cybertech Engineering (Old): niveau 3

Lorsque vous ratez un jet d'attaque technique, ou qu'une créature réussit un jet de sauvegarde contre une technique de pouvoir que vous lancez, vous pouvez dépenser une utilisation de votre Aptitude Potente pour la submerger. Lancez le dé, et soit l'ajoutez au jet d'attaque, soit soustrayez-le de leur jet de sauvegarde.

quickslice.name: Tranche Rapide
quickslice.description:
Ing?nierie CyberTech : niveau 6

When a creature you can see casts a pouvoir technique, you may use your réaction to attempt to download that pouvoir technique to your wristpad for later use if it is of a niveau for which you can cast.

Make an test de caractéristique using your techcasting ability with maîtrise. The DD equals 10 + two times the power's niveau. On a success you store the power for later use. On a failure, the power is not stored. You can cast powers stored in your wristpad as if you had learned them and they do not count against your pouvoir techniques known.

Once you have used this feature on a creature, you cannot do so again on the same creature until you complete a short or repos long.

You can store an amount of niveaus worth of pouvoir techniques equal to your engineer niveau at a time. De plus, vous pouvez choisir replace or remove one or more pouvoir techniques learned by this feature each time you use it.

tornado.name: Tornade
tornado.description:
Cyclone Approach: niveau 14

You can become a tornado of attacks. When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can forgo one of your regular attacks to make a attaque au corps à corps against any number of creatures within 5 mètres of you, with a separate attack roll for each target. If you are wielding a separate melee weapon in each hand, each successful hit against a target deals dégâts equal to the dégâts dice of both weapons + your modificateur de caractéristique + any other modificateurs.

You can use this feature un nombre de fois égal à your Strength modificateur (a minimum of once). Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a short or repos long.

shoot-first.name: Tirer en Premier
shoot-first.description:
Deadeye Technique: 11th, 13th, and niveau 17

You have learned that the person who shoots first is often the one who walks out alive. When you make a attaque d'arme à distance against a creature that has not yet acted during your first turn in combat and you have avantage on the roll, you can reroll one of the dice once. De plus, on a hit, you deal an extra [[/r 1d8]] dégâts of the same type as the weapon. This dégâts increases to [[/r 1d10]] at niveau 13 and [[/r 1d12]] at niveau 17.

overwatch.name: Surveillance
overwatch.description:
Deadeye Technique: niveau 15

You have become a master at protecting your allies from afar. When a creature attempts to make an attaque d'opportunité against an allied creature, or forces your ally to make a jet de sauvegarde, you can use your réaction to make an attack roll against the enemy creature.

If your attack hits, either impose disavantage on the enemy creature's attaque d'opportunité roll or grant avantage to any allies making the jet de sauvegarde.

deadeye-superiority.name: Supériorité du Tireur d'Élite
deadeye-superiority.description:
Deadeye Technique: niveau 3

You learn maneuvers that are fueled by special dice called dés de supériorité. See chapter 13 for the maneuvers list.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.Fbcw9zlpCiIwsqBJ]{Maneuvers Known}

You learn two maneuvers de votre choix, and you earn more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Maneuvers Known column of the Deadeye Superiority table. Many maneuvers enhance an attack in some way. You can use only one maneuver per attack, and you may only use each maneuver une fois par tour.

Each time you learn new maneuvers, you can also replace one maneuver you know with a different one.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.W2SOriNOHFTWCUzN]{Superiority Dice}

You have two dés de supériorité, which are d4s, and you earn more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Superiority Dice Quantity column of the Deadeye Superiority table. This die changes as you gain scout niveaus, as shown in the Superiority Dice Size column of the Deadeye Superiority table. A dé de supériorité is expended quand vous utilisez it.

Vous regagnez tous of your expended dés de supériorité when you finish a short or repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.Xj87dvhb8UaHnwD3]{Maneuver Ability}

Your maneuver ability varies based on the type of the maneuver you use. You use Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution for physical maneuvers (your choice), Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma for mental maneuvers (your choice), and an ability de votre choix for general maneuvers. You use this ability whenever a maneuver refers to your maneuver ability. De plus, you use this modificateur de caractéristique when setting the jet de sauvegarde DD for a maneuver you use.

_

Maneuver sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your maneuver modificateur de caractéristique

_

mark-of-the-deadeye.name: Marque du Tireur d'Élite
mark-of-the-deadeye.description:
Deadeye Technique: niveau 3

The range of your Ranger's Quarry feature doubles. De plus, when making attaque d'arme à distances against la cible of your Ranger's Quarry, the normal and long range of your blaster weapons double.

cover-to-cover.name: De Couverture en Couverture
cover-to-cover.description:
Technique Deadeye: niveau 7

Les jets d'attaque effectués contre vous lors de votre tour sont effectués avec désavantage.

volatile-reflexes.name: Réflexes Volatils
volatile-reflexes.description:
Demolitions Specialist: niveau 10

When a creature within 5 mètres of you makes a attaque au corps à corps against you, you can use your réaction and throw a charge behind la cible. If la cible fails its jet de sauvegarde against the charge, you impose disavantage on the attack roll made against you.

backup-plans.name: Plans de Secours
backup-plans.description:
Demolitions Specialist: niveau 15

When you roll initiative and have no charges remaining, you can create 2 charges. De plus, whenever you create a charge, you can change the type de dégâts to acid, energy, fire, ion, lightning, or sonic.

explosive-charge.name: Charge Explosive
explosive-charge.description:
Demolitions Specialist: 3rd, 7th, and niveau 15

You learn to create a number of small explosives known as charges. Over the course of a short or repos long, you can create a number of charges equal to your Intelligence modificateur. You must have a demolitions kit in order to create these charges. Your charges can only be used by you, and they lose their potency at the end of your next short or repos long.

Une fois par tour, when you would make a attaque d'arme à distance, you can instead throw one of your charges. Your charges have a range equal to 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. You can throw a charge at a point you can see within range. Each creature within 5 mètres must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Intelligence modificateur). A creature takes [[/r 2d4]] + your Intelligence modificateur kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one.

The dégâts of your charges increases to [[/r 3d4]] at niveau 7 and [[/r 4d4]] at niveau 15.

bombard.name: Bombardement
bombard.description:
Spécialiste des démolitions: niveau 18

Quand une créature rate son jet de sauvegarde contre une charge ou une grenade lancée par vous, elle est désavantagée lors du prochain jet de sauvegarde de Dextérité qu'elle effectue avant la fin de votre prochain tourner.

cause-and-effect.name: Cause et Effet
cause-and-effect.description:
Demolitions Specialist: niveau 7

You learn to throw grenades as a action bonus. De plus, when a creature fails a jet de sauvegarde against a charge or grenade, you can expend a dé de supériorité to apply one of your maneuvers. You can only use this feature once per grenade.

discombobulate.name: Déconcerter
discombobulate.description:
Detective Pursuit: niveau 17

When you use a scholar maneuver on a hostile creature, you can force cette cible to make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your maneuver sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible is étourdi pendant 1 minute. La cible can repeat the jet de sauvegarde at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itpersonnelle on a success.

Once you use this feature, you can't do so again until you finish a short or repos long.

intelligent-applications.name: Applications Intelligentes
intelligent-applications.description:
Detective Pursuit: niveau 3

Lorsque vous analysez une créature hostile avec votre Analyse Critique, vous pouvez utiliser votre modificateur de capacité Analyse Critique avec n'importe quelle arme, à condition qu'elle n'ait pas de propriétés lourdes ou spéciales.

martial-training.name: Entraînement Martial
martial-training.description:
Detective Pursuit: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise in martial vibroweapons and the Investigation skill. De plus, you can't have disavantage on checks you make with it.

sharp-instincts.name: Instincts Aiguisés
sharp-instincts.description:
Detective Pursuit: niveau 9

Une fois par chacun de vos tours, quand vous contactez la cible of your Critical Analysis with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can make a Wisdom (Insight) check contested by la cible's Charisma (Deception) check. If you win the contest, you deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts to la cible, which is the same type as the weapon's dégâts

This die increases to [[/r d10]] at niveau 13 and [[/r d12]] at niveau 17.

kiss-the-wall.name: Embrasser le Mur
kiss-the-wall.description:
Disabling Practice: niveau 13

You can use your surroundings to further punish la cible of your grapple. When you roll a 1 or 2 on a Sneak Attack dégâts die for an unarmed strike you make against a creature agrippé by you, you can treat the result of the die as a 3.

neck-snap.name: Briser le Cou
neck-snap.description:
Disabling Practice: niveau 17

You learn how to immediately remove your agrippé opponent from the fight. As an action, you can force a creature agrippé by you to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, if la créature has 100 points de vie or fewer, it dies. If la cible has more than 100 points de vie, it immediately takes [[/r 10d10]] true dégâts.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

clinch-strike.name: Frappe de Corps à Corps
clinch-strike.description:
Disabling Practice: niveau 3

You learn how to discourage, debilitate, and harm your enemies. You gain the following benefits while you aren't wearing heavy armor or wielding a medium or heavy shield:

  • Your dégâts die for your unarmed strikes and natural weapons increases by one step (from 1 to [[/r d4]], [[/r d4]] to [[/r d6]], or [[/r d6]] to [[/r d8]]), and you can apply your Sneak Attack dégâts quand vous contactez with an unarmed strike even if it doesn't have the finesse property.
  • You don't need avantage on your attack roll to use your Sneak Attack if la cible of your Sneak Attack is a creature agrippé by you. All the other rules for the Sneak Attack class feature still apply to you.
  • You can use the action bonus granted by your Cunning Action to make an unarmed strike against a creature you are grappling.

constrict.name: Constriction
constrict.description:
You attempt to choke la cible into inconscientness. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be entravé until the end of your following turn.

If you maintain this technique pendant 1 minute, la cible falls inconscient for 1 hour. Droids and constructs can not be knocked inconscient in this way.

disarm.name: Désarmer
disarm.description: You attempt to disarm a weapon or other object la cible is holding. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it releases the object. If you have a free hand, you can catch the object. Otherwise, it lands at your mètres.

hip-toss.name: Projection de Hanche
hip-toss.description: You attempt to throw your target to the ground. La cible must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible is pushed back 5 mètres, knocked à terre, and étourdi jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. This ends the grapple.

skilled-grappler.name: Grappler Compétent
skilled-grappler.description:
Disabling Practice: niveau 3

You learn a number of grappling techniques to subdue your opponents. Quand vous contactez une créature agrippé by you with an unarmed strike and deal Sneak Attack dégâts, you may choose to forgo two of your Sneak Attack dice to make the attack a grappling technique.

Some of your grappling techniques require your target to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the grappling technique's effects. The jet de sauvegarde DD is calculated as follows:

_

Grapple Technique sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Strength modificateur

_

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.3DOEa1vjHYx8R05A]{Constrict}

You attempt to choke la cible into inconscientness. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be entravé until the end of your following turn.

If you maintain this technique pendant 1 minute, la cible falls inconscient for 1 hour. Droids and constructs can not be knocked inconscient in this way.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.vdAfMfkFmMPTQLoE]{Disarm}
