You attempt to disarm a weapon or other object la cible is holding. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it releases the object. If you have a free hand, you can catch the object. Otherwise, it lands at your mètres.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.6o9kG6LVdWJfoLQW]{Hip Toss}

You attempt to throw your target to the ground. La cible must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible is pushed back 5 mètres, knocked à terre, and étourdi jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. This ends the grapple.

human-shield.name: Bouclier Humain
human-shield.description:
Disabling Practice: niveau 9

You learn to manipulate the body of a agrippé target to make attacks against you more difficult to land. Moving a agrippé creature the same size as you or smaller no longer halves your speed, and when a creature agrippé by you would grant you half cover, you instead have three-quarters cover. De plus, when you are hit by an attack while grappling a creature, you can use your réaction to force that attack to instead hit the agrippé creature.

sharpen-the-blade.name: Aiguiser la Lame
sharpen-the-blade.description:
Echani Order: niveau 11

You gain the ability to augment your weapons further with your focus. As a action bonus, you can expend up to 3 focus points to grant one Echani weapon you contact a bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss when you attack with it. The bonus equals the number of points you spent. This bonus lasts pendant 1 minute or until you use this feature again. Cette aptitude has no effect on an enhanced weapon that already has a bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss.

unerring-accuracy.name: Précision Infaillible
unerring-accuracy.description:
Echani Order: niveau 17

Votre maîtrise des armes vous confère une précision extraordinaire. Si vous ratez un jet d'attaque utilisant une arme de moine à votre tour, vous pouvez le relancer. Vous ne pouvez utiliser cette fonctionnalité qu'une fois par chacun de vos circuits.

agile-parry.name: Parade Agile
agile-parry.description: If you make an unarmed strike as part of the Attack action on your turn and are holding an Echani weapon, you can use it to defend yourpersonnelle if it is a melee weapon. You gain a +2 bonus to AC jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, while the weapon is in your hand and you aren't incapacitated.

echani-weapons.name: Armes Echani
echani-weapons.description:
Echani Order: niveau 3

Your special martial arts training leads you to master the use of certain weapons. You gain the following benefits. Choose two types of weapons to be your Echani weapons: one vibroweapon and one blaster. Each of these weapons can be any simple or martial

weapon that lacks the special property. You gain maîtrise with these weapons if you don't already have it. Weapons of the chosen types are monk weapons for you. Many of this order's features work only with your Echani weapons. When you reach 6th, 11th, and niveau 17 in this class, vous pouvez choisir another type of weapon to be an Echani weapon for you, following the criteria above.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.7HFu2KCPHDjXLMcn]{Agile Parry}

If you make an unarmed strike as part of the Attack action on your turn and are holding an Echani weapon, you can use it to defend yourpersonnelle if it is a melee weapon. You gain a +2 bonus to AC jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, while the weapon is in your hand and you aren't incapacitated.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.wzl4vGyu4zr4yRCr]{Echani's Shot}

You can use a action bonus on your turn to make your attaque à distances with an Echani weapon more deadly. When you do so, any target you hit with a attaque à distance using an Echani weapon takes an extra [[/r 1d4]] dégâts of the weapon's type. You retain this benefit until the end of the current turn.

echanis-shot.name: Tir Echani
echanis-shot.description: You can use a action bonus on your turn to make your attaque à distances with an Echani weapon more deadly. When you do so, any target you hit with a attaque à distance using an Echani weapon takes an extra [[/r 1d4]] dégâts of the weapon's type. You retain this benefit until the end of the current turn.

deft-strike.name: Frappe Agile
deft-strike.description: When you hit a target with an Echani weapon, you can spend 1 focus point to cause the weapon to deal extra dégâts to la cible equal to your Martial Arts die. You can use this feature only une fois par chacun de vos tours.

enhanced-echani-weapons.name: Armes Echani Améliorées
enhanced-echani-weapons.description: Your attacks with your Echani weapons count as enhanced for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to unenhanced attacks and dégâts.

one-with-the-blade.name: Un Avec la Lame
one-with-the-blade.description:
Echani Order: niveau 6

You extend your focus into your Echani weapons, granting you the following benefits.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.aXwHRhJSxgZbHRbI]{Enhanced Echani Weapons}

Your attacks with your Echani weapons count as enhanced for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to unenhanced attacks and dégâts.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.nAWdnGFRbyjdg6at]{Deft Strike}

When you hit a target with an Echani weapon, you can spend 1 focus point to cause the weapon to deal extra dégâts to la cible equal to your Martial Arts die. You can use this feature only une fois par chacun de vos tours.

redirected-shot.name: Tir Redirigé
redirected-shot.description:
Enhancement Specialist: niveau 10

You learn how to direct an errant shot toward a new target. When you make an attack roll with an enhanced shot and miss, you can use a action bonus to reroll the attack roll against a different target within 60 mètres of the original target.

ever-ready-shot.name: Tir Toujours Prêt
ever-ready-shot.description:
Spécialiste de l'amélioration : niveau 15

Vos munitions améliorées sont disponibles chaque fois que la bataille commence. Si vous lancez un jet d'initiative et qu'il ne vous reste plus aucune utilisation de munitions spéciales, vous en récupérez une utilisation.

ammunition-enhancements.name: Améliorations de Munitions
ammunition-enhancements.description:
Vous connaissez deux améliorations de munitions de votre choix, qui sont détaillées sous « Améliorations de munitions » ci-dessous, et vous gagnez davantage aux niveaux supérieurs. De nombreuses améliorations des munitions renforcent une attaque d’une manière ou d’une autre. Une fois par tour, lorsque vous tirez un coup de feu avec un blaster dans le cadre de l'action d'Attaque, vous pouvez appliquer l'une de vos options d'amélioration de munitions à ce tir,

Vous gagnez une option d'amélioration de munitions supplémentaire de votre choix lorsque vous atteignez certains niveaux de cette classe : 7e, 10e, 15e et niveau 18. Chaque option s'améliore également lorsque vous devenez un Chasseur du 18e niveau.

Chaque fois que vous apprenez de nouvelles améliorations de munitions, vous pouvez également remplacer une amélioration de munition que vous connaissez par une autre.

amplified-shots.name: Tirs Amplifiés
amplified-shots.description: You have two amplified shots, which you use to activate your ammunition enhancements. An amplified shot is expended quand vous utilisez it. When you fire an amplified shot, your weapon is treated as enhanced for overcoming resistance and immunity to unenhanced attacks and dégâts. You decide to use the option when the shot hits a creature, unless the option doesn't involve an attack roll. Vous regagnez tous of your amplified shots when you finish a short or repos long.

saving-throws.name: Jets de Sauvegarde
saving-throws.description:
Some of your ammunition enhancements require your target to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the maneuver's effects. The jet de sauvegarde DD is calculated as follows:

_

Ammunition sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Dexterity modificateur

_

special-ammunition.name: Munitions Spéciales
special-ammunition.description:
Enhancement Specialist: niveau 3

You learn ammunition enhancements that are fueled by amplified shots to unleash special enhanced effects.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.y8z1sDzLBBO8D8HI]{Ammunition Enhancements}

You know two ammunition enhancements de votre choix, which are detailed under "Ammunition Enhancements" below, and you earn more at higher niveaus. Many ammunition enhancements boost an attack in some way. Une fois par tour when you fire a shot from a blaster as part of the Attack action, you can apply one of your Ammunition Enhancement options to that shot,

You gain an additional Ammunition Enhancement option de votre choix when you reach certain niveaus in this class: 7th, 10th, 15th, and niveau 18. Each option also improves when you become an 18th-niveau fighter.

Each time you learn new ammunition enhancements, you can also replace one ammunition enhancement you know with a different one.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.OacBeMxYUFKsRow3]{Amplified Shots}

You have two amplified shots, which you use to activate your ammunition enhancements. An amplified shot is expended quand vous utilisez it. When you fire an amplified shot, your weapon is treated as enhanced for overcoming resistance and immunity to unenhanced attacks and dégâts. You decide to use the option when the shot hits a creature, unless the option doesn't involve an attack roll. Vous regagnez tous of your amplified shots when you finish a short or repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.yC4t9WqEnK0vKq6X]{Saving Throws}

Some of your ammunition enhancements require your target to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the maneuver's effects. The jet de sauvegarde DD is calculated as follows:

_

Ammunition sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Dexterity modificateur

_

studied-shooter.name: Tireur Étudié
studied-shooter.description:
Enhancement Specialist: niveau 3

You learn specialized theory typical for practitioners of the enhancement trade. You gain maîtrise in your choice of the Lore or Technology skills. De plus, you learn your choice of the encrypted message or minor hologram pouvoir technique. Intelligence is your techcasting ability for these powers.

enhanced-shot.name: Tir Amélioré
enhanced-shot.description:
Enhancement Specialist: niveau 7

You gain the ability to enhance your shots. Whenever you fire an unenhanced shot from a blaster, you can make it enhanced for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to unenhanced attacks and dégâts.

relentless-competitor.name: Compétiteur Implacable
relentless-competitor.description:
Exhibition Specialist: niveau 10

Une fois par chacun de vos tours, you can regain a use of your Action Surge (no action required). If you do so, you immediately suffer one niveau of épuisement.

showoff.name: Frimeur
showoff.description:
Exhibition Specialist: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You're a master at dazzling your friends and enemies alike. When you would make a Strength, Dexterity, Constitution, or Charisma check, you can roll a [[/r d4]] and add it to the roll. On a success, you can immediately choose a number of creatures within 30 mètres of you that can see you up to your Charisma modificateur (no action required, minimum of one). Each creature must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Charisma modificateur) or be charmé by you. Cet effets ends on a target after 1 minute, if it takes any dégâts, if you attack it, or if it witnesses you attacking or damaging any of its allies. If a target succeeds on this jet de sauvegarde, la cible has no hint you tried to charm it.

This die increases to [[/r 1d6]] at niveau 5, [[/r 1d8]] at niveau 9, [[/r 1d10]] at niveau 13, and [[/r 1d12]] at niveau 17.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

glorious-defense.name: Défense Glorieuse
glorious-defense.description:
Exhibition Specialist: niveau 15

Your glory on the battlefront can misdirect attacks. When a creature you can see hits you with an attack roll, you can use your réaction to gain a bonus to AC against that attack, potentially causing it to miss you. The bonus equals your Charisma modificateur (minimum of +1). If the attack misses, you can make one attaque d'arme against the attacker as part of this réaction.

the-beauty-of-violence.name: La Beauté de la Violence
the-beauty-of-violence.description:
Exhibition Specialist: niveau 18

You've perfected a fighting style that allows you to stylishly dominate the field of battle. When you mark a creature with your In The Spotlight feature, you can enhance it. For the duration of the mark, you gain the following additional benefits:

  • Vous pouvez ajouter your full Charisma modificateur, instead of half, to any weapon jet de dégâts you make against the marked target that doesn't already include that modificateur.
  • Vous pouvez ajouter half your Charisma modificateur (minimum of one) to any attaque d'arme roll you make against the marked target that doesn't already include that modificateur.
  • If the marked target is reduced to 0 points de vie, you can use your réaction to mark a new creature within 30 mètres of you. The duration of the new mark is equal to the remaining duration of the existing mark.

Cet effet ends early if you're incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

in-the-spotlight.name: Sous les Projecteurs
in-the-spotlight.description:
Exhibition Specialist: niveau 3

You can overwhelm an opponent with your unique blend of skill and style. As a action bonus, vous pouvez choisir une créature you can see within 30 mètres of you. La cible is marked pendant 1 minute. While la cible is marked, you gain the following benefits:

  • Vous pouvez ajouter half your Charisma modificateur (minimum of one) to any weapon jet de dégâts you make against the marked target that doesn't already include that modificateur.
  • Your critical hit range against the marked target increases by 1.
  • If the marked target is reduced to 0 points de vie, you regain points de vie equal to your fighter niveau + your Charisma modificateur (minimum of 1).

Cet effet ends early if you're incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a short or repos long.

glory-kill.name: Mise à Mort Glorieuse
glory-kill.description:
Exhibition Specialist: niveau 7

As you defeat your enemies in combat, you can weaken the morale of other foes or bolster the resolve of your allies alike. When you score a critical hit or reduce a creature to 0 points de vie, vous pouvez choisir one or more creatures that you can see within 30 mètres of you, up to a number equal to your Charisma modificateur (minimum of une créature). Each of the chosen

creatures are affected by one of the following effects de votre choix:

  • The creature gains points de vie temporaires equal to [[/r 1d6]] + your Charisma modificateur (minimum of 1 temporary point de vie).
  • The creature must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Charisma modificateur) or be effrayé of you jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

survey-master.name: Maître de l'Étude
survey-master.description:
Explorer Pursuit: niveau 17

Lorsque vous utilisez la fonction Zone étudiée, la zone affectée est un cube de 30 pieds au lieu d'un cube de 15 pieds.

focused-navigator.name: Navigateur Focalisé
focused-navigator.description:
Explorer Pursuit: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise in two of the Perception, Piloting, Survival, and Acrobatics skills. De plus, you can't have disavantage on checks you make with them.

surveyed-area.name: Zone Étudiée
surveyed-area.description:
Explorer Pursuit: niveau 3

You can now use your Critical Analysis feature on a 15-foot cube area within 60 mètres of you that you can see. You can treat any creatures inside this cube as if they are la cible of your Critical Analysis feature, and when a creature ends your Critical Analysis feature on thempersonnelle, it does not end this effect for other creatures in your Surveyed Area.

field-advantage.name: Avantage de Terrain
field-advantage.description:
Explorer Pursuit: niveau 6

You learn to quickly convey spatial information in the midst of combat about the area you analyzed, giving them an edge at maneuvering in the area. While moving through your Surveyed Area, you and friendly creatures de votre choix ignore unenhanced difficult terrain, and attaque d'opportunités against them are made with disavantage.

unstoppable-adventurer.name: Aventurier Imparable
unstoppable-adventurer.description:
Explorer Pursuit: niveau 9

Vous apprenez à nager et à escalader des surfaces verticales avec facilité. Vous gagnez une vitesse de nage et de montée égale à votre vitesse de marche.

De plus, votre fonction Sage Advice peut être utilisée pour donner aux créatures amies des connaissances sur la façon de nager ou de grimper, à condition que vous ayez une vitesse de nage ou de montée. Les créatures choisies ont une vitesse de nage ou une vitesse d'escalade pendant toute la durée.

on-your-six.name: Sur Tes Arrières
on-your-six.description:
Fireteam Specialist: niveau 10

While your companion is within 5 mètres of you, you can use your action bonus to begin a coordinated

maneuver. For the next minute, while you and your companion are within 5 mètres of each other and neither of you are wielding a shield, you each gain a bonus to AC equal to half your bonus de maîtrise.

Cet effet ends early if either you or your companion are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you complete a repos long.

tactical-advice.name: Conseil Tactique
tactical-advice.description:
Spécialiste Fireteam : niveau 15

En une minute, vous pouvez partager vos connaissances avec jusqu'à cinq alliés. Pendant l'heure suivante, les créatures choisies acquièrent toutes vos compétences en matière d'armes et d'armures, ainsi qu'une seule utilisation de votre fonctionnalité Indomptable.

Vous pouvez choisir un allié supplémentaire au niveau 17.

Une fois que vous avez utilisé cette fonctionnalité, vous ne pouvez plus l'utiliser tant que vous n'avez pas terminé un repos long.

no-soldier-left-behind.name: Aucun Soldat laissé Pour Compte
no-soldier-left-behind.description:
Fireteam Specialist: niveau 18

While under the effects of On Your Six, if either you or your companion are reduced to 0 points de vie, you can end On Your Six to have them drop to 1 point de vie instead. When you do so, the effects of On Your Six persist jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

improved-combat-superiority.name: Supériorité de Combat Améliorée
improved-combat-superiority.description:
Tactical Specialist: niveau 3

Your tactical skill in combat improves, granting bonuses to your Combat Superiority.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.796eVW4nUKLjSsyA]{Improved Maneuvers }

You know four maneuvers de votre choix, instead of two, and you earn more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Maneuvers Known column of the Tactical Superiority table.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.y6uU0sj0kHglvsYU]{Improved Superiority Dice}

You have four dés de supériorité, instead of two, and you earn more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Superiority Dice Quantity column of the Tactical Superiority table.

improved-maneuvers.name: Maneuvers Améliorés
improved-maneuvers.description: Vous connaissez quatre manœuvres de votre choix, au lieu de deux, et vous gagnez davantage aux niveaux supérieurs, comme indiqué dans la colonne Manœuvres connues du tableau de supériorité tactique.

improved-superiority-dice.name: Dés de Supériorité Améliorés
improved-superiority-dice.description: You have four dés de supériorité, instead of two, and you earn more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Superiority Dice Quantity column of the Tactical Superiority table.

lead-by-example.name: Montrer l'Exemple
lead-by-example.description:
Fireteam Specialist: niveau 3

Une fois par tour, when an ally that can see or hear you attacks a creature that you can see, you can expend a dé de supériorité and enhance that ally's attack, using one of the maneuvers that you know.

rally-the-troops.name: Rassembler les Troupes
rally-the-troops.description:
Fireteam Specialist: niveau 7

When you use your Second Wind feature while your companion is within 10 mètres of you, your companion regains points de vie and gains points de vie temporaires equal to your fighter niveau.

This radius increases to 30 mètres at niveau 11, and 60 mètres at niveau 17.

humanoid-companion.name: Compagnon Humanoïde
humanoid-companion.description:
Way of Tutelage: niveau 3

You've taken an apprentice, gaining the services of your own humanoid companion.

Create your humanoid companion as detailed in the Companions section of the Customization Options document for Expanded Content.

De plus to its traits and features, your companion gains additional benefits while it is bonded to you:

  • Your companion gains two additional traits. It gains one more additional trait when you reach niveau 11 in this class. For each trait in excess of your bonus de maîtrise, your point de Force maximum is reduced by 2.

Lastly, while bonded and within 10 mètres of you, when your companion is hit by an attack, you can use your réaction and expend a use of your Force Shield feature to shroud it in Force energy. If you do so, jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, both you and your companion gain the benefits of your Force Shield. This includes the triggering attack.

At niveau 11, your companion must be within 30 mètres of you to benefit from this feature. At niveau 17, your companion must be within 60 mètres.

indomitable-in-tandem.name: Indomptable en Tandem
indomitable-in-tandem.description:
Fireteam Specialist: niveau 15

Lorsque vous et votre compagnon êtes tous les deux obligés d'effectuer un jet de sauvegarde contre le même effet, et que l'un de vous, mais pas les deux, échoue, vous pouvez dépenser une utilisation de votre fonctionnalité Indomptable pour vous avoir tous les deux à la place. réussir.

intimidating-presence.name: Présence Intimidante
intimidating-presence.description:
Frenzied Approach: niveau 10

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour frighten someone with your menacing presence. When you do so, choose une créature that you can see within 30 mètres of you. If la créature can see or hear you, it must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Charisma modificateur) or be effrayé of you jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. On subsequent turns, you can use your action to extend the duration of this effect on the effrayé creature jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. Cet effet ends if la créature ends its turn out of line of sight or more than 60 mètres away from you. While raging, you add double your bonus de maîtrise to the sauvegarde DD, instead of your normal bonus de maîtrise.

If la créature succeeds on its jet de sauvegarde, it becomes immune to this feature for 24 hours.

retaliation.name: Représailles
retaliation.description:
Frenzied Approach: niveau 14

When you take dégâts from a creature that is within 5 mètres of you, you can use your réaction to make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against cette créature.

frenzy.name: Frénésie
frenzy.description:
Frenzied Approach: niveau 3

You can go into a frenzy when you enter your rage. If you do so, for the duration of your rage you can make a single attaque d'arme au corps à corps as a action bonus on each of your turns after this one.

The first time you use this feature, you suffer no ill effect. If you use this feature again before you finish a repos long, you suffer one niveau of épuisement when your rage ends each time you use it.

When you finish a repos long, you reduce your épuisement niveau by 2, instead of 1. De plus, any effect that removes épuisement reduces your épuisement by 1 additional niveau.

maniacal-rage.name: Rage Maniaque
maniacal-rage.description:
Approche frénétique : niveau 3

En rage, vous avez l'avantage sur les tests de Charisme (Intimidation).

mindless-rage.name: Rage Inconsciente
mindless-rage.description:
Frenzied Approach: niveau 6

You can't be charmé or effrayé while raging. If you are charmé or effrayé when you enter your rage, the effect is suspended for the duration of the rage.

versatile-direction.name: Direction Polyvalente
versatile-direction.description:
Ing?nierie Gadget : 6ème, 9ème, 13ème et niveau 17

Vous pouvez prendre un deuxième bonus d'action à chacun de vos tours. Vous pouvez utiliser cette fonctionnalité trois fois. Vous gagnez une utilisation supplémentaire au 9ème, 13ème et au niveau 17. Vous récupérez toutes les utilisations dépensées lorsque vous terminez un repos long.

reinforced-barriers.name: Barrières Renforcées
reinforced-barriers.description:
Ing?nierie Gadget : niveau 14

When you cast a pouvoir technique while you have a barrier active, you can restore points de vie to the barrier, provided it is within 30 mètres of you. You restore a number of points de vie equal to twice the power's niveau, or 1 point de vie for an at-will power. This can't increase a barrier's points de vie above its initial points de vie. If you have multiple barriers active, you can divide these points de vie between them as you see fit.

environmental-barrier.name: Barrière Environnementale
environmental-barrier.description: You project an environmental barrier that lasts until the end of your next short or repos long. The barrier has a number of points de vie equal to the amount rolled on your Potent Aptitude die + your engineer niveau. Whenever a creature with this barrier takes dégâts (one of acid, cold, fire, force, lightning, necrotic, poison, psychic, or sonic, chosen by you when you activate the effect), the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, la créature take any remaining dégâts.

gadgeteer-harness.name: Harnais du Gadgetier
gadgeteer-harness.description:
Ing?nierie Gadget : niveau 3

You learn to create and modify adventuring gear utilizing your gadgeteer experience. Over the course of a repos long, you can create your modified gadgeteer harness. You must have gadgeteer's implements in order to perform this modification.

Your gadgeteer harness is enhanced, requires attunement, can only be used by you, and counts as a tech focus for your pouvoir techniques while you are attuned to it. Your gadgeteer harness has 4 modification slots to which you can affix gadgets, and it gains more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Modification Slots column of the engineer table. For each modification installed in excess of your bonus de maîtrise, your tech point maximum is reduced by 1. Over the course of a repos long, you can install, replace, or remove a number of modifications up to your Intelligence modificateur (minimum of one).

Some modification effects require jet de sauvegardes. When you use such an effect from this class, the DD equals your tech sauvegarde DD.

physical-barrier.name: Barrière Physique
physical-barrier.description: You project a physical barrier that lasts until the end of your next short or repos long. The barrier has a number of points de vie equal to the amount rolled on your Potent Aptitude die + half your engineer niveau. Whenever a creature with this barrier takes dégâts (one of energy, ion, or kinetic, chosen by you when you activate the effect), the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, la créature take any remaining dégâts.

risk-versus-reward.name: Risque Versus Récompense
risk-versus-reward.description:
Gambler Pursuit: 3rd, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

When you make your first attack on your turn against la cible of your Critical Analysis feature, you can decide to gamble by rolling a [[/r d6]]. On a roll of 4 or higher, you have avantage on attack rolls against cette créature jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. On a roll of 3 or lower, cette créature instead has avantage on attack rolls against you jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

This die increases to [[/r d8]] at niveau 9, [[/r d10]] at niveau 13, and [[/r d12]] at niveau 17.

tell-me-the-odds.name: Dis-Moi les Probabilités
tell-me-the-odds.description:
Gambler Pursuit: 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

If la cible of your Critical Analysis hits you with a attaque d'arme roll, you can use your réaction to roll a [[/r d8]]. On a 4 or higher, you impose disavantage on the roll. If la cible already had disavantage, they must instead reroll one of the dice once (your choice).

This die increases to [[/r d10]] at niveau 13 and [[/r d12]] at niveau 17.

borrowed-luck.name: Chance Empruntée
borrowed-luck.description:
Gambler Pursuit: niveau 17

You have gained the ability to unnaturally alter luck in your favor. Once per round, after an attack roll, jet de sauvegarde, or test de caractéristique is rolled by you or a creature that you can see, you can replace the number on the [[/r d20]] with a 7. Note the number on the [[/r d20]] of the roll that you replaced. That number becomes your borrowed luck roll.

While you have a borrowed luck roll, you can expend it and replace any test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde made by you or a creature that you can see with the value of the borrowed luck roll. You can only have one borrowed luck roll at a time, and you lose any

unused borrowed luck rolls when you complete a short or repos long.

gamblers-aptitude.name: Aptitude du Parieur
gamblers-aptitude.description:
Gambler Pursuit: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise with your choice of gaming set and your choice of the Insight, Deception, Persuasion, or Escamotage skills. De plus, you can't have disavantage on checks you make with them.

lucky-number-7.name: Numéro Chanceux 7
lucky-number-7.description:
Gambler Pursuit: niveau 6

Whenever you roll a 7 on an attack roll against la cible of your Critical Analysis feature, the attack automatically hits and you regain an expended dé de supériorité.

When attacking with avantage or disavantage, this effect applies if either roll is a 7. If both rolls are a 7, the attack is a critical hit.

aspect-of-the-rancor.name: Aspect du Rancor
aspect-of-the-rancor.description:
You gain maîtrise in Strength and Constitution jet de sauvegardes. De plus, you gain immunity to the effrayé condition,

and when you deal dégâts with a weapon or unarmed strike, you can deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts of the same type as the weapon's dégâts.

aspect-of-the-terentatek.name: Aspect du Terentatek
aspect-of-the-terentatek.description: You gain maîtrise in Wisdom and Charisma jet de sauvegardes. De plus, you have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against pouvoir de la Forces, and when a creature within 30 mètres of you casts a pouvoir de la Force, you can use your réaction to move up to half your speed towards la créature. You must end this movement closer to la créature than you started. If you end this movement within 5 mètres of la créature, you can make one attaque au corps à corps against la créature (no action required).

aspect-of-the-varactyl.name: Aspect du Varactyle
aspect-of-the-varactyl.description: You gain maîtrise in Dexterity and Intelligence jet de sauvegardes. De plus, your speed increases by 10 mètres, your attack rolls can't suffer from disavantage, creatures can't have avantage on attack rolls against you, and each slowed niveau only reduces your speed by 5 mètres, unless it would reduce your speed to 0.

chimeric-adaptation.name: Adaptation Chimérique
chimeric-adaptation.description:
Geneticist Pursuit: niveau 17

Your genetic modifications have reached new heights. When you complete a short or repos long, vous pouvez choisir one of the following features. When you undergo your mutagenic transformation, you also gain the benefits of the chosen feature for the duration. You can only have one of these features at a time.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.UU0zv45Y3ghTVisM]{Aspect of the Terentatek}

You gain maîtrise in Wisdom and Charisma jet de sauvegardes. De plus, you have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against pouvoir de la Forces, and when a creature within 30 mètres of you casts a pouvoir de la Force, you can use your réaction to move up to half your speed towards la créature. You must end this movement closer to la créature than you started. If you end this movement within 5 mètres of la créature, you can make one attaque au corps à corps against la créature (no action required).

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.QXVQhL1BPcbHiSp1]{Aspect of the Rancor}

You gain maîtrise in Strength and Constitution jet de sauvegardes. De plus, you gain immunity to the effrayé condition,

and when you deal dégâts with a weapon or unarmed strike, you can deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts of the same type as the weapon's dégâts.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.pzlusj1T1k5sJUg1]{Aspect of the Varactyl}

You gain maîtrise in Dexterity and Intelligence jet de sauvegardes. De plus, your speed increases by 10 mètres, your attack rolls can't suffer from disavantage, creatures can't have avantage on attack rolls against you, and each slowed niveau only reduces your speed by 5 mètres, unless it would reduce your speed to 0.

genesplicers-methods.name: Méthodes du Généticien
genesplicers-methods.description:
Geneticist Pursuit: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise with geneticist's implements and your choice of Medicine or Survival skills. De plus, you can't have disavantage on checks you make with them.

mutagenic-analysis.name: Analyse Mutagène
mutagenic-analysis.description:
Geneticist Pursuit: niveau 3

Pendant que vous êtes la cible de votre fonction d'analyse critique, vous pouvez ajouter la moitié de votre modificateur de capacité d'analyse critique (au minimum un) à tout jet de sauvegarde que vous créez et qui n'inclut pas déjà ce modificateur.

mutagenic-transformation.name: Transformation Mutagène
mutagenic-transformation.description:
Poursuite généticienne: niveau 6

Lorsque vous ciblez votre personnel avec votre fonction d'analyse critique, vous pouvez choisir de subir une transformation mutagène. Votre forme change, exagérant et renforçant vos découvertes de généticien pendant 1 heure. Vous bénéficiez des avantages suivants :

  • Vous pouvez attaquer deux fois, au lieu d'une, à chaque fois que vous effectuez l'action Attaque à votre tour.
  • Votre score de Force devient égal à votre score d'Analyse Critique.
  • Vous gagnez un bonus à votre CA égal à la moitié de votre modificateur de capacité d'Analyse Critique. (minimum de +1) s'il n'inclut pas déjà ce modificateur.

Vous pouvez mettre fin à cet effet plus tôt dans votre tour sous forme de bonus d'action. Cet effet se termine plus tôt si vous êtes frappé d’incapacité ou si vous décédez. Vous pouvez utiliser cette fonctionnalité deux fois. Vous regagnez tous les usages dépensés lorsque vous terminez un repos long.

geneticists-resilience.name: Résilience du Généticien
geneticists-resilience.description:
Geneticist Pursuit: niveau 9

Your genetic alterations make you immune to poison and disease. De plus, you have resistance to poison dégâts.

dive-for-cover.name: Plonger à l'Abri
dive-for-cover.description:
Gunslinger Practice: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You learn to quickly move into cover when under fire. Once per round, when you are la cible of a attaque à distance, or you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, and there is cover within 10 mètres of you, you can move up to 10 mètres (no action required). You must end this movement in cover.

You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

ricochet-shot.name: Tir Ricochet
ricochet-shot.description:
Gunslinger Practice: niveau 13

You learn how to work all the angles. Une fois par tour, when you take the Attack action and miss with a attaque d'arme à distance, you can repeat the attack against a different target within 10 mètres of the original target (no action required).

quickdraw.name: Dégainage Rapide
quickdraw.description:
Gunslinger Practice: niveau 17

You learn to perform miracles with just a blaster and some nerve. On your first turn in combat, if you aren't surprised, you can use your action to attack creatures that have not yet acted. Choose up to six such creatures that you can see, making a attaque d'arme à distance against each. En cas de contacter, you deal normal weapon dégâts and can apply a single trick shot to each attack made this way.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

blinding-shot.name: Tir Aveuglant
blinding-shot.description: You attempt to blind la cible. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be aveuglé jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

brutal-shot.name: Tir Brutal
brutal-shot.description: You attempt to knock la cible à terre. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde or be knocked à terre.

hampering-shot.name: Tir Entravant
hampering-shot.description: Vous tentez de gêner les mouvements de la cible. La cible doit faire une Constitution jet de sauvegarde. Sur une sauvegarde ratée, il gagne 1 niveau ralenti et il fait de Dextérité jet de sauvegardes avec désavantage jusqu'à la fin de son prochain tour.

trick-shooter.name: Tireur d'Adresse
trick-shooter.description:
Gunslinger Practice: niveau 3

You learn a number of trick shots you can use to debilitate enemies and impress allies. When you deal Sneak Attack dégâts to a creature, you may choose to forgo two of your Sneak Attack dice to make the attack a trick shot.

Some of your trick shots require your target to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the trick shot's effects. The jet de sauvegarde DD is calculated as follows:

_

Trick Shot sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Dexterity modificateur

_

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.umX3068kxtlX2M4g]{Blinding Shot}

You attempt to blind la cible. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be aveuglé jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.El6nNKpaHjPO1P3b]{Brutal Shot}

You attempt to knock la cible à terre. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde or be knocked à terre.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.3wFAYlr2qDchR7Y0]{Hampering Shot}

You attempt to hobble the enemy's movement. La cible must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. If it fails, it gains 1 slowed niveau and it has disavantage on Dexterity jet de sauvegardes until the end of its next turn.

spinning-flourish.name: Moulinet Éclatant
spinning-flourish.description:
Gunslinger Practice: niveau 9

You can flourish your weapon in an intimidating or charming manner. As an action, you can cause une créature within 60 mètres to make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Dexterity modificateur). On a failed sauvegarde, la cible is charmé or effrayé by you (your choice) jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

straight-through.name: Direct
straight-through.description:
Heavy Weapons Specialist: niveau 10

When you score a critical hit on your turn while wielding a weapon with the heavy or strength properties, you can make one attaque d'arme against a creature within 5 mètres of la cible using your réaction.

overwhelm.name: Submerger
overwhelm.description:
Heavy Weapons Specialist: niveau 15

When you use your Second Wind while wielding a weapon with the heavy or strength properties, if you hit with the first attack roll you make, or if une créatures fails the jet de sauvegarde against your weapon's burst or rapid property, before the end of your next turn, you treat the hit as a critical hit. If you miss with the first attack roll you make before the end of your next turn, or une cible succeeds on the jet de sauvegarde against your weapon's burst or rapid property, you instead deal normal weapon dégâts.

pure-performance.name: Performance Pure
pure-performance.description:
Spécialiste des armes lourdes : niveau 18

Au niveau 18, les jets d'attaque que vous effectuez en maniant une arme aux propriétés lourdes ou de force ne peuvent pas souffrir de désavantage.

my-little-friend-says-hello-there.name: Mon Petit Ami Dit Bonjour
my-little-friend-says-hello-there.description:
Spécialiste des armes lourdes : niveau 3

Vous savez utiliser la taille de votre arme pour semer la peur chez ceux qui vous entourent. Vous pouvez ajouter votre modificateur de Force à n'importe quel test de Charisme (Intimidation) que vous effectuez lorsque vous maniez une arme aux propriétés lourdes ou de force.

rock-steady.name: Rocher Stable
rock-steady.description:
Heavy Weapons Specialist: niveau 3

You have learned to use the heft of your weapon to root yourpersonnelle in place. At the end of each of your turns, if you move less than half your speed while wielding a weapon with the heavy or strength properties, you have avantage on jet de sauvegardes to avoid being entravé, moved, or knocked à terre. This avantage lasts jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

multiattack.name: Attaques Multiples
multiattack.description:
Hunter Technique: niveau 11

You gain one of the following features de votre choix.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.iD88mHj0G0B9xk9K]{Volley}

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour make a attaque à distance against any number of creatures within 10 mètres of a point you can see within your weapon's range. You must have ammunition for each target, as normal, and you make a separate attack roll for each target.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.K6jjb1rm7rHs0lPv]{Whirlwind Attack}

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour make attaque au corps à corpss against any number of creatures within 5 mètres of you, with a separate attack roll for each target.

volley.name: Volée
volley.description: Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour make a attaque à distance against any number of creatures within 10 mètres of a point you can see within your weapon's range. You must have ammunition for each target, as normal, and you make a separate attack roll for each target.

evasion.name: Esquive
evasion.description: When you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde to take only half dégâts, you instead take no dégâts si vous réussissez on a jet de sauvegarde, and only half dégâts si vous échouez.

stand-against-the-tide.name: Résister à la Marée
stand-against-the-tide.description:
Forme Soresu : niveau 15

When a hostile creature misses you with a attaque au corps à corps, you can use your réaction to force cette créature to repeat the same attack against another creature (other than itpersonnelle) de votre choix.

superior-hunters-defense.name: Défense Supérieure du Chasseur
superior-hunters-defense.description:
Hunter Technique: niveau 15

You gain one of the following features de votre choix.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.vkPjBb7JH0bsOgIJ]{Evasion}

When you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde to take only half dégâts, you instead take no dégâts si vous réussissez on a jet de sauvegarde, and only half dégâts si vous échouez.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.Lnio8U8eJfe3O82a]{Stand Against the Tide}

When a hostile creature misses you with a attaque au corps à corps, you can use your réaction to force cette créature to repeat the same attack against another creature (other than itpersonnelle) de votre choix.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.LyvivG977B6jmfvP]{Uncanny Dodge}

When an attacker that you can see hits you with an attack, you can use your réaction to halve the attack's dégâts against you.

uncanny-dodge.name: Esquive Inouïe
uncanny-dodge.description: When an attacker that you can see hits you with an attack, you can use your réaction to halve the attack's dégâts against you.

colossus-slayer.name: Tueur de Colosses
colossus-slayer.description: Your tenacity can wear down the most potent foes. Quand vous contactez une créature with a attaque d'arme, la créature takes an extra [[/r 1d8]] dégâts if it's below its point de vie maximum. Vous pouvez infliger this extra dégâts only une fois par tour, and this dégâts is the same type as the weapon's dégâts.

giant-killer.name: Tueur de Géants
giant-killer.description: When a Large or larger creature within 5 mètres of you hits or misses you with an attack, you can use your réaction to attack cette créature immediately after its attack, provided that you can see la créature.

horde-breaker.name: Briseur de Horde
horde-breaker.description: Une fois par chacun de vos tours quand vous faites a attaque d'arme, you can make another attack with the same weapon against a different creature that is within 5 mètres of the original target and within range of your weapon, no action required.

hunters-prey.name: Proie du Chasseur
hunters-prey.description:
Hunter Technique: niveau 3

You gain one of the following features de votre choix.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.bkHPKACByCvSf2br]{Colossus Slayer}

Your tenacity can wear down the most potent foes. Quand vous contactez une créature with a attaque d'arme, la créature takes an extra [[/r 1d8]] dégâts if it's below its point de vie maximum. Vous pouvez infliger this extra dégâts only une fois par tour, and this dégâts is the same type as the weapon's dégâts.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.nHycSyY8xdrp5c6G]{Giant Killer}

When a Large or larger creature within 5 mètres of you hits or misses you with an attack, you can use your réaction to attack cette créature immediately after its attack, provided that you can see la créature.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.1LSnF7cvNXmLRgYJ]{Horde Breaker}

Une fois par chacun de vos tours quand vous faites a attaque d'arme, you can make another attack with the same weapon against a different creature that is within 5 mètres of the original target and within range of your weapon, no action required.

mark-of-the-hunter.name: Marque du Chasseur
mark-of-the-hunter.description:
Hunter Technique: niveau 3

Lorsque vous utilisez la fonction Carrière de votre Ranger, la première fois que vous effectuez une technologie ou une attaque d'arme contre la cible de votre Carrière de Ranger à chaque tour, lancez votre dé Carrière de Ranger et ajoutez-le au rouleau.

defensive-tactics.name: Tactiques Défensives
defensive-tactics.description:
Hunter Technique: niveau 7

You gain one of the following features de votre choix.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.jfod2jgUrIzoO8kG]{Escape the Horde}

Opportunity attacks against you are made with disavantage.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.XI49sd2DxAGNn4hb]{Multiattack Defense}

When a creature hits you with an attack, you gain a +4 bonus to AC against all subsequent attacks made by cette créature for the rest of the turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.PH319Y8tlAAEIEJ9]{Steel Will}

You have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against being effrayé.

escape-the-horde.name: Échapper à la Horde
escape-the-horde.description: Les attaques d'opportunité contre vous sont faites avec désavantage.

multiattack-defense.name: Défense Contre Attaques Multiples
multiattack-defense.description: When a creature hits you with an attack, you gain a +4 bonus to AC against all subsequent attacks made by cette créature for the rest of the turn.

steel-will.name: Volonté d'Acier
steel-will.description: You have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against being effrayé.

quick-escape.name: Évasion Rapide
quick-escape.description:
Illusionist Technique: niveau 11

Whenever you take dégâts, you can use your réaction to swap places with an illusion of yourpersonnelle that you have created using a pouvoir technique or class feature. The illusion must be within 60 mètres of you, and you must be able to see it.

holographic-decoy.name: Leurre Holographique
holographic-decoy.description:
Illusionist Technique: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

As an action, you can create a perfect illusion of yourpersonnelle that lasts for 10 minutes, or until you lose your concentration (as if you were concentrating on a power). The decoy appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within 30 mètres of you. The decoy is purely visual. If anything passes through it, it is revealed to be an illusion. For the duration, you can cast pouvoir techniques as though you were in the decoy's space. Both your decoy and la cible of your pouvoir technique must be within your line of sight.

You can use your action bonus to cause the decoy to move up to 30 mètres. As your decoy changes location, you can alter its appearance so that its movements appear natural for the decoy. If your decoy is ever more than 120 mètres away from you, it immediately disappears.

De plus, when both you and your decoy are within 5 mètres of a creature that can see the decoy, but is not aware it is an illusion, you have avantage on attack rolls against cette créature.

A creature that uses its action to examine your decoy can determine that it is an illusion with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your tech sauvegarde DD. If a creature discerns the illusion for what it is, la créature can see through the image.

You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a short or repos long.

improved-decoys.name: Leurres Améliorés
improved-decoys.description:
Technique Illusionniste: niveau 15

Vous pouvez créer jusqu'à quatre doublons de votre personnel, au lieu d'un, lorsque vous utilisez votre fonction Holographic Decoy. Lorsque vous utilisez votre bonus d'action pour déplacer un leurre, vous pouvez en déplacer n'importe quel nombre avec le même bonus d'action.

mark-of-the-illusionist.name: Marque de l'Illusionniste
mark-of-the-illusionist.description:
Illusionist Technique: niveau 3

La cible of your Ranger's Quarry feature has disavantage on all checks made to discern the nature of your illusions. De plus, when la cible of your Ranger's Quarry is reduced to 0 points de vie, you can use your réaction to immediately cause an active illusion, or your Holographic Decoy, to take the form of la créature as long as la créature's dimensions fall within the power's capacity restrictions.

charged-illusions.name: Illusions Chargées
charged-illusions.description:
Illusionist Technique: niveau 7

When a creature discerns the nature of an illusion you have created using a pouvoir technique or class feature while within 5 mètres of it, you can dispel the illusion (no action required) to have la créature take energy dégâts equal to [[/r 1d10]] + half your scout niveau.

painkiller.name: Analgésique
painkiller.description:
Industrial Approach: niveau 10

Whenever you cast a pouvoir technique of 1st-niveau or higher, or deal dégâts using your Explosive Resilience feature, you can cause a friendly creature you can see within 30 mètres to gain points de vie temporaires equal to half your berserker niveau + your Intelligence modificateur. De plus, while they have these points de vie temporaires, they have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against effects that would cause them to be effrayé.

explosive-resilience.name: Résilience Explosive
explosive-resilience.description:
Industrial Approach: 6th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

Once per round, when you deal dégâts that includes your rage dégâts, you can cause a localized explosion around the recipient of that dégâts. Each creature within 5 mètres of the dégâtsd creature other than you takes acid, cold, fire, ion, or lightning dégâts (your choice) equal to your rage dégâts bonus, and you gain resistance to the chosen type de dégâts jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.

final-countdown.name: Compte à Rebours Final
final-countdown.description:
Industrial Approach: niveau 14

When you are reduced to 0 points de vie but not killed outright, and you have at least one tech point remaining, you can expend all your remaining tech points and instead to drop to one point de vie (no action required). If you do so, chaque créature within 30 mètres of you must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, they take [[/r 1d12]] acid, cold, fire, ion, or lightning dégâts (your choice) dégâts for each tech point spent in this way, or half as much on a successful one.

industrious-tech.name: Technologie Industrieuse
industrious-tech.description:
Industrial Approach: niveau 3

You can cast pouvoir techniques while raging as long as the power's casting time is no more than 1 action and the power does not require concentration. While raging, you add your rage dégâts to jet de dégâtss from pouvoir techniques you cast that require a tech attack or jet de sauvegarde. If a pouvoir technique dégâtss more than une cible, you may only apply your rage dégâts to one of them.

Casting pouvoir techniques during rage counts as attacking for the purposes of maintaining rage, and you can use your Reckless Attack feature to gain avantage when casting a pouvoir technique that requires a tech attack.

tech-points.name: Points Techniques
tech-points.description: Vous disposez d'un nombre de points techniques égal à la moitié de votre niveau d'érudit, comme indiqué dans la colonne Points Tech du tableau Techcasting Slicer Pursuit, + votre modificateur d'Intelligence. Vous utilisez ces points technologiques pour lancer des techniques de pouvoir. Vous regagnez tous les points techniques dépensés lorsque vous terminez un short ou un repos long.

tech-powers-known.name: Pouvoirs Techniques Connus
tech-powers-known.description: Vous apprenez 3 techniques de pouvoir de votre choix, et vous en apprenez davantage à des niveaux supérieurs, comme indiqué dans la colonne Tech Powers Known du tableau Slicer Pursuit Techcasting. Vous ne pouvez pas apprendre une technique de pouvoir d'un niveau supérieur à votre niveau de puissance maximum.

techcasting-ability.name: Caractéristique d'Incantation Technique
techcasting-ability.description:
Intelligence is your techcasting ability for your pouvoir techniques. You use your Intelligence whenever a power refers to your techcasting ability. De plus, you use your Intelligence modificateur when setting the jet de sauvegarde DD for a pouvoir technique you cast and when making an attack roll with one.

_

Tech sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Intelligence modificateur

_

Tech attack modificateur = your bonus de maîtrise + your Intelligence modificateur

_

techcasting-focus.name: Focalisateur Technique
techcasting-focus.description: Vous utilisez un poignet (trouvé dans le chapitre 5 du manuel du joueur) comme objectif technique pour vos techniques de pouvoir.

techcasting.name: Incantation Technique
techcasting.description:
Slicer Pursuit: niveau 3

You have derived powers from schematics with the aid of your wristpad. See chapter 10 for the general rules of techcasting and chapter 12 for the pouvoir techniques list.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.76KkOshy5q6wjzFW]{Tech Powers Known}

You learn 3 pouvoir techniques de votre choix, and you learn more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Tech Powers Known column of the Slicer Pursuit Techcasting table. You may not learn a pouvoir technique of a niveau higher than your Max Power Niveau.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.VfNVfqauLGg8FR6J]{Tech Points}

You have a number of tech points equal to half of your scholar niveau, as shown in the Tech Points column of the Slicer Pursuit Techcasting table, + your Intelligence modificateur. You use these tech points to cast pouvoir techniques. Vous regagnez tous expended tech points when you finish a short or repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.KMT2teLbZiNEudMQ]{Max Power Niveau}

Many pouvoir techniques can be overcharged, consuming more tech points to create a greater effect. You can overcharge these powers to a maximum niveau, which increases at higher niveaus, as shown in the Max Power Niveau column of the Slicer Pursuit Techcasting table.

You may only cast pouvoir techniques at 4th-niveau once. You regain the ability to do so after a repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.ClDiVntUZ55hvt99]{Techcasting Ability}

Intelligence is your techcasting ability for your pouvoir techniques. You use your Intelligence whenever a power refers to your techcasting ability. De plus, you use your Intelligence modificateur when setting the jet de sauvegarde DD for a pouvoir technique you cast and when making an attack roll with one.

_

Tech sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Intelligence modificateur

_

Tech attack modificateur = your bonus de maîtrise + your Intelligence modificateur

_

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.4tPJ0sZP0z7ch0FW]{Techcasting Focus}

You use a wristpad (found in chapter 5 of the Player's Handbook) as a tech focus for your pouvoir techniques.

force-resistance.name: Résistance à la Force
force-resistance.description:
Way of Balance: niveau 18

À partir du niveau 18, you have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against pouvoir de la Forces. De plus, you have resistance against the dégâts of pouvoir de la Forces.

mark-of-the-inquisitor.name: Marque de l'Inquisiteur
mark-of-the-inquisitor.description:
Inquisitor Technique: 3rd, 11th, and niveau 17

When la cible of your Ranger's Quarry feature is within 15 mètres of you, you gain the following benefits:

  • Whenever la créature casts a pouvoir de la Force, it must first succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD to maintain concentration. On a failed sauvegarde, the casting is disrupted, the pouvoir de la Force fails, and the point de Forces are wasted.
  • Whenever la créature starts its turn while concentrating on a pouvoir de la Force, it must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD to maintain concentration. On a failed sauvegarde, it loses concentration on the power.

The radius of this feature increases to 30 mètres at niveau 11 and 60 mètres at niveau 17.

sense-force.name: Détecter la Force
sense-force.description:
Inquisitor Technique: 7th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour gain the benefits of the force sight pouvoir de la Force jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

inquisitors-wrath.name: Courroux de l'Inquisiteur
inquisitors-wrath.description:
Inquisitor Technique: niveau 15

You can cast the force suppression and sever force pouvoir de la Forces at niveau 3 against la cible of your Ranger's Quarry without expending tech points. If they are within 30 mètres of you, you have avantage on the forcecasting test de caractéristique for these powers.

You can use this feature un nombre de fois égal à 1 + your Intelligence modificateur (a minimum of once). Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

The radius of this feature increases to 60 mètres at niveau 17.

mercurial-mind.name: Esprit Mercuriel
mercurial-mind.description:
Jal Shey Order: niveau 11

You've honed your awareness and reflexes through mental aptitude and pattern recognition. Une fois par tour, if you've already used your réaction, you can spend 1 focus point to take an additional réaction. You can only take one réaction per turn.

debilitating-barrage.name: Barrage Affaiblissant
debilitating-barrage.description:
Jal Shey Order: niveau 17

You've gained the knowledge to temporarily inhibit a creature's fortitude by striking a series of pressure points. Whenever you hit a creature with an unarmed strike, you can spend 3 focus points to cause la créature to become vulnerable to a type de dégâts de votre choix. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute or until they take dégâts of the chosen type.

mystical-erudition.name: Érudition Mystique
mystical-erudition.description:
Jal Shey Order: niveau 3

You've undergone extensive training in lore from the Jal Shey's collected knowledge. You learn one language de votre choix, and you gain maîtrise in your choice of Lore, Medicine, Nature, or Technology. Vous apprenez un supplémentaire language and an additional skill maîtrise from the above list at niveau 11.

De plus, you can strike multiple pressure points to extract crucial details about your foe. Whenever you hit a creature with an unarmed strike, you can learn learn certain information about its capabilities. The GM tells you if la créature has one of the following characteristics de votre choix:

  • Condition immunities
  • Damage vulnerabilities
  • Damage resistances
  • Damage immunities

extort-truth.name: Extorquer la Vérité
extort-truth.description:
Jal Shey Order: niveau 6

You can hit a series of hidden nerves on a creature with precision, temporarily causing them to be unable to mask their true thoughts and intent. Quand vous contactez une créature with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can have the attack deal no dégâts and spend 1 focus point to force them to make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde against your focus sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature is unable to speak a deliberate lie pendant 1 minute and all test de Charismes directed at la créature are made with avantage for the duration.

On a success or failure, a creature is aware that you attempted to influence them. They can choose to avoid answering questions to which they would normally respond with a lie.

preternatural-counter.name: Contre Préternaturel
preternatural-counter.description:
Jal Shey Order: niveau 6

Your quick mind and study of your foe allows you to use their failure to your avantage. When a creature within 5 mètres of you misses you with a attaque au corps à corps, you can use your réaction to make an unarmed strike against cette créature.

rising-whirlwind.name: Tourbillon Ascendant
rising-whirlwind.description:
Forme Jar'Kai : niveau 15

As an action, you can rush forward up to 30 mètres to an unoccupied space you can see without provoking attaque d'opportunités. Each creature within 5 mètres of your path must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with your weapon). A creature takes normal weapon dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one. If you are wielding separate two light- or vibro-weapons in each hand with which you are proficient, or a weapon with the double property, a creature makes this sauvegarde with disavantage, and takes additional dégâts equal to your Strength or Dexterity modificateur (your choice, minimum of one) on a failed sauvegarde if it doesn't already include that modificateur.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

master-of-domination.name: Maître de la Domination
master-of-domination.description:
Forme Jar'Kai : niveau 20

You are a whirlwind of strikes, eviscerating all who step within your reach. Your Strength and Dexterity scores increase by 2. Your maximum for these scores increases by 2. De plus, you can use your action to gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • You have resistance to kinetic, energy, and ion dégâts from weapons.
  • Quand vous contactez une créature with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you have avantage on the next attaque d'arme au corps à corps roll you make against cette créature, and cette créature provokes an attaque d'opportunité from you even if they take the Disengage action before leaving your reach jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.
  • Creatures provoke an attaque d'opportunité from you when they enter your reach.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

the-way-of-the-acklay.name: La Voie de l'Acklay
the-way-of-the-acklay.description:
Forme Jar'Kai : niveau 3

As a action bonus, you can enter a destructive stance for one minute. While in this stance, you can add half your Strength or Dexterity modificateur (your choice, minimum of one) to any melee weapon jet de dégâts you make that doesn't already include that modificateur. De plus, quand vous contactez a creature with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can move up to 5 mètres without provoking attaque d'opportunités.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

twin-strike.name: Frappe Double
twin-strike.description: Une fois par tour, when you miss with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can expend a use of your Channel the Force to immediately make another attaque d'arme au corps à corps against the same target (no action required).

eye-of-the-storm.name: Œil de la Tempête
eye-of-the-storm.description:
Forme Jar'Kai : niveau 7

When you score a critical hit with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you regain an expended use of your Channel the Force.

overwhelming-cleave.name: Fente Accablante
overwhelming-cleave.description:
Approche du Juggernaut : niveau 10

When you successfully push a creature into a surface or another creature while raging, the pushed creature takes kinetic dégâts equal to your Rage Damage. De plus, the first time you hit with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps using Strength each turn, you can attempt to dégâts another creature with the same attack. Choose another creature within 5 mètres of the original target and within your reach. If the original attack roll would hit the second creature, it takes dégâts equal to your Strength modificateur. The dégâts is of the same type dealt by the original attack.

relentless-assault.name: Assaut Implacable
relentless-assault.description:
Ordre Kyuzo : niveau 17

Lorsque vous effectuez plusieurs attaques d'armes avec des armes de jet contre la même cible à votre tour, chaque attaque après la première gagne un bonus de +1 à son jet d'attaque, cumulativement, jusqu'à un bonus maximum de +6.

armored-brute.name: Brute Blindée
armored-brute.description:
Approche du Juggernaut : niveau 3

You've learned to fight in the heaviest of armors, using your weight to your avantage. You gain maîtrise in heavy armor, you can enter a rage while wearing heavy armor, and you can gain the benefits of your Rage feature while wearing heavy armor.

raging-bulwark.name: Rempart Enragé
raging-bulwark.description:
Approche du Juggernaut : niveau 6

Your imposing form acts as a shield for your allies. When a friendly creature you can see is la cible of a attaque à distance, or forced to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, and you can see the source of the effect, you can use your réaction to move up to half your speed towards the friendly creature. You must end this move closer to the ally than you started. If you end this movement between your ally and the source of the effect, you provide cover for the attack.

De plus, you provide three-quarters cover, instead of half-cover, to creatures your size, and you provide full cover to creatures smaller than you.

their-power-my-strength.name: Leur Pouvoir, Ma Force
their-power-my-strength.description:
When you are dealt dégâts by a pouvoir de la Force, you can reduce that dégâts by an amount equal to your guardian niveau (no action required).

You can use this feature five times. You gain an additional use at niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.

vengeance.name: Vengeance
vengeance.description:
Juyo/Vaapad Form: niveau 15

You gain one of the following features. Choose Devastating Critical for Juyo or Their Power, My Strength for Vaapad.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.TcFBfgJi6X8p3v9c]{Devastating Critical}

When you score a critical hit with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you gain a bonus to that weapon's jet de dégâts equal to your guardian niveau.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.5Eu9RsKxHVtTl3vO]{Their Power, My Strength}

When you are dealt dégâts by a pouvoir de la Force, you can reduce that dégâts by an amount equal to your guardian niveau (no action required).

You can use this feature five times. You gain an additional use at niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.

master-of-ferocity.name: Maître de la Férocité
master-of-ferocity.description:
Juyo/Vaapad Form: niveau 20

You are a paragon of extraordinary martial prowess. Your Strength and Dexterity scores increase by 2. Your maximum for those scores increases by 2. De plus, you can use your action to gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • You have resistance to all dégâts.
  • When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can make one additional attack as part of that action.
  • Your critical hit range with weapons increases by 1.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you complete a repos long.

assertive-defense.name: Défense Assertive
assertive-defense.description: When you reduce the dégâts dealt by a pouvoir de la Force to 0 using the saber reflect power, and you're wielding a lightweapon or vibroweapon, you can expend a use of your Channel the Force to reflect the attack at a target within range, regardless of what type the dégâts is.

snap-aggression.name: Agression Soudaine
snap-aggression.description: Si vous êtes surpris au début du combat et n'êtes pas incapable d'agir, vous pouvez dépenser une utilisation de votre Canalisation de la Force pour agir normalement lors de votre premier tour.

the-way-of-the-vornskr.name: La Voie du Vornskr
the-way-of-the-vornskr.description:
Juyo/Vaapad Form: niveau 3

As a action bonus, you can take a savage stance, designating une créature you can see within 10 mètres of you as your prey pendant 1 minute. You have avantage on attack rolls against la créature. If la cible drops to 0 points de vie, you can use a action bonus on a subsequent turn to mark a new creature.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you complete a repos long.

fury.name: Fureur
fury.description:
Juyo/Vaapad Form: niveau 7

You gain one of the following features. Choose Relentless for Juyo or Punishing Charge for Vaapad.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.Xuhu5J6jGwdhwPdf]{Relentless }

You have avantage on initiative checks, and gain a 10 foot bonus to your speed on your first turn of combat.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.6L8CL3z3jPQkd742]{Punishing Charge }

When a hostile creature you can see or hear within 30 mètres of you casts a pouvoir de la Force, you can use your réaction to move up to half your speed. You must end this move closer to the enemy than you started. If you end this movement within 5 mètres of la créature, and the triggering pouvoir de la Force required a attaque à distance roll, they have disavantage on the roll.

punishing-charge.name: Charge Punitive
punishing-charge.description: When a hostile creature you can see or hear within 30 mètres of you casts a pouvoir de la Force, you can use your réaction to move up to half your speed. You must end this move closer to the enemy than you started. If you end this movement within 5 mètres of la créature, and the triggering pouvoir de la Force required a attaque à distance roll, they have disavantage on the roll.

relentless.name: Implacable
relentless.description:
Tactical Specialist: niveau 15

When you roll initiative and have no dés de supériorité remaining, you regain 1 dé de supériorité.

one-with-darkness.name: Un Avec les Ténèbres
one-with-darkness.description:
Kage Order: niveau 11

Vous avez appris à ne faire qu'un avec les ombres. Lorsque vous vous trouvez dans une zone de faible luminosité ou d’obscurité, vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour devenir invisible. Vous restez invisible jusqu'à ce que vous effectuiez une attaque, que vous lanciez un pouvoir, que vous entrepreniez une action hostile ou que vous soyez dans une zone de lumière vive.

darkness-charges.name: Charges d'Obscurité
darkness-charges.description:
Kage Order: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You learn to create a number of small charges that create enhanced darkness. Over the course of a short or repos long, you can create two charges. You can create an additional charge at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Your charges can only be used by you, and they lose their potency at the end of your next short or repos long.

Une fois par tour, when you would make a attaque d'arme or unarmed strike, you can instead throw one of your charges. Your charges have a range equal to 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. You can throw a device at a point you can see within range. The charges create a pocket of darkness in a rayon de 3 mètres sphere centered on that point. The darkness spreads around corners. It lasts pendant 1 minute or until an enhanced source of bright light dispells it.

opportunist.name: Opportuniste
opportunist.description:
Kage Order: niveau 17

You can exploit a creature's momentary distraction when it is hit by an attack. Whenever a creature within 5 mètres of you is hit by an attack made by a creature other than you, you can use your réaction to make a attaque au corps à corps against cette créature.

disruptive-shock.name: Choc Disruptif
disruptive-shock.description:
Kage Order: niveau 6

Une fois par tour, quand vous contactez a creature with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps when you have avantage, or it fails a jet de sauvegarde against an effect that you control, vous pouvez choisir to roll a Martial Arts die and deal additional psychic dégâts equal to the amount rolled.

You can use this feature un nombre de fois égal à your bonus de maîtrise, as shown in the monk table. You regain any expended uses when you finish a short or repos long.

air.name: Air
air.description: Your whistling weapon has the returning property, the thrown property with a range of 20/60, and deals sonic dégâts on a hit. De plus, quand vous contactez a creature with the weapon, it is assourdi until the end of its next turn.

burning-ember-flourish.name: Flamme de Braise Ardente
burning-ember-flourish.description:
Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour choose an area of flame that you can see and that fits within a 5-foot cube within 60 mètres. You can extinguish the fire in that area, and you create either fireworks or smoke when you do so.

Fireworks. La cible explodes with a dazzling display of colors. Each creature within 10 mètres of la cible must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or become aveuglé jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

Smoke. Thick black smoke spreads out from la cible in a rayon de 6 mètres, moving around corners. The area of the smoke is heavily obscured. The smoke persists pendant 1 minute or until a strong wind disperses it.

crushing-hand-of-the-mountain.name: Main Écrasante de la Montagne
crushing-hand-of-the-mountain.description: As an action, vous pouvez choisir a 5-foot-square unoccupied space on the ground that you can see within 30 mètres. A Medium hand made from soil and stone, which lasts pendant 1 minute, rises in that space and reaches for one Large or smaller creature you can see within 5 mètres of it. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible takes [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts and is entravé for the duration. As a action bonus on each of your turns, you can cause the hand to crush the entravé target, which must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. It takes [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. To break out, the entravé creature can use its action to make a test de Force against your focus sauvegarde DD. On a success, la cible escapes and is no longer entravé by the hand. As an action, you can cause the hand to reach for a different creature or to move to a different unoccupied space within range. The hand releases a entravé target if you do either.

curtain-of-unyielding-wind.name: Rideau de Vent Inflexible
curtain-of-unyielding-wind.description: As an action, you call up a mighty gale, which swirls around you in a rayon de 3 mètres and moves with you, remaining centered on you. The wind lasts for 10 minutes. The wind deafens both you and other creatures in its area. It extinguishes unprotected flames in its area that are torch-sized or smaller and hedges out vapor, gas, and fog that can be dispersed by strong wind. The area is difficult terrain for creatures other than you and the attack rolls of attaque d'arme à distances have disavantage if the attacks pass in or out of the wind.

earth-reaches-for-sky.name: La Terre Rejoint le Ciel
earth-reaches-for-sky.description:
Forme Télékinétique : niveau 14

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour contacter une créature consentante, lui accordant une vitesse de vol de 60 pieds par round pendant 1 minute. Une créature peut mettre fin à cet effet par une action bonus.

Une fois que vous avez utilisé cette fonctionnalité, vous ne pouvez pas la réutiliser avant d’avoir terminé un repos long.

earth.name: Terre
earth.description: Your earthen weapon takes the form of stone, and deals kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, quand vous contactez a creature with it, you can force la cible to make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible is pushed back 5 mètres. Lastly, while active, you can use Strength instead of Dexterity when determining your AC, as long as it doesn't already include that modificateur.

elemental-adept.name: Adepte Élémentaire
elemental-adept.description:
Kro Var Order: 6th, 11th, and niveau 17

You gain two of the following features. You gain an additional option at niveaux 11 et 17.

You can use these features a combined number of times equal to your bonus de maîtrise, as shown in the monk table. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

While you have no remaining uses of this feature, you can instead expend 2 focus points to use it. When you do so, your maximum focus points are reduced by 2 until you complete a repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.Tj9fyWuTjQqQiIVP]{Burning Ember Flourish}

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour choose an area of flame that you can see and that fits within a 5-foot cube within 60 mètres. You can extinguish the fire in that area, and you create either fireworks or smoke when you do so.

Fireworks. La cible explodes with a dazzling display of colors. Each creature within 10 mètres of la cible must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or become aveuglé jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

Smoke. Thick black smoke spreads out from la cible in a rayon de 6 mètres, moving around corners. The area of the smoke is heavily obscured. The smoke persists pendant 1 minute or until a strong wind disperses it.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.VYqGRxJVqgwdvuSv]{Curtain of Unyielding Wind}

As an action, you call up a mighty gale, which swirls around you in a rayon de 3 mètres and moves with you, remaining centered on you. The wind lasts for 10 minutes. The wind deafens both you and other creatures in its area.
