It extinguishes unprotected flames in its area that are torch-sized or smaller and hedges out vapor, gas, and fog that can be dispersed by strong wind. The area is difficult terrain for creatures other than you and the attack rolls of attaque d'arme à distances have disavantage if the attacks pass in or out of the wind.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.pJgtWqcGHv0mtIAB]{Crushing Hand of the Mountain}

As an action, vous pouvez choisir a 5-foot-square unoccupied space on the ground that you can see within 30 mètres. A Medium hand made from soil and stone, which lasts pendant 1 minute, rises in that space and reaches for one Large or smaller creature you can see within 5 mètres of it. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible takes [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts and is entravé for the duration. As a action bonus on each of your turns, you can cause the hand to crush the entravé target, which must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. It takes [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. To break out, the entravé creature can use its action to make a test de Force against your focus sauvegarde DD. On a success, la cible escapes and is no longer entravé by the hand. As an action, you can cause the hand to reach for a different creature or to move to a different unoccupied space within range. The hand releases a entravé target if you do either.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.oZOVf6KzjKDkVoYr]{Hatchling's Flame}

As an action, you focus your energy into a torrent of fire that streaks away from you. A line of roaring flame

30 mètres long and 5 mètres wide emanates from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.A9n7PwH4ctuZWU5I]{Patient Bantha Listens}

You reach out to the ground beneath you. You can use your action bonus to gain tremorsense with a range of 30 mètres and a burrow speed equal to your walking speed for up to 1 minute. Your movement leaves behind a tunnel that remains for as long as this ability is active, after which it collapses.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.P6sE6tDcb8AMQMrH]{Rush of the Shyrack}

As an action, you form a line of strong wind 60 mètres long and 10 mètres wide that blasts from you in a direction you choose for one minute or until you lose concentration or dismiss the effect (no action required). Each Large or smaller creature that starts its turn in the line must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde or be pushed 15 mètres away from you in a direction following the line. Any creature in the line must spend 2 mètres of movement for every 1 foot it moves when moving closer to you. The gust disperses gas or vapor, and it extinguishes candles, torches, and similar unprotected flames in the area. It causes protected flames, such as those of lanterns, to dance wildly and has a 50 percent chance to extinguish them. As a action bonus on each of your turns before the effect ends, you can change the direction in which the line blasts from you.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.iFC9XaVvKpqQGbIu]{Shape the Raincloud}

You can use your action pull water from air, and return it to the atmosphere. In an open container, you can create up to 20 gallons of drinkable water. You may also produce a rain that falls within a 30-foot cube and extinguishes open-air flames. You can destroy the same amount of water in an open container, or destroy a 30-foot cube of fog.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.hHWfdns1Nc1xZmYz]{Swarming Ice Rabbit}

As an action, you can cause a flurry of ice crystals to erupt from a point you can see within 90 mètres. Each creature in a 5-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 3d6]] cold dégâts, and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half as much dégâts and isn't slowed.

elemental-attunement.name: Harmonie Élémentaire
elemental-attunement.description:
Kro Var Order: 3rd, 11th, and niveau 17

You gain the ability to bend the elements to your will. As an action, you can manipulate these forces to create one of the following effects de votre choix at a space within 10 mètres of you:

  • Create a harmless, instantaneous sensory effect related to air, earth, fire, or water, such as a shower of sparks, a puff of wind, a spray of light mist, or a gentle rumbling of stone.
  • Instantaneously light or snuff out a candle, a torch, or a small campfire.
  • Chill or warm up to 1 pound of nonliving material for up to 1 hour.
  • Cause earth, fire, water, or mist that can fit within a 1-foot cube to shape itpersonnelle into a crude form you designate pendant 1 minute.

This range increases to 30 mètres at niveau 11 and 60 mètres at niveau 17.

De plus, as a action bonus on your turn, you can spend 1 focus point to conjure a weapon made of one of the four elements—air, earth, fire, or water—which lasts pendant 1 minute. Your weapon takes an appearance de votre choix, it can only be used by you, and you can't be disarmed of it while you are conscious. You are proficient in this weapon, which counts as a monk weapon for you and uses your Martial Arts die for its jet de dégâtss. You can only have one of these weapons at a time, and if you summon a new one the old one immediately disappears.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.1JEwbfSBdCjsS7up]{Air}

Your whistling weapon has the returning property, the thrown property with a range of 20/60, and deals sonic dégâts on a hit. De plus, quand vous contactez a creature with the weapon, it is assourdi until the end of its next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.zSWfLVSWOFNkcLWo]{Earth}

Your earthen weapon takes the form of stone, and deals kinetic dégâts on a hit. De plus, quand vous contactez a creature with it, you can force la cible to make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible is pushed back 5 mètres. Lastly, while active, you can use Strength instead of Dexterity when determining your AC, as long as it doesn't already include that modificateur.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.M2Vld1EFmOV7OMRx]{Fire}

Your flaming weapon sheds bright light in a rayon de 3 mètres and dim light for an additional 10 mètres, deals fire dégâts, and quand vous contactez a creature with it, la créature takes additional dégâts equal to half your focus modificateur de caractéristique (minimum of one).

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.CfQVHKDsyj7TlOjV]{Water}

Your watery weapon has the reach property, deals cold dégâts on a hit, and you can use your focus modificateur de caractéristique instead of Dexterity or Strength for its attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls. De plus, when you would make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can instead use your weapon to wet a case de 1,5 mètre within your weapon's reach. The affected area is difficult terrain. Each creature who starts its turn in the square or enters it for the first time must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, falling à terre on a failed sauvegarde.

elemental-master.name: Maître Élémentaire
elemental-master.description:
Kro Var Order: niveaux 11 et 17

At niveau 11, you gain one of the following features. You gain an additional option at niveau 17.

You can use these features a combined number of times equal to half your bonus de maîtrise, as shown in the monk table. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

While you have no remaining uses of this feature, you can instead expend 3 focus points to use it. When you do so, your maximum focus points are reduced by 3 until you complete a repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.HFcACuxLJHIWVDNl]{Earth Reaches for Sky}

Prerequisite: Crushing Hand of the Mountain or Patient Bantha Listens

As an action, vous pouvez choisir a point you can see on the ground within 120 mètres. A fountain of churned earth and stone erupts in a 20-foot cube centered on that point. Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d12]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. De plus, the ground in that area becomes difficult terrain until cleared. Each 5-foot-square portion of the area requires at least 1 minute to clear by hand.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.hJ0cEH5BpPTps2XE]{Ride the Wind}

Prerequisite: Curtain of Unyielding Wind or Rush of the Shyrack

As an action, you can gain a flying speed equal to your vitesse de déplacement for 10 minutes. You can hover while this technique is active, but when it ends, you fall if you are still aloft, unless you can stop the fall.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.HQhrtDc4qa13QmCX]{River of Hungry Flame}

Prerequisite: Burning Ember Flourish or Hatchling's Flame

As an action, you can create a wall of fire on a solid surface within 120 mètres. Vous pouvez faire the wall up to 60 mètres long, 20 mètres high, and 1 foot thick, or a ringed wall up to 20 mètres in diameter, 20 mètres high, and 1 foot thick. The wall is opaque and lasts pendant 1 minute.

When the wall appears, chaque créature within its area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 5d8]] fire dégâts, or half as much dégâts on a successful sauvegarde.

One side of the wall, chosen by you quand vous utilisez this feature, deals [[/r 5d8]] fire dégâts to chaque créature that ends its turn within 10 mètres of that side of the wall. A creature takes the same dégâts when it enters the wall for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. The other side of the wall deals no dégâts.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.fMMbO8Q95kQ4qMk8]{Shape the Flowing River}

Prerequisite: Shape the Rainclud or Swarming Ice Rabbit

As an action, you can control any freestanding water within 300 mètres of you inside an area you choose that is a cube up to 100 mètres on a side. Vous pouvez choisir from any of the following effects quand vous utilisez this feature. As an action on your turn, you can repeat the same effect or choose a different one.Flood. You cause the water niveau of all standing water in the area to rise by as much as 20 mètres. If the area includes a shore, the flooding water spills over onto dry land. If you choose an area in a large body of water, you instead create a 20-foot tall wave that travels from one side of the area to the other and then crashes down. Any Huge or smaller creatures in the wave's path are carried with it to the other side. Any Huge or smaller creatures struck by the wave have a 25 percent chance of being knocked à terre. The water niveau remains elevated until the feature ends or you choose a different effect. If this effect produced a wave, the wave repeats on the start of your next turn while the flood effect lasts.

Part Water. You cause water in the area to move apart and create a trench. The trench extends across the feature's area, and the separated water forms a wall to either side. The trench remains until the feature ends or you choose a different effect. The water then slowly fills in the trench over the course of the next round until the normal water niveau is restored.

Redirect Flow. You cause flowing water in the area to move in a direction you choose, even if the water has to flow over obstacles, up walls, or in other unlikely directions. The water in the area moves as you direct it, but once it moves beyond the feature's area, it resumes its flow based on the terrain conditions. The water continues to move in the direction you chose until the feature ends or you choose a different effect.

Whirlpool. Cet effet requires a body of water at least 50 mètres square and 25 mètres deep. You cause a whirlpool to form in the center of the area. The whirlpool forms a vortex that is 5 mètres wide at the base, up to 50 mètres wide at the top, and 25 mètres tall. Any creature or object in the water and within 25 mètres of the vortex is pulled 10 mètres toward it. A creature can swim away from the vortex by making a Strength (Athletics) check against your feature sauvegarde DD. When a creature enters the vortex for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 2d8]] kinetic dégâts and is caught in the vortex until the feature ends. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature takes half dégâts, and isn't caught in the vortex. A creature caught in the vortex can use its action to try to swim away from the vortex as described above, but has disavantage on the Strength (Athletics) check to do so. The first time each turn that an object enters the vortex, the object takes [[/r 2d8]] kinetic dégâts; this dégâts occurs each round it remains in the vortex.

fire.name: Feu
fire.description: Your flaming weapon sheds bright light in a rayon de 3 mètres and dim light for an additional 10 mètres, deals fire dégâts, and quand vous contactez a creature with it, la créature takes additional dégâts equal to half your focus modificateur de caractéristique (minimum of one).

hatchlings-flame.name: Flamme du Jeune
hatchlings-flame.description:
As an action, you focus your energy into a torrent of fire that streaks away from you. A line of roaring flame

30 mètres long and 5 mètres wide emanates from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.

patient-bantha-listens.name: Le Bantha Patient Écoute
patient-bantha-listens.description: You reach out to the ground beneath you. You can use your action bonus to gain tremorsense with a range of 30 mètres and a burrow speed equal to your walking speed for up to 1 minute. Your movement leaves behind a tunnel that remains for as long as this ability is active, after which it collapses.

ride-the-wind.name: Chevaucher le Vent
ride-the-wind.description:
Prerequisite: Curtain of Unyielding Wind or Rush of the Shyrack

As an action, you can gain a flying speed equal to your vitesse de déplacement for 10 minutes. You can hover while this technique is active, but when it ends, you fall if you are still aloft, unless you can stop the fall.

river-of-hungry-flame.name: Rivière de Flamme Dévorante
river-of-hungry-flame.description:
Prerequisite: Burning Ember Flourish or Hatchling's Flame

As an action, you can create a wall of fire on a solid surface within 120 mètres. Vous pouvez faire the wall up to 60 mètres long, 20 mètres high, and 1 foot thick, or a ringed wall up to 20 mètres in diameter, 20 mètres high, and 1 foot thick. The wall is opaque and lasts pendant 1 minute.

When the wall appears, chaque créature within its area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 5d8]] fire dégâts, or half as much dégâts on a successful sauvegarde.

One side of the wall, chosen by you quand vous utilisez this feature, deals [[/r 5d8]] fire dégâts to chaque créature that ends its turn within 10 mètres of that side of the wall. A creature takes the same dégâts when it enters the wall for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. The other side of the wall deals no dégâts.

rush-of-the-shyrack.name: Ruée du Shyrack
rush-of-the-shyrack.description: As an action, you form a line of strong wind 60 mètres long and 10 mètres wide that blasts from you in a direction you choose for one minute or until you lose concentration or dismiss the effect (no action required). Each Large or smaller creature that starts its turn in the line must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde or be pushed 15 mètres away from you in a direction following the line. Any creature in the line must spend 2 mètres of movement for every 1 foot it moves when moving closer to you. The gust disperses gas or vapor, and it extinguishes candles, torches, and similar unprotected flames in the area. It causes protected flames, such as those of lanterns, to dance wildly and has a 50 percent chance to extinguish them. As a action bonus on each of your turns before the effect ends, you can change the direction in which the line blasts from you.

shape-the-flowing-river.name: Façonner la Rivière Coulante
shape-the-flowing-river.description:
Prerequisite: Shape the Rainclud or Swarming Ice Rabbit

As an action, you can control any freestanding water within 300 mètres of you inside an area you choose that is a cube up to 100 mètres on a side. Whirlpool. Cet effet requires a body of water at least 50 mètres square and 25 mètres deep. You cause a whirlpool to form in the center of the area. The whirlpool forms a vortex that is 5 mètres wide at the base, up to 50 mètres wide at the top, and 25 mètres tall. A creature can swim away from the vortex by making a Strength (Athletics) check against your feature sauvegarde DD. When a creature enters the vortex for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 2d8]] kinetic dégâts and is caught in the vortex until the feature ends. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature takes half dégâts, and isn't caught in the vortex. A creature caught in the vortex can use its action to try to swim away from the vortex as described above, but has disavantage on the Strength (Athletics) check to do so. The first time each turn that an object enters the vortex, the object takes [[/r 2d8]] kinetic dégâts; this dégâts occurs each round it remains in the vortex.

shape-the-raincloud.name: Façonner le Nuage de Pluie
shape-the-raincloud.description: Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour extraire l'eau de l'air et la renvoyer dans l'atmosphère. Dans un récipient ouvert, vous pouvez créer jusqu'à 20 gallons d'eau potable. Vous pouvez également produire une pluie qui tombe dans un cube de 30 pieds et éteint les flammes en plein air. Vous pouvez détruire la même quantité d'eau dans un récipient ouvert ou détruire un cube de brouillard de 30 pieds.

swarming-ice-rabbit.name: Nuée de Lapins de Glace
swarming-ice-rabbit.description: As an action, you can cause a flurry of ice crystals to erupt from a point you can see within 90 mètres. Each creature in a 5-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 3d6]] cold dégâts, and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half as much dégâts and isn't slowed.

water.name: Eau
water.description: Your watery weapon has the reach property, deals cold dégâts on a hit, and you can use your focus modificateur de caractéristique instead of Dexterity or Strength for its attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls. De plus, when you would make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can instead use your weapon to wet a case de 1,5 mètre within your weapon's reach. The affected area is difficult terrain. Each creature who starts its turn in the square or enters it for the first time must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, falling à terre on a failed sauvegarde.

archetype-of-air.name: Archétype de l'Air
archetype-of-air.description:
Prerequisite: Ride the Wind

As an action, you conjure a whirlwind around you, granting the following benefits jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour:

  • Ranged attacks made against you have disavantage.
  • You gain a flying speed of 60 mètres. If you are still flying when the technique ends, you fall, unless you can somehow prevent it.
  • Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour create a 15-foot cube of swirling wind centered on a point you can see within 60 mètres of you. Each creature in that area must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. If a Large or smaller creature fails the sauvegarde, cette créature is also pushed up to 10 mètres away from the center of the cube.

At the start of each of your turns, you can use your action bonus to extend the benefits of this feature jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, to a maximum duration of 1 minute. Cet effet ends immediately if you are incapacitated or die.

avatar.name: Avatar
avatar.description:
Kro Var Order: niveau 17

As an ultimate display of your mastery of the elements, you can spend 5 focus points as an action to have the elements of water, earth, fire, and air form a protective sphere around your body, gaining multiple benefits pendant 1 minute. While this ability is active, you have resistance to cold, energy, fire, kinetic, lightning, and sonic dégâts. You also gain a burrow, fly, and swim speed equal to your vitesse de déplacement. Lastly, you can use any of the following abilities as a action bonus:

  • You create a small earthquake on the ground in a rayon de 4,5 mètres around you. Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d6]] kinetic dégâts and is knocked à terre.
  • You create a line of fire 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide extending from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 3d6]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one.
  • You create a 15-foot cube of swirling wind centered on a point you can see within 60 mètres of you. Each creature in that area must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 1d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. If a Large or smaller creature fails the sauvegarde, cette créature is also pushed up to 10 mètres away from the center of the cube.
  • You create a cône de 4,5 mètres of ice shards extending from your outstretched hand in a direction you choose. Each creature in the cone must make a Constitution sauvegarde throw. A creature takes [[/r 2d6]] cold dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. A creature that fails its sauvegarde against this effect has its speed halved jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

elemental-paragon.name: Parangon Élémentaire
elemental-paragon.description:
Kro Var Order: niveau 17

You gain one of the following features.

Once you've used the chosen feature, you must complete a repos long before you can use it again.

While you have no remaining uses of this feature, you can instead expend 4 focus points to use it. When you do so, your maximum focus points are reduced by 4 until you complete a repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.Tv8JG1k5LepheWNN]{Archetype of Air}

Prerequisite: Ride the Wind

As an action, you conjure a whirlwind around you, granting the following benefits jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour:

  • Ranged attacks made against you have disavantage.
  • You gain a flying speed of 60 mètres. If you are still flying when the technique ends, you fall, unless you can somehow prevent it.
  • Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour create a 15-foot cube of swirling wind centered on a point you can see within 60 mètres of you. Each creature in that area must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 2d10]] kinetic dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. If a Large or smaller creature fails the sauvegarde, cette créature is also pushed up to 10 mètres away from the center of the cube.

At the start of each of your turns, you can use your action bonus to extend the benefits of this feature jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, to a maximum duration of 1 minute. Cet effet ends immediately if you are incapacitated or die.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.Jf3iz7Sn86isOcXe]{Figure of Flame}

Prerequisite: River of Hungry Flame

As an action, you cause flames to race across your body, granting the following benefits jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour:

  • You have resistance to fire dégâts.
  • The flames shed bright light in a rayon de 9 mètres and dim light for an additional 30 mètres.
  • Any creature that moves within 5 mètres of you for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there takes [[/r 1d10]] fire dégâts.
  • Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour create a line of fire 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide extending from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 4d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one.

At the start of each of your turns, you can use your action bonus to extend the benefits of this feature jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, to a maximum duration of 1 minute. Cet effet ends immediately if you are incapacitated or die.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.SKbFPy3gIyFDWCpM]{Icon of Ice}

Prerequisite: Shape the Flowing River

As an action, you cause frost to chill the area around you, granting the following benefits jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour:

  • You have resistance to cold dégâts.
  • You can move across difficult terrain created by ice or snow without spending extra movement.
  • The ground in a rayon de 3 mètres around you is icy and is difficult terrain for creatures other than you. The radius moves with you.
  • Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour create a cône de 4,5 mètres of freezing ice extending from your outstretched hand in a direction you choose. Each creature in the cone must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d6]] cold dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. A creature that fails its sauvegarde against this effect gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

At the start of each of your turns, you can use your action bonus to extend the benefits of this feature jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, to a maximum duration of 1 minute. Cet effet ends immediately if you are incapacitated or die.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.SeYxiNcxdNewXfNo]{Embodiment of Earth}

Prerequisite: Earth Reaches for Sky

As an action, you cause rock to envelop you, granting the following benefits jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour:

  • You have resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts.
  • You can move across difficult terrain made of earth or stone without spending extra movement. You can move through solid earth or stone as if it was air without destabilizing it, but you can't end your movement there. If you do so, you are immediately shunted to the nearest unoccupied space that you can occupy and take force dégâts equal to twice the number of mètres you are moved.
  • Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour create a small earthquake on the ground in a rayon de 4,5 mètres centered on you. Other creatures on that ground must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or be knocked à terre.

At the start of each of your turns, you can use your action bonus to extend the benefits of this feature jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, to a maximum duration of 1 minute. Cet effet ends immediately if you are incapacitated or die.

embodiment-of-earth.name: Incarnation de la Terre
embodiment-of-earth.description:
Prerequisite: Earth Reaches for Sky

As an action, you cause rock to envelop you, granting the following benefits jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour:

  • You have resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts.
  • You can move across difficult terrain made of earth or stone without spending extra movement. You can move through solid earth or stone as if it was air without destabilizing it, but you can't end your movement there. If you do so, you are immediately shunted to the nearest unoccupied space that you can occupy and take force dégâts equal to twice the number of mètres you are moved.
  • Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour create a small earthquake on the ground in a rayon de 4,5 mètres centered on you. Other creatures on that ground must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or be knocked à terre.

At the start of each of your turns, you can use your action bonus to extend the benefits of this feature jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, to a maximum duration of 1 minute. Cet effet ends immediately if you are incapacitated or die.

figure-of-flame.name: Figure de Flamme
figure-of-flame.description:
Prerequisite: River of Hungry Flame

As an action, you cause flames to race across your body, granting the following benefits jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour:

  • You have resistance to fire dégâts.
  • The flames shed bright light in a rayon de 9 mètres and dim light for an additional 30 mètres.
  • Any creature that moves within 5 mètres of you for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there takes [[/r 1d10]] fire dégâts.
  • Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour create a line of fire 15 mètres long and 5 mètres wide extending from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 4d8]] fire dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one.

At the start of each of your turns, you can use your action bonus to extend the benefits of this feature jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, to a maximum duration of 1 minute. Cet effet ends immediately if you are incapacitated or die.

icon-of-ice.name: Icône de Glace
icon-of-ice.description:
Prerequisite: Shape the Flowing River

As an action, you cause frost to chill the area around you, granting the following benefits jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour:

  • You have resistance to cold dégâts.
  • You can move across difficult terrain created by ice or snow without spending extra movement.
  • The ground in a rayon de 3 mètres around you is icy and is difficult terrain for creatures other than you. The radius moves with you.
  • Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour create a cône de 4,5 mètres of freezing ice extending from your outstretched hand in a direction you choose. Each creature in the cone must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. A creature takes [[/r 4d6]] cold dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much dégâts on a successful one. A creature that fails its sauvegarde against this effect gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

At the start of each of your turns, you can use your action bonus to extend the benefits of this feature jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, to a maximum duration of 1 minute. Cet effet ends immediately if you are incapacitated or die.

curved-throw.name: Lancer Courbe
curved-throw.description:
Kyuzo Commande : niveau 11

Vous pouvez courber vos lancers à couvert. Lorsque vous effectuez un jet d'attaque avec une arme ayant la propriété de lancer, vous pouvez dépenser 1 point de focus pour que la cible ne bénéficie d'aucun bénéfice de bouclier ou de couverture, à moins que cette couverture ne soit totale.

intercept.name: Interception
intercept.description:
Kyuzo Order: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise in vibroweapons with the thrown property and they become monk weapons for you. De plus, when you throw an improvised weapon, you are considered proficient in it, and it uses your Martial Arts die instead of its [[/r 1d4]].

De plus, you've learned to use thrown weapons to intercept projectiles traveling towards your allies. When you are wielding a weapon with which you are proficient, and a creature within your weapon's normal thrown range is hit by a attaque à distance, you can use your réaction to throw your weapon to intercept the projectile. When you do so, the dégâts la créature takes from the attack is reduced by [[/r 1d10]] + your Dexterity modificateur + your monk niveau. If the weapon has the returning property, it then returns to your hand.

scattering-stance.name: Posture Dispersée
scattering-stance.description:
Kyuzo Order: niveau 6

When you take the Dodge action, jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour you gain a number of special réactions equal to your bonus de maîtrise that you can only use for your Intercept feature. You can only take one réaction per turn.

bushmaster.name: Maître des Fourrés
bushmaster.description:
Lethality Practice: niveau 13

You excel at leading ambushes and acting first in a fight.

You have avantage on initiative checks. De plus, the first creature you hit during the first round of a combat becomes easier for you and others to strike; attack rolls against cette cible have avantage jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

impostor.name: Imposteur
impostor.description:
Pratique de la létalité : niveau 13

Vous acquérez la capacité d'imiter sans erreur le discours, l'écriture et le comportement d'une autre personne. Vous devez consacrer au moins 1 minute à étudier ces trois composantes du comportement de la personne : écouter la parole, examiner l'écriture manuscrite et observer les manières. Si vous ne pouvez étudier que certains de ces aspects (comme avoir uniquement des échantillons d'écriture ou uniquement des enregistrements audio), vous pouvez imiter cet aspect de la personne, mais pas d'autres aspects que vous n'avez pas étudiés.

Votre ruse est indiscernable pour l'observateur occasionnel. Si une créature méfiante soupçonne que quelque chose ne va pas, vous avez l'avantage sur tous les tests de Charisme (Tromperie) que vous effectuez pour éviter d'être détecté.

death-strike.name: Frappe Mortelle
death-strike.description:
Lethality Practice: niveau 17

You've become a master of instant death. When you deal weapon dégâts to a creature that is surprised, it must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde against your lethal strike sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, double the dégâts of your attack against la créature.

assassinate.name: Assassiner
assassinate.description:
Entraînement à la létalité : niveau 3

Vous êtes à votre niveau le plus mortel lorsque vous obtenez l'avantage sur vos ennemis. Vous avez un avantage aux jets d'attaque contre toute créature qui n'a pas encore pris son tour dans le combat. De plus, tout coup que vous infligez contre une créature surprise est un coup critique.

lethal-strikes.name: Frappes Létales
lethal-strikes.description:
Lethality Practice: niveau 3

You learn how to read your foes and strikes their weak points. When you deal Sneak Attack dégâts to a creature, you may choose to forgo two of your Sneak Attack dice to make the attack a lethal strike.

Some of your lethal strikes require your target to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the lethal strike's effects. The jet de sauvegarde DD is calculated as follows:

_

Lethal Strike sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Dexterity modificateur

_

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.PgK19oTZwkMfClqZ]{Priming Attack}

You attempt to prime la cible. La cible must make a Dexterity, Constitution, or Wisdom jet de sauvegarde (your choice). On a failed sauvegarde, the next time you deal Sneak Attack dégâts against la cible before the end of your next turn, you roll four additional Sneak Attack dice.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.a7mOr9VdD56fHez6]{Target Assessment}

You attempt to infer crucial details about your foe. The creature must make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, the GM tells you two of the following characteristics de votre choix:

  • Highest score de caractéristique
  • Lowest score de caractéristique
  • Strongest jet de sauvegarde
  • Weakest jet de sauvegarde

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.1GHGUVQOdlLrdnvW]{Vulnerable Strike}

You attempt to stagger la cible. La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, the next time you would make an attack roll against la cible before the end of your next turn, you can instead force la cible to make a jet de sauvegarde with the score de caractéristique de votre choix. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes normal weapon dégâts and you can apply your Sneak Attack dice to the roll.

priming-attack.name: Attaque d'Amorçage
priming-attack.description: You attempt to prime la cible. La cible must make a Dexterity, Constitution, or Wisdom jet de sauvegarde (your choice). On a failed sauvegarde, the next time you deal Sneak Attack dégâts against la cible before the end of your next turn, you roll four additional Sneak Attack dice.

target-assessment.name: Évaluation de Cible
target-assessment.description:
You attempt to infer crucial details about your foe. The creature must make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, the GM tells you two of the following characteristics de votre choix:

  • Highest score de caractéristique
  • Lowest score de caractéristique
  • Strongest jet de sauvegarde
  • Weakest jet de sauvegarde

vulnerable-strike.name: Frappe du Point Faible
vulnerable-strike.description: You attempt to stagger la cible. La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, the next time you would make an attack roll against la cible before the end of your next turn, you can instead force la cible to make a jet de sauvegarde with the score de caractéristique de votre choix. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes normal weapon dégâts and you can apply your Sneak Attack dice to the roll.

infiltrator.name: Infiltraeur
infiltrator.description:
Lethality Practice: niveau 9

You have become a master at avoiding detection.

When you or a creature within 5 mètres of you fails a Dexterity (Stealth) check, you can use your réaction to allow cette créature to reroll the check. It must use the new roll.

poisoner.name: Empoisonneur
poisoner.description:
Shadow Killer Practice: niveau 9

You are a master of poisons. Targets of your poisons cannot have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde made to resist your poison, and you have avantage on Dexterity (Escamotage) checks made to conceal the application of poisons.

De plus, when you apply poison to a weapon or its ammunition, that poison can affect an additional hit or an additional piece of ammunition, and when you deal Sneak Attack dégâts with an attack that would include poison dégâts, you can change your Sneak Attack dégâts to poison dégâts.

glancing-blow.name: Coup Glissant
glancing-blow.description:
Forme Makashi : niveau 15

When an attacker that you can see hits you with an attack, you can use your réaction to halve the attack's dégâts against you.

master-of-contention.name: Maître de la Contention
master-of-contention.description:
Forme Makashi : niveau 20

You are a duelist of the highest caliber. Your Dexterity and Wisdom or Charisma scores (your choice) increase by 2. Your maximum for those scores increases by 2. De plus, you can use your action to gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • You have resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts, and you ignore resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts.
  • All attaque au corps à corpss have disavantage against you.
  • Your attaque d'arme au corps à corpss inflict an additional dégâts die.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

makashi-riposte.name: Riposte Makashi
makashi-riposte.description:
When another creature dégâtss you with a attaque au corps à corps, you can expend a use of your Channel the Force and use your réaction to attempt to deflect the attack. When you do so, the dégâts you take from the attack is reduced by [[/r 1d10]] + your Dexterity modificateur + your guardian niveau.

If you reduce the dégâts to 0, you can immediately make a single attaque d'arme au corps à corps against cette créature as a part of the réaction.

the-way-of-the-ysalamiri.name: La Voie des Ysalamiri
the-way-of-the-ysalamiri.description:
Forme Makashi : niveau 3

As a action bonus, you can enter an offensive stance for one minute. While in this stance, you add your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice) to the first attaque d'arme au corps à corps and jet de dégâtss you make each turn.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

force-empowered-reflexes.name: Réflexes Renforcés par la Force
force-empowered-reflexes.description:
Forme Makashi : niveau 7

You can take a second réaction each round.

shatterpoint.name: Point de fracture
shatterpoint.description:
Forme Makashi : niveau 7

If you spend at least 1 minute observing or interacting with another creature outside combat, you can use your connection to the Force to sense their strengths and weaknesses, and learn certain information about its capabilities compared to your own. The GM tells you if la créature is your equal, superior, or inferior in regard to two of the following characteristics de votre choix:

  • Strength score
  • Dexterity score
  • Wisdom score
  • Charisma score
  • Classe d'Armure
  • Current points de vie
  • Total class niveaus (if any)
  • Total Forcecaster niveaus (if any)

powerful-presence.name: Présence Puissante
powerful-presence.description:
Marauder Approach: niveau 10

As a action bonus, you unleash a battle cry infused with force energy. Choose up to ten other creatures of within 60 mètres of you that can hear you. Friendly creatures have avantage on attack rolls and jet de sauvegardes jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, and hostile creatures have disavantage on attack rolls and jet de sauvegardes jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

force-storm.name: Tempête de Force
force-storm.description:
Marauder Approach: niveau 14

You can expel the might of your rage all at once to unleash a devastating storm of force energy. As an action, you can end your rage early, forcing chaque créature within 15 mètres of you to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d12]] force dégâts for each round you've spent in rage, or half as much on a successful one.

furious-force.name: Force Furieuse
furious-force.description:
Marauder Approach: niveau 3

You can cast pouvoir de la Forces while raging as long as the power's casting time is no more than 1 action, the power does not require concentration, and you are not wearing heavy armor. While raging, you add your rage dégâts to jet de dégâtss from pouvoir de la Forces you cast that require a force attack or jet de sauvegarde. If a pouvoir de la Force dégâtss more than une cible, you may only apply your rage dégâts to one of them.

Casting pouvoir de la Forces during rage counts as attacking for the purposes of maintaining rage, and you can use your Reckless Attack feature to gain avantage when casting a pouvoir de la Force that requires a force attack.

reckless-power.name: Puissance Téméraire
reckless-power.description:
Marauder Approach: niveau 6

Weapons and the force are equally an extension of your rage. While you are raging and you use your action to cast a pouvoir de la Force, you can make a single attaque d'arme au corps à corps as a action bonus.

emergency-planning.name: Planification d'Urgence
emergency-planning.description:
Mastermind Technique: niveau 11

You've learned to formulate and execute a plan. As an action, vous pouvez choisir up to six creatures (including yourpersonnelle) that you can see within 60 mètres of you. For chaque créature, choose one of the following: test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde. Each creature gains an Emergency Planning die, which is a [[/r d8]].

Once within the next 10 minutes, chaque créature can roll the die and add the number rolled to one test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde, as determined quand vous utilisez this feature. The creature can wait until after it rolls the [[/r d20]] before deciding to use the Emergency Planning die, but must decide before the GM says whether the roll succeeds or fails. Once the Emergency Planning die is rolled, it is lost.

A creature can have only one Emergency Planning die at a time.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

Your Emergency Planning die changes when you reach certain niveaus in this class. to [[/r 1d10]] at niveau 13, and to [[/r 1d12]] at niveau 17.

exploit-weakness.name: Exploiter la Faiblesse
exploit-weakness.description:
Mastermind Technique: niveau 15

Votre formation vous a appris à trouver et exploiter les faiblesses de vos proies. En bonus d'action, vous pouvez imposer un désavantage au prochain jet de sauvegarde la cible de votre Ranger's Quarry contre un effet que vous contrôlez avant la fin de votre prochain tour. Une fois que vous l'avez fait, vous devez terminer un short ou un repos bien avant de pouvoir le refaire.

instinctive-combatant.name: Combattant Instinctif
instinctive-combatant.description:
Mastermind Technique: niveau 3

Vous avez appris à utiliser votre intelligence pour vous aider à survivre. Tant que vous portez une armure légère ou moyenne, vous pouvez utiliser votre modificateur d'Intelligence au lieu de votre modificateur de Dextérité pour déterminer votre CA.

mark-of-the-meticulous.name: Marque du Méticuleux
mark-of-the-meticulous.description:
Mastermind Technique: niveau 3

You can use Intelligence instead of Dexterity for the attack and jet de dégâtss made with weapons with the finesse property or blaster weapons against la cible of your Ranger's Quarry.

De plus, once per round, quand vous contactez la cible of your Ranger's Quarry with a tech attack, or it fails a jet de sauvegarde against a pouvoir technique you cast that deals dégâts, you can deal additional dégâts equal to your Ranger's Quarry dégâts die of the same type as the pouvoir technique's dégâts.

adaptive-techie.name: Technicien Adaptatif
adaptive-techie.description:
Mastermind Technique: niveau 7

Lorsque vous effectuez un repos long, vous pouvez choisir jusqu'à un nombre de techniques de pouvoir que vous connaissez égal à la moitié de votre modificateur d'Intelligence et les remplacer par une autre technique de pouvoir, tant que cette puissance n'est pas d'un niveau supérieur à votre Puissance Max. Niveau.

absorb-damage.name: Absorber les Dégâts
absorb-damage.description:
Matukai Order: 11th, 13th, and niveau 17

You learn to channel the Force into your skin and bones, greatly enhancing your durability. You can use a action bonus to channel the Force throughout your body. Until the start of your next turn, you have resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts.

You can use this feature four times. You gain an additional use at niveaux 13 et 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

control-the-field.name: Contrôler le Terrain
control-the-field.description:
Matukai Order: niveau 17

Whenever you use your Instinctive Leap feature, you can leap your entire vitesse de déplacement instead of only half. De plus, when you land, you can make an unarmed strike with avantage against a creature within 5 mètres of you as part of the same réaction. En cas de contacter, this attack deals an additional [[/r 2d6]] force dégâts.

force-enhanced-strikes.name: Frappes Améliorées par la Force
force-enhanced-strikes.description:
Matukai Order: niveau 3

You learn to channel the Force into your unarmed strikes and monk weapons, further enhancing your melee strikes. Quand vous contactez une créature with an unarmed strike or attaque d'arme au corps à corps with a monk weapon, you can spend 1 focus point to force la créature to make a Strength jet de sauvegarde against your focus sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, it takes [[/r 2d6]] force dégâts and is pushed up to 15 mètres away from you. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature only takes half as much dégâts and isn't pushed.

instinctive-leap.name: Saut Instinctif
instinctive-leap.description:
Matukai Order: niveau 6

When a hostile creatures moves to within 5 mètres of you, you can use your réaction to disengage and leap up to half your speed. If you end this movement in the air, you immediately fall to the ground.

practice-makes-perfect.name: La Pratique Rend Parfait
practice-makes-perfect.description:
Maverick Practice: niveaux 13 et 17

When you make an test de caractéristique as part of or that is affected by a maneuver you use, vous pouvez choisir to increase your niveau of maîtrise in that check by one step (from trained to proficient, from proficient to expertise, from expertise to mastery, from mastery to high mastery, or from high mastery to grand mastery).

You can use this feature five times. You gain an additional use at niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

flow-state.name: État de Flow
flow-state.description:
Maverick Practice: niveau 17

As an action, vous pouvez choisir to intensely focus for one minute, gaining the following benefits:

  • Une fois par chacun de vos tours, quand vous utilisez a maneuver, you can use a [[/r d4]] instead of expending a dé de supériorité.
  • You can't have disavantage on test de caractéristiques or jet de sauvegardes.
  • Creatures can't have avantage on attack rolls against you.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a repos long before you can use it again.

know-a-bit.name: Connaître un Peu
know-a-bit.description:
Maverick Practice: niveau 3

Vous pouvez ajouter half your bonus de maîtrise to any test de caractéristique you make that doesn't already include your bonus de maîtrise.

maverick-superiority.name: Supériorité du Maverick
maverick-superiority.description:
Maverick Practice: niveau 3

You learn maneuvers that are fueled by special dice called dés de supériorité. See chapter 13 for the maneuvers list.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.chnAGgwn45iPL8za]{Maneuvers Known}

You learn two maneuvers de votre choix, and you earn more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Maneuvers Known column of the Maverick Superiority table. Many maneuvers enhance an attack in some way. You can use only one maneuver per attack, and you may only use each maneuver une fois par tour.

Each time you learn new maneuvers, you can also replace one maneuver you know with a different one.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.a96yERfCC0JkyFO2]{Superiority Dice}

You have two dés de supériorité, which are d4s, and you earn more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Superiority Dice Quantity column of the Maverick Superiority table. This die changes as you gain operative niveaus, as shown in the Superiority Dice Size column of the Maverick Superiority table. A dé de supériorité is expended quand vous utilisez it.

Vous regagnez tous of your expended dés de supériorité when you finish a short or repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.SY4ebNfAgMqvI4QG]{Maneuver Ability}

Your maneuver ability varies based on the type of the maneuver you use. You use Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution for physical maneuvers (your choice), Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma for mental maneuvers (your choice), and an ability de votre choix for general maneuvers. You use this ability whenever a maneuver refers to your maneuver ability. De plus, you use this modificateur de caractéristique when setting the jet de sauvegarde DD for a maneuver you use.

_

Maneuver sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your maneuver modificateur de caractéristique

_

outplayed.name: Surjoué
outplayed.description:
Maverick Practice: niveau 9

When a creature fails a jet de sauvegarde or test de caractéristique against you or an effect you control, you don't need avantage on your attack roll to use Sneak Attack, you can't have disavantage on attack rolls against cette créature, and cette créature can't have avantage on test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes against effects you control. These effects last jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

high-voltage.name: Haute Tension
high-voltage.description:
Mechanist Technique: niveau 11

You are used to working with electronics and have learned to increase their potency, while becoming inured to their dangers. Vous gagnez la résistance to ion and lightning dégâts.

De plus, whenever you deal ion dégâts to a creature, you can spend a tech point to force la créature to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it is étourdi jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

potent-tech.name: Technologie Puissante
potent-tech.description:
Mechanist Technique: 7th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You can use your ingenuity to bolster yourpersonnelle or an ally. As an action, you can contact une créature (which can be yourpersonnelle) and confer one of the following benefits de votre choix to cette créature:

  • For 10 minutes, la créature can roll a [[/r d3]] whenever making an attack roll or an test de caractéristique and add the number rolled to the [[/r d20]] roll. Once a creature receives this benefit, cette créature can't receive it again until it finishes a short or repos long.
  • Roll a [[/r d4]]. The creature regains a number of tech points equal to the result. Once a creature receives this benefit, cette créature can't receive it again until it finishes a repos long.

You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

command-droid.name: Commander un Droïde
command-droid.description:
Technique du mécanicien (compagnon) : niveau 15

Vous pouvez reprogrammer un droïde et le mettre sous votre contrôle. Par une action, vous pouvez contacter un droïde que vous pouvez voir et qui est la cible de la carrière de votre Ranger. Cette créature doit effectuer un jet de sauvegarde d'Intelligence contre votre DD de sauvegarde technologique. Si cela réussit, vous ne pourrez plus utiliser cette fonctionnalité pendant 24 heures. S'il échoue, il devient amical avec vous et obéit à vos commandes jusqu'à ce que vous utilisiez à nouveau cette fonctionnalité.

Les droïdes intelligents sont plus difficiles à contrôler de cette manière. Si la cible a une Intelligence de 8 ou plus, elle a un avantage sur le jet de sauvegarde. S'il échoue au jet de sauvegarde et a une Intelligence de 12 ou plus, il peut répéter le jet de sauvegarde à la fin de chaque heure jusqu'à ce qu'il réussisse et se libère.

improved-max-power-level.name: Niveau de Puissance Maximal Amélioré
improved-max-power-level.description:
Votre niveau de puissance maximum passe au 2ème, au lieu du 1er, et il augmente aux niveaux plus élevés, comme indiqué dans le tableau de Techcasting des techniques mécanistes.

Vous ne pouvez lancer des techniques de pouvoir qu'aux niveaux 5ème, 6ème et 7ème niveaux, une seule fois, au lieu des 4ème et 5ème niveaux. Vous retrouvez la possibilité de le faire après une longue période de repos.

improved-tech-points.name: Points Techniques Améliorés
improved-tech-points.description: Vous disposez d'un nombre de points technologiques égal à une fois et demie votre niveau de scout, au lieu de votre niveau de scout, comme indiqué dans la colonne Points Tech du tableau Techcasting Technique Mécaniste, + votre modificateur d'Intelligence. Vous utilisez ces points technologiques pour lancer des techniques de pouvoir. Vous regagnez tous les points techniques dépensés lorsque vous terminez un short ou un repos long.

improved-tech-powers-known.name: Pouvoirs Techniques Connus Améliorés
improved-tech-powers-known.description: Vous connaissez 7 techniques de pouvoir de votre choix, au lieu de 5, et vous en apprenez davantage aux niveaux supérieurs, comme indiqué dans la colonne Tech Powers Known du tableau Techcasting Technique Mécaniste. Vous ne pouvez pas apprendre une technique de pouvoir d'un niveau supérieur à votre niveau de puissance maximum.

improved-techcasting.name: Incantation Technique Améliorée
improved-techcasting.description:
Technique de mécanicien : niveau 3

Votre maîtrise du techcasting s'améliore.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.cPqnNBkDj3pu9eQv]{Pouvoirs technologiques améliorés Connu}

Vous connaissez 7 techniques de pouvoir de votre choix, au lieu de 5, et vous en apprenez davantage aux niveaux supérieurs, comme indiqué dans la colonne Tech Powers Known du tableau Techcasting Technique Mécaniste. Vous ne pouvez pas apprendre une technique de pouvoir d'un niveau supérieur à votre Niveau de Puissance Max.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.wmkgoGr5EjEG2S8e]{Points Tech améliorés}

Vous disposez d'un nombre de points techniques égal à une fois et demie votre niveau de scout, au lieu de votre niveau de scout, comme indiqué dans la colonne Points Tech du tableau Techcasting Technique Mécaniste, + votre modificateur d'Intelligence. Vous utilisez ces points technologiques pour lancer des techniques de pouvoir. Vous regagnez tous les points techniques dépensés lorsque vous terminez un short ou un repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.c1i1SgKOvHs0xD1j]{Niveau de puissance maximum amélioré}

Votre niveau de puissance maximum devient 2ème, au lieu du 1er, et il augmente aux niveaux plus élevés, comme indiqué dans le tableau Techcasting de la technique du mécaniste.

Vous ne pouvez lancer des techniques de pouvoir qu'une seule fois aux 5ème, 6ème et 7ème niveaux, au lieu des 4ème et 5ème niveaux. Vous retrouvez la possibilité de le faire après une longue période de repos.

mark-of-the-mechanist.name: Marque du Mécanicien
mark-of-the-mechanist.description:
Mechanist Technique: niveau 7

As a action bonus, you can cause la cible of your Ranger's Quarry to emit an ion pulse, as long as la cible is within 60 mètres of you. La cible, and any creatures within 5 mètres of it, must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, roll your Ranger's Quarry die; chaque créature takes ion dégâts equal to the amount rolled.

tracker-droid-companion.name: Compagnon Droïde Traqueur
tracker-droid-companion.description:
Saboteur Practice: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You learn to employ all the knowledge you've accumulated to create and customize your own tracker droid companion.

Create your tracker droid companion as detailed in the Companions section of the Customization Options document for Expanded Content. You must have astrotech's implements in order to create your droid.

De plus to its traits and features, your tracker droid companion gains an additional benefit while it is bonded to you:

  • Your tracker droid gains two additional traits. It gains one more additional trait when you reach niveau 11 in this class. For each droid trait in excess of your bonus de maîtrise, your tech point maximum is reduced by 1. Over the course of a repos long, you can install, replace, or remove a number of tracker droid traits equal to half your Intelligence modificateur (minimum of one).

Lastly, when you cast a pouvoir technique of 1st-niveau or higher that would affect only une cible, and your tracker droid companion is bonded and within 10 mètres of you or your target, your tracker droid companion can use its réaction to increase the niveau at which you are casting your power by 1. Cette aptitude can increase a power's niveau above your Max Power Niveau, and using this feature does not cost additional tech points.

At niveau 11, your tracker droid companion must be within 30 mètres of you or your target to benefit from this feature. At niveau 17, your tracker droid companion must be within 60 mètres.

You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

hold-the-line.name: Tenir la Ligne
hold-the-line.description:
Mounted Specialist: niveau 10

You become a master of locking down your enemies. Creatures provoke an attaque d'opportunité from you when they move 5 mètres or more while within your reach, and if you hit a creature with an attaque d'opportunité, la cible gains 4 slowed niveaus until the end of the current turn.

warding-maneuver.name: Maneuver de Protection
warding-maneuver.description:
Mounted Specialist: 7th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You learn to fend off strikes directed at you, your mount, or other creatures nearby. If you or a creature you can see within 5 mètres of you is dealt dégâts by an attack, you can roll [[/r 1d8]] as a réaction if you're wielding a melee weapon or a shield. Roll the die, and add the number rolled to la cible's AC against that attack. If the attack still hits, la cible has resistance against the attack's dégâts.

You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses of it when you finish a repos long.

ferocious-charger.name: Chargeur Féroce
ferocious-charger.description:
Mounted Specialist: niveau 15

You can run down your foes, whether you're mounted or not. If you move at least 10 mètres in a straight line right before attacking a creature and you hit it with the attack, cette cible must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Strength modificateur) or be knocked à terre. You can use this feature only une fois par chacun de vos tours.

vigilant-defender.name: Défenseur Vigilant
vigilant-defender.description:
Mounted Specialist: niveau 18

You respond to danger with extraordinary vigilance. In combat, you get a special réaction that you can take once on every creature's turn, except your turn. You can use this special réaction only to make an attaque d'opportunité, and you can't use it on the same turn that you take your normal réaction.

born-to-the-saddle.name: Né pour la Selle
born-to-the-saddle.description:
Mounted Specialist: niveau 3

Your mastery as a rider becomes apparent. You have avantage on jet de sauvegardes made to avoid falling off your mount. If you fall off your mount and descend no more than 10 mètres, you can land on your mètres if you're not incapacitated.

Finally, mounting or dismounting a creature or vehicle costs you only 5 mètres of movement, rather than half your speed.

unwavering-mark.name: Marque Inébranlable
unwavering-mark.description:
Mounted Specialist: niveau 3

You can menace your foes, foiling their attacks and punishing them for harming others. Quand vous contactez une créature with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can mark la créature jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or you die, or if someone else marks la créature. While it is within 5 mètres of you, a creature marked by you has disavantage on any attack roll that doesn't target you.

De plus, if a creature marked by you deals dégâts to anyone other than you, you can make a special attaque d'arme au corps à corps against the marked creature as a action bonus on your next turn. You have avantage on the attack roll, and if it hits, the attacks weapon deals extra dégâts to la cible equal to half your fighter niveau.

Regardless of the number of creatures you mark, you can make this special attack un nombre de fois égal à your Strength modificateur (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a repos long.

mastery-of-death.name: Maîtrise de la Mort
mastery-of-death.description:
Nightsister Order: niveau 11

Lorsque vous êtes réduit à 0 point de vie, vous pouvez dépenser 1 point de focus (aucune action requise) pour avoir 1 point de vie à la place.

spirit-blade-assault.name: Assaut de Lame Spirituelle
spirit-blade-assault.description:
Nightsister Order: niveau 17

As an action, you conjure a blade of spirit energy and strike une créature within 5 mètres of you with it, expending 1 to 10 focus points. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it takes [[/r 2d10]] necrotic dégâts per focus point spent, or half as much on a successful one.

ichor-lightning.name: Éclair d'Ichor
ichor-lightning.description:
Nightsister Order: niveau 3

You gain a new attack option that you can use with the Attack action. This special attack is a ranged focus attack with a range of 30 mètres. You are proficient with it, and you add your focus modificateur de caractéristique to its attack and jet de dégâtss. Its dégâts is necrotic, it counts as an unarmed strike for the sake of your Martial Arts feature, and it uses your Martial Arts die for its dégâts die.

When you would make an unarmed strike as part of your Martial Arts action bonus attack or your Flurry of Blows, you can replace the attack with this one.

When you reduce a creature to 0 points de vie with this attack, you gain points de vie temporaires equal to your focus modificateur de caractéristique (your choice, minimum of one) + your monk niveau.

dark-magick.name: Magie Noire
dark-magick.description:
Nightsister Order: niveau 6

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour force chaque créature within 30 mètres of you that can see you to make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your focus sauvegarde DD or be charmé or effrayé (your choice) of you jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

redirect.name: Rediriger
redirect.description:
Forme Niman : niveau 15

When you would be affected by a weapon or pouvoir de la Force that requires a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or attack roll and would affect only you, you can use your réaction to redirect that power to another target within 30 mètres. If the weapon or power required a melee or attaque à distance, make a melee or ranged force attack against the new target, as appropriate. If it required a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, the new target must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

master-of-moderation.name: Maître de la Modération
master-of-moderation.description:
Forme Niman : niveau 20

The Force flows in perfect concert with your attaque d'armes. Your Dexterity and Wisdom or Charisma scores (your choice) increase by 2. Your maximum for these scores increases by 2. De plus, you can use your action to gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • You have resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts from unenhanced weapons.
  • You have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against pouvoir de la Forces. De plus, you have resistance against the dégâts of pouvoir de la Forces.
  • When you use your action to cast an at-will pouvoir de la Force cette cibles only une créature, you can target an additional creature within 5 mètres of the original target and within the power's range.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

telekinetic-slash.name: Entaille Télékinétique
telekinetic-slash.description: When you deal dégâts with an at-will pouvoir de la Force that requires a force attack or a jet de sauvegarde, you can expend a use of your Channel the Force and expend point de Forces to deal additional dégâts to la cible, which is the same type as the power's dégâts. The additional dégâts is [[/r 1d8]] for each point spent in this way. You can't deal more additional dégâts than the amount shown in the Focused Strikes column of the guardian table.

the-way-of-the-rancor.name: La Voie du Rancor
the-way-of-the-rancor.description:
Forme Niman : niveau 3

As a action bonus, you can enter a balanced stance for one minute. As a part of this action bonus, and as a action bonus on each of your turns, quand vous utilisez your action to cast a pouvoir de la Force, you can make one attaque d'arme au corps à corps. De plus, for the duration, you can use Wisdom or Charisma instead of Strength or Dexterity for the attack and jet de dégâtss of your attaque d'arme au corps à corpss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

enlightenment.name: Illumination
enlightenment.description:
Forme Niman : niveau 7

Lorsque vous réduisez une créature hostile à 0 point de vie avec un pouvoir de la Force, ou que vous redonnez des points de vie à une créature amie qui est à 0 point de vie avec un pouvoir de la Force, vous gagnez temporairement un point de Forces égal à votre modificateur de Sagesse ou de Charisme (votre choix, minimum un). Une fois que vous l'avez fait, vous ne pouvez plus le faire tant que vous n'avez pas terminé un short ou un repos long.

curse-of-objurgation.name: Malédiction d'Objurgation
curse-of-objurgation.description:
Occultist Pursuit: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

When you target a creature with your Critical Analysis, vous pouvez choisir one ability. While it can see you, la cible has disavantage on test de caractéristiques made with the chosen ability.

You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

toil-and-trouble.name: Labeur et Problèmes
toil-and-trouble.description:
Occultist Pursuit: niveau 17

You perfect your control of your curses, granting them unmatched potency. When la cible of your Curse of

Objurgation fails a jet de sauvegarde against one of your maneuvers, vous pouvez choisir to amplify that maneuver by expending a number of Hit Dice de votre choix. La cible immediately takes [[/r 1d8]] psychic dégâts for every Hit Die spent in this way.

De plus, when a creature attempts to use a power like remove curse or other similar abilities to remove a curse you set, they must roll a Wisdom or test de Charisme (their choice) against your maneuver sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, their attempt fails, and any force or tech points spent in this way are wasted.

theurgic-research.name: Recherche Théurgique
theurgic-research.description:
Occultist Pursuit: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise in the Lore and Nature skills. De plus, you can't have disavantage on checks you make with them.

heightened-hex.name: Malédiction Renforcée
heightened-hex.description:
Occultist Pursuit: niveau 6

When you use your Curse of Objurgation feature, each time the cursed creature deals dégâts to you or an allied creature you can see within 5 mètres of you, la créature takes psychic dégâts equal to twice your Critical Analysis ability modifer (minimum of 2).

voodoo-doll.name: Poupée Vaudou
voodoo-doll.description:
Occultist Pursuit: niveau 9

Over the course of an hour, which can be done during a repos court, you can perform a ritual to construct an effigy of a creature. In order to do so, you must have at least heard of or seen la créature before, and la cible must be in the same system as you. At the end of the hour, la créature must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your maneuver sauvegarde DD. This jet de sauvegarde is modified by how well you know la cible and the sort of physical connection you have to it, as shown in the Knowledge Save Modifier and Connection Save Modifier tables below.

Knowledge Save Modifier

|||

|:--|--:|

|Secondhand (you have heard of la cible) |+5|

|Firsthand (you have met la cible) |+0|

|Familiar (you know la cible well) |-5|

Connection Save Modifier

|||

|:--|--:|

|Likeness or picture |-2|

|Curse of Objurgation |-3|

|Possession or garment |-4|

|Body part, lock of hair, bit of nail, or the like |-10|

On a successful sauvegarde, la cible isn't affected, and you can't use this ritual against it again for 24 hours. On a failed sauvegarde, the ritual creates a Tiny doll that is linked to la cible. The doll remains linked for 24 hours, or for 10 minutes after you first use it. It disintegrates at the end of this duration. For the duration, you can see and hear la cible through the doll as if you were within 5 mètres of la créature.

De plus, as action while the doll is in your possession, you can expend a Hit Die to torment la cible, choosing an effect from the following options:

  • Burn: La cible must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible believes it is burning. While burning in this way, la cible has has disavantage on attack rolls made with Strength or Dexterity. Cet effet lasts for 1 hour.
  • Pain: La cible must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be wracked with pain for 1 hour. While in pain in this way, la cible takes an additional [[/r 1d4]] psychic dégâts whenever it takes dégâts.
  • Stab: La cible must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or gain 2 slowed niveaus and fall à terre. The slowed niveaus effect lasts for 1 hour.

La cible can only be under 1 effect at a time. When you use a new effect, any existing effects end. Placing an effect on a target requires maintaining your concentration, as if concentrating on a power.

You can use this feature twice. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

living-current.name: Courant Vivant
living-current.description:
Path of Aggression: niveau 13

You've learned to channel the dégâts done to you to enhance your strikes. The first time you deal dégâts on your turn, if you took dégâts since the start of your last turn, you can deal additional lightning dégâts equal to your Kinetic Combat die + half the amount of dégâts taken.

You can use this feature five times. You gain an additional use at niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a short or repos long.

retaliatory-strike.name: Frappe de Représailles
retaliatory-strike.description:
Path of Aggression: niveau 18

When a creature hits you with an attack while within 5 mètres of you, you can use your réaction to cast the lightning charge pouvoir de la Force, targeting them.

thunderous-momentum.name: Momentum Tonitruant
thunderous-momentum.description:
Path of Aggression: niveau 3

Your stride becomes nigh unbreakable. You are immune to the shocked condition, and each slowed niveau only reduces your speed by 5 mètres, unless it would reduce your speed to 0.

voltaic-slash.name: Entaille Voltaïque
voltaic-slash.description:
Path of Aggression: niveau 3

Starting when you choose this calling at niveau 3, you learn the lightning charge pouvoir de la Force, which does not count against your total powers known. De plus, you can use Wisdom or Charisma as your forcecasting ability for it, and when you deal lightning dégâts with the lightning charge pouvoir de la Force, you deal additional lightning dégâts equal to half your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of one) if it doesn't already include that modificateur.

entropic-rush.name: Ruée Entropique
entropic-rush.description:
Chemin d'agression : niveau 7

Vous avez appris à vous déplacer avec rapidité et précision, en déchargeant vos éclairs en une rafale massive. Lorsque vous vous déplacez au moins la moitié de votre vitesse avant de lancer charge éclair, vous effectuez le jet d'attaque avec avantage. De plus, sur un coup, l'éclair peut bondir une seconde fois, vers une troisième créature à portée ou revenir vers la première créature.

ethereal-vision.name: Vision Éthérée
ethereal-vision.description:
Path of Communion: niveau 13

You and your guiding spirit both gain truesight out to 60 mètres as long as your spirit is within 100 mètres of you.

De plus, quand vous utilisez your action to see through your spirit's senses, you are no longer deaf and blind with regard to your own senses, able to comprehend what happens in both perspectives simultaneously.

generating-your-spirit.name: Générer Votre Esprit
generating-your-spirit.description:
> Your spirit might be the ghost of a benevolent Jedi, discovered in the ruins of a Jedi temple, or a powerful Sith spirit lingering in an ancient artifact. It might be the spirit of a Nightsister sorceress, or a paragon of a long-forgotten monastic order. Work with your GM to determine the nature of your spirit.

De plus, your spirit can briefly interact with the physical world. When you would make a attaque au corps à corps, your spirit can deliver the attack as if it had made it. Your spirit must be within 100 mètres of you, and it must use its réaction to deliver the attack. It uses your modificateurs for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.

symbiot-spirit.name: Esprit Symbiote
symbiot-spirit.description:
Path of Communion: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You attract the attention of the spirit of a Force ghost. Over the course of one hour, you can attune to the spirit, forging a lasting connection. While attuned to a spirit, you gain the following benefits:

  • Your spirit is always audible and visible to you. Your spirit can choose to make itpersonnelle audible and visible or inaudible and invisible to other creatures (no action required), but it is always visible to beings with truesight.
  • Your spirit can not interact with the corporeal world, but it is also not impeded by unenhanced walls or barriers.
  • Your spirit acts independently of you, and it only obeys your commands if it chooses to. In combat, it rolls its own initiative and acts on its own turn. Your spirit can't attack, but it can take other actions as normal.
  • While your spirit is within 100 mètres of you, you can telepathically communicate with it. De plus, as an action, you can see through your spirit's vision and hear what it hears jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. During this time, you are deaf and blind with regard to your own senses.
  • When you cast a pouvoir de la Force with a range of contact, your spirit can deliver the power as if it had cast it. Your spirit must be within 100 mètres of you, and it must use its réaction to deliver the power when you cast it. If the power requires an attack roll, you use your attack modificateur for the roll.

You can only attune to one spirit at a time. If you attempt to attune to another spirit, you immediately break the bond with your current spirit.

> #### @UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.Tho3vbeiW6OlYTm1]{Generating Your Spirit}

> Your spirit might be the ghost of a benevolent Jedi, discovered in the ruins of a Jedi temple, or a powerful Sith spirit lingering in an ancient artifact. It might be the spirit of a Nightsister sorceress, or a paragon of a long-forgotten monastic order. Work with your GM to determine the nature of your spirit.

De plus, your spirit can briefly interact with the physical world. When you would make a attaque au corps à corps, your spirit can deliver the attack as if it had made it. Your spirit must be within 100 mètres of you, and it must use its réaction to deliver the attack. It uses your modificateurs for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.

assuming-direct-control.name: Assumer le Contrôle Direct
assuming-direct-control.description:
Path of Communion: niveau 18

When a creature fails its jet de sauvegarde against your Invasive Presence feature, la cible becomes charmé by you for as long as Invasive Presence is active.

While la cible is charmé, you and your spirit have a telepathic link with it as long as you are within 100 mètres of it. You and your spirit can use this telepathic link to issue commands to la créature while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey.
