You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as "Attack cette créature," "Run over there," or "Fetch that object." If la créature completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it defends and preserves itpersonnelle to the best of its ability.

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour take total and precise control of la cible. Until the end of your next turn, la créature takes only the actions you choose, and doesn't do anything that you don't allow it to do. During this time you can also cause la créature to use a réaction, but this requires you to use your own réaction as well.

mystical-connection.name: Connexion Mystique
mystical-connection.description:
Path of Communion: niveau 3

You learn the feedback pouvoir de la Force, which does not count against your total powers known. De plus, you can use Wisdom or Charisma as your forcecasting ability for it, and you can use the Double Strike Force-Empowered Self option when you cast it as your action and la cible fails its jet de sauvegarde. Finally, when you deal psychic dégâts with the feedback pouvoir de la Force, you deal additional psychic dégâts equal to your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of one) if it doesn't already include that modificateur.

invasive-presence.name: Présence Invasive
invasive-presence.description:
Path of Communion: niveau 7

Your spirit can invade another creature's being. As an action, your spirit can contact a creature within 5 mètres of it, forcing it to make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD. If you or creatures that are friendly to you are fighting it, it has avantage on the jet de sauvegarde.

On a failed sauvegarde, your spirit moves into cette créatures space, inhabiting its body, pendant 1 minute. The affected creature has disavantage on the first attack roll, test de caractéristique, or jet de sauvegarde it makes each turn. At the end of each its turns, la créature repeats this sauvegarde. On a success, it repels the spirit from its body, and it becomes immune to this feature for 24 hours.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a repos long before you can use it again.

event-cascade.name: Cascade d'Événements
event-cascade.description:
Path of Ethereality: niveau 13

You have avantage on attack rolls you make against creatures if you haven't dealt dégâts to them or affected them with a pouvoir de la Force since the start of your previous turn.

aberrant-self.name: Soi Aberrant
aberrant-self.description:
Path of Ethereality: niveau 18

You no longer suffer the frailty of old age, and you can't be aged abnormally. You can still die of old age, however. De plus, you no longer need food or water, and you no longer need to sleep. Lastly, the first time you take dégâts on each of your turns, you can roll your Kinetic Combat die and reduce the dégâts by that amount.

aberrant-resilience.name: Résilience Aberrante
aberrant-resilience.description:
Chemin de l'Éthéréalité: niveau 3

Vous apprenez le résistance pouvoir de la Force, qui ne compte pas dans votre total de pouvoirs connu. De plus, ce pouvoir ne nécessite plus de concentration de votre part lorsque vous ciblez votre personnel avec.

force-empowered-kinesis.name: Kinésie Renforcée par la Force
force-empowered-kinesis.description:
Path of Ethereality: niveau 3

Your connection to the Force allows you to briefly become incorporeal. When you use a Force-Empowered Self option, jusqu'à la fin de votre tour, you can move through other creatures and objects as if they are difficult terrain. If you end this movement inside a solid object or creature, you are immediately shunted to the nearest unoccupied space that you can occupy and take true dégâts equal to twice the number of mètres you are moved.

out-of-touch.name: Hors d'Atteinte
out-of-touch.description:
Path of Ethereality: niveau 7

As an action, you can step out of sync with the rest of the universe pendant 1 minute. At the start of each of your turns, roll a [[/r d20]]. If you roll 11 or higher, you and everything your are wearing or carrying are completely invisible to all beings, except for those with truesight. On a roll of 10 or lower, you instead appear as an indistinguishably blurred form roughly your normal height and weight, though a being with truesight sees you normally. Regardless of your appearance, for the duration, your speed doubles, you gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed, and you can move through creatures and objects willingly though you can not affect them and they can not affect you. You can end this feature early on your turn (no action required). When this effect ends, if you are inside a solid object or creature, you are immediately shunted to the nearest unoccupied space that you can occupy and take force dégâts equal to twice the number of mètres you are moved.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

focused-flow.name: Flux Focalisé
focused-flow.description:
Chemin de concentration : niveau 13

Chaque fois que vous utilisez une fonction Auto-empowered Self, vous pouvez à la place dépenser aucun point de Forces et lancer un [[/r d4]] à la place de votre combat cinétique. mourir.

master-strike.name: Frappe Magistrale
master-strike.description:
Path of Focus: niveau 18

At niveau 18, your bursts can overpower even the fiercest of foes. Once on your turn, when a creature takes dégâts from you three times, you can force it to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, it becomes étourdi until the end of its next turn.

blade-dance.name: Danse des Lames
blade-dance.description:
Path of Focus: niveau 3

When you deal dégâts to a creature within 5 mètres of you, you can move up to 10 mètres without provoking attaque d'opportunités.

focused-burst.name: Salve Ciblée
focused-burst.description:
Path of Focus: niveau 3

You learn the burst pouvoir de la Force, which does not count against your total powers known. De plus, you can use The Double Strike Force-Empowered Self options when you cast it as your action. If more than une créature would be affected, only une créature takes the additional dégâts. Finally, you add your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of +1) to jet de dégâtss with it, and creatures that succeed on their jet de sauvegarde take half dégâts, instead of none.

blade-storm.name: Tempête de Lames
blade-storm.description:
Path of Focus: niveau 7

Your bursts become even more overwhelming. Once on your turn, when a creature takes dégâts from you twice, you can immediately make one additional attack against cette créature (no action required). This attack uses your Kinetic Combat die instead of the weapon's dégâts die.

follow-through.name: Suivi
follow-through.description:
Path of Iron: niveau 13

When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can spend 2 point de Forces and forgo one of your attacks to cast an at-will pouvoir de la Force which requires you to make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps.

kinetic-mastery.name: Maîtrise Cinétique
kinetic-mastery.description:
Chemin du fer : niveau 18

Choisissez une forme de sabre laser que vous connaissez. Une fois par chacun de vos tours, vous pouvez utiliser le formulaire choisi sans utiliser votre bonus d'action.

Vous pouvez le faire six fois. Vous récupérez toutes les utilisations dépensées lorsque vous effectuez un dépôt long.

Bien qu'il ne vous reste plus d'utilisation de cette fonctionnalité, vous pouvez à la place dépenser 1 point de Force pour l'utiliser.

form-combat-training.name: Entraînement au Combat de Forme
form-combat-training.description:
Path of Iron: niveau 3

You learn one lightsaber form, as detailed in the Customization Options document for Expanded Content.

De plus, you gain maîtrise in all martial light- and vibro- weapons.

physical-conditioning.name: Conditionnement Physique
physical-conditioning.description:
Path of Iron: niveau 3

You've undergone special training, increasing your physical capabilities. You gain the following benefits:

  • You gain maîtrise in medium armor. If you are already proficient in medium armor, you then gain maîtrise in heavy armor. While you are wearing light or medium armor, you can use your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice) instead of your Dexterity modificateur when determining your AC.
  • Your point de vie maximum increases by 3, and it increases by 1 again whenever you gain a niveau in this class.

aegis.name: Égide
aegis.description: When you bolster Deflection, when an attack would hit you before the start of your next turn, you subtract the same value rolled for Deflection from the dégâts taken.

cleave.name: Fendre
cleave.description: When you bolster Double Strike, you choose another creature within 5 mètres of your target. They take dégâts of the same type equal to the result of the die rolled for Double Strike.

enhanced-force-empowered-self.name: Moi Renforcé par la Force Amélioré
enhanced-force-empowered-self.description:
Path of Iron: niveau 7

Through intense physical training, you've improved your body's ability to access and channel the force flowing within you.

When you would use a Force-Empowered Self option, vous pouvez choisir to bolster the option, gaining an additional effect as listed below. You can only bolster a Force-Empowered Self option une fois par tour.

You can use these features a combined three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. You regain any expended uses when you finish a short or repos long.

While you have no remaining uses of this feature, you can instead expend 1 point de Force to use it.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.4PAEl9iiT7bvd6Ri]{Aegis}

When you bolster Deflection, when an attack would hit you before the start of your next turn, you subtract the same value rolled for Deflection from the dégâts taken.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.lPUZkEctW4LFDcew]{Cleave}

When you bolster Double Strike, you choose another creature within 5 mètres of your target. They take dégâts of the same type equal to the result of the die rolled for Double Strike.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.ZnbNH69k0Aoet3aG]{Momentum}

When you bolster Slow Time, jusqu'à la fin de votre tour you ignore difficult terrain, and can move along vertical surfaces and across liquids without falling during the move.

momentum.name: Momentum
momentum.description: When you bolster Slow Time, jusqu'à la fin de votre tour you ignore difficult terrain, and can move along vertical surfaces and across liquids without falling during the move.

turbulent-presence.name: Présence Turbulente
turbulent-presence.description:
Chemin de méditation : niveau 13

Une fois par repos long, vous pouvez lancer le méditation de combat améliorée pouvoir de la Force à son niveau de base sans dépenser de points de Forces. Tout en vous concentrant sur méditation de combat améliorée, au début de chacun de vos tours, le dé de pouvoir augmente d'un cran (de [[/r d6]] à [[/r d8]], de [[/r d8]] à [[/r d10]] ou de [[/r d10]] à [[/r d12]]).

De plus, une fois par tour, lorsqu'une créature lance un dé bonus ou malus provenant d'un effet que vous contrôlez, vous pouvez lui faire lancer le dé avec avantage ou désavantage (votre choix).

legendary-battle-meditation.name: Méditation de Combat Légendaire
legendary-battle-meditation.description:
Path of Meditation: niveau 18

Once per repos long, you can cast the master battle meditation pouvoir de la Force without expending point de Forces. While concentrating on master battle meditation, at the start of each of your turns, the power's die increases by one step (from [[/r d8]] to [[/r d10]], or [[/r d10]] to [[/r d12]]).

De plus, you gain a second réaction each round that you can only use for your Force-Empowered Allies feature. You can only take one réaction per turn.

deflection.name: Déviation
deflection.description: When an ally is hit with an attack roll, you can use your réaction and roll a Kinetic Combat die to add it to your ally's AC, potentially causing the attack to miss.

double-strike.name: Frappe Double
double-strike.description: When an ally hits with an attack roll, you can use your réaction and roll a Kinetic Combat die to deal additional dégâts of the same type as the attack.

force-empowered-allies.name: Alliés Renforcés par la Force
force-empowered-allies.description:
Path of Meditation: niveau 3

While you are concentrating on a power that benefits a friendly creature other than you, you gain new ways to utilize your Force-Empowered Self features. Each option costs 1 point de Force, and you can only target a creature that is benefiting from a power you cast.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.lWYE1SVJKKSb9BYt]{Deflection}

When an ally is hit with an attack roll, you can use your réaction and roll a Kinetic Combat die to add it to your ally's AC, potentially causing the attack to miss.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.qqtcoMTZqfO93deM]{Double Strike}

When an ally hits with an attack roll, you can use your réaction and roll a Kinetic Combat die to deal additional dégâts of the same type as the attack.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.ecknmT1BRjvp9cID]{Slow Time}

When an ally moves on their turn, you can use your réaction and roll a Kinetic Combat die to increase their speed by 5 x the amount rolled until the end of the turn.

sage-counsel.name: Conseil du Sage
sage-counsel.description:
Chemin de Méditation: niveau 3

Vous apprenez le guidance pouvoir de la Force, qui ne compte pas dans votre total de pouvoirs connus. De plus, le dé de ce pouvoir augmente d'un cran (de [[/r d4]] à [[/r d6]], [[/r d6]] à [[/r d8]], [[/r d8]] à [[/r d10]], ou [[/r d10]] à [[/r d12]]).

.

slow-time.name: Ralentir le Temps
slow-time.description: When an ally moves on their turn, you can use your réaction and roll a Kinetic Combat die to increase their speed by 5 x the amount rolled until the end of the turn.

unbreakable-focus.name: Focalisation Inébranlable
unbreakable-focus.description:
Chemin de méditation : niveau 7

Une fois par repos long, vous pouvez lancer le battle méditation pouvoir de la Force à son niveau de base sans dépenser de points de Forces. Tout en vous concentrant sur méditation de combat, au début de chacun de vos tours, le dé de pouvoir augmente d'un cran (de [[/r d4]] à [[/r d6]], [[/r d6]] à [[/r d8]], [[/r d8]] à [[/r d10]], ou [[/r d10]] à [[/r d12]]).

De plus, chaque fois que vous effectuez un jet de sauvegarde de Constitution pour maintenir votre concentration sur un pouvoir de la Force, vous pouvez traiter un jet [[/r d20]] de 9 ou moins comme un 10.

.

shadow-step.name: Pas de l'Ombre
shadow-step.description:
Path of Shadows: niveau 13

You gain the ability to step from one shadow into another. While you are in dim light or darkness, as a action bonus you can teleport up to 60 mètres to an unoccupied space you can see that is also in dim light or darkness. You then have avantage on the first attaque au corps à corps you make before the end of the turn.

shadows-wrath.name: Courroux des Ombres
shadows-wrath.description:
Chemin des Ombres: niveau 18

Votre formation vous a appris des techniques avancées pendant que vous manœuvrez dans l'ombre. Tant que vous êtes caché de votre cible, le premier jet d'attaque que vous effectuez à chaque tour ne révèle pas automatiquement votre présence. Faites un test de Dextérité (Furtivité) contre le test de Sagesse (Perception) de votre cible. En cas de réussite, vous restez caché. Si vous êtes également invisible, vous restez invisible.

cloak-of-shadows.name: Cape d'Ombres
cloak-of-shadows.description:
Path of Shadows: niveau 3

You can take the Hide action as a action bonus on your turn. De plus, you can try to hide when you are lightly obscured from la créature from which you are hiding.

dead-silence.name: Silence de Mort
dead-silence.description:
Path of Shadows: niveau 3

You learn the psychic charge pouvoir de la Force, which does not count against your total powers known. De plus, you can use Wisdom or Charisma as your forcecasting ability for it, and quand vous contactez a creature with the psychic charge pouvoir de la Force and la cible tries to speak, it takes additional dégâts equal to your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of +1), and its voice does not produce sound jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

shadow-strike.name: Frappe de l'Ombre
shadow-strike.description:
Path of Shadows: niveau 7

You learn to strike from the shadows. Une fois par tour, you can deal an extra [[/r 1d6]] dégâts to une créature you hit with an attack if you have avantage on the roll.

The extra dégâts increases to [[/r 2d6]] at niveau 11 and [[/r 3d6]] at niveau 17.

conservation-of-energy.name: Conservation de l'Énergie
conservation-of-energy.description: Lorsque vous réduisez une créature hostile à 0 point de vie avec une technique de pouvoir, vous pouvez réduire le coût en points de Force de la technique de pouvoir à 0 (aucune action requise).

disruption-pulse.name: Pulse de Disruption
disruption-pulse.description: A Par une action, vous pouvez envoyer un cône de 9 mètres d'énergie chargée électromagnétiquement pour surcharger les armes ennemies. Chaque créature à l'intérieur du cône qui porte ou transporte une arme à composants électriques doit réaliser un jet de sauvegarde d'Intelligence. Si l'arme est portée, cette sauvegarde se fait avec désavantage. En cas d'échec de la sauvegarde, la première attaque qu'ils tentent de réaliser avec cette arme est désavantageuse. Une créature possédant plusieurs armes doit effectuer une sauvegarde distincte pour chaque arme.

force-empowered-tech.name: Technologie Renforcée par la Force
force-empowered-tech.description:
Path of Synthesis: 7th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You learn to fully blend your technological aptitude with your use of the Force. You have three such effects: Disruption Pulse, Force Override, and Techcasting Insight. When you use your Force-Empowered Tech, you choose which effect to create.

You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a short or repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.vn8My5QIvxqMN5xy]{Disruption Pulse}

As an action, you can send out a 30 foot cone of electromagnetically-charged energy to overload enemy weapons. Each creature within the cone that is wearing or carrying a weapon with electric components must make an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde. If the weapon is being worn, this sauvegarde is made with disavantage. On a failed sauvegarde, the first attack they attempt to make with that weapon has disavantage. A creature with multiple weapons must make a separate sauvegarde for each weapon.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.gEfzbs2ou6XweXn0]{Forced Override}

When you cast a pouvoir technique that requires a jet de sauvegarde, you can impose disavantage on the sauvegarde (no action required).

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.JPVXHJsOD2n4Ei18]{Techcasting Insight}

As an action, you can attempt to determine another creature's experience with techcasting. When you do so, you make an Intelligence (Technology) check contested by la cible's Intelligence (Technology) check. Si vous réussissez, you immediately learn la cible's techcasting Max Power Niveau, as well as any pouvoir techniques currently affecting la cible.

forced-override.name: Contournement Forcé
forced-override.description: Lorsque vous lancez une technique de pouvoir qui nécessite un jet de sauvegarde, vous pouvez imposer un désavantage sur la sauvegarde (aucune action requise).

harmonic-synthesis.name: Synthèse Harmonique
harmonic-synthesis.description: When you use your action to cast a pouvoir de la Force, you can use your action bonus to gain resistance to dégâts dealt by pouvoir techniques jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. If you use your action to cast a pouvoir technique, you can instead gain resistance to dégâts dealt by pouvoir de la Forces.

improved-force-empowered-tech.name: Technologie Renforcée par la Force Améliorée
improved-force-empowered-tech.description:
Path of Synthesis: niveau 13

You've gained access to two additional Force-Empowered Tech effects: Harmonic Synthesis and Conservation of Energy.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.L5ovMD949ibKVGiv]{Harmonic Synthesis}

When you use your action to cast a pouvoir de la Force, you can use your action bonus to gain resistance to dégâts dealt by pouvoir techniques jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. If you use your action to cast a pouvoir technique, you can instead gain resistance to dégâts dealt by pouvoir de la Forces.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.evzBOIvoBxiy2SIi]{Conservation of Energy}

When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 points de vie with a pouvoir technique, you can reduce the point de Force cost of the pouvoir technique to 0 (no action required).

techcasting-insight.name: Perspicacité Technique
techcasting-insight.description: As an action, you can attempt to determine another creature's experience with techcasting. When you do so, you make an Intelligence (Technology) check contested by la cible's Intelligence (Technology) check. Si vous réussissez, you immediately learn la cible's techcasting Max Power Niveau, as well as any pouvoir techniques currently affecting la cible.

reflective-shield.name: Bouclier Réfléchissant
reflective-shield.description:
Path of Synthesis: niveau 18

When you use your Force-Empowered Tech features, a barrier for energy shimmers into existence, surrounding you jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. When you take dégâts, you can mitigate the incoming energy and potentially reflect it back at your attacker. You use your réaction to have resistance against the triggering dégâts, and if the source of the dégâts is within 5 mètres of you, they take half of the total dégâts dealt as ion.

synthetic-understanding.name: Compréhension Synthétique
synthetic-understanding.description:
Path of Synthesis: niveau 3

You've applied your newfound knowledge to broader pursuits. You gain maîtrise in Technology or one tool de votre choix.

De plus, quand vous faites an Intelligence (Technology) check, or a check with a tool, you may use your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice) instead of your Intelligence modificateur.

Finally, when you deal dégâts with a pouvoir technique or your Double Strike Force Empowered Self option, vous pouvez choisir to substitute the dégâts dealt as ion.

indomitable.name: Indomptable
indomitable.description:
Path of Tenacity: niveau 13

The Force flowing through you makes it harder for movement to be forced upon you. You have avantage on test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being agrippé or moved. Si vous échouez the jet de sauvegarde or test de caractéristique, you can spend 1 point de Force to reroll one of the dice once. You must use the new roll.

De plus, if allies within 5 mètres of you are gaining the benefit of your saber ward pouvoir de la Force, they also gain the benefit of this feature.

kinetic-bastion.name: Bastion Cinétique
kinetic-bastion.description:
Path of Tenacity: niveau 18

You can protect allies even further from you. When a creature within 30 mètres of you is hit by a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can use your réaction to teleport to them and extend your Kinetic Ward. If this dégâts is not reduced to 0, the warded creature takes any remaining dégâts.

You can use this feature un nombre de fois égal à your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, a minimum of once). Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

kinetic-ward.name: Barrière Cinétique
kinetic-ward.description:
Path of Tenacity: niveau 3

You can use your réaction to deflect a strike when you are dealt dégâts by a attaque d'arme au corps à corps. When you do so, the dégâts you take from the attack is reduced by [[/r 1d10]] + your Dexterity modificateur + your sentinel niveau. If you reduce the dégâts to 0, you can redirect it at another target if you have a weapon capable of doing so. Vous pouvez dépenser 1 point de Force to make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps at a target within 5 mètres of you with the weapon, as part of the same réaction. You make this attack with maîtrise, regardless of your weapon proficiencies, and if the attack hits it uses your Kinetic Combat die for its jet de dégâts. If saber ward is active, you have avantage on the attack roll.

protector.name: Protecteur
protector.description:
Path of Tenacity: niveau 3

You learn the saber ward pouvoir de la Force, which does not count against your total powers known. De plus, when you cast it, you can spend 2 point de Forces to extend the benefits to creatures de votre choix within 5 mètres of you while the power is active. The creatures immediately lose this benefit if they move more than 5 mètres away from you.

kinetic-bulwark.name: Rempart Cinétique
kinetic-bulwark.description:
Path of Tenacity: niveau 7

You can extend your Kinetic Ward to a creature within 5 mètres of you when they are hit by a attaque d'arme au corps à corps. If this dégâts is not reduced to 0, the warded creature takes any remaining dégâts.

energized-kinetics.name: Cinétique Énergisée
energized-kinetics.description:
Path of the Corsair: niveau 13

Une fois par tour, when you deal dégâts with a Force-Empowered Detonator or your Double Strike feature, you can deal additional dégâts using your Kinetic Combat die. The type de dégâts is force, lightning, necrotic, or psychic (your choice).

force-empowered-detonators.name: Détonateurs Renforcés par la Force
force-empowered-detonators.description:
Path of the Corsair: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You learn to create a number of small but potent grenades. Over the course of a short or repos long, you can create two grenades. You must have a demolitions kit in order to create these grenades. Your grenades can only be used by you, and they lose their potency at the end of your next short or repos long.

Your grenades can be set to detonate on impact or with a timer that causes them to explode on initiative count 20 (losing all initiative ties). As an action, you can prime and throw one of these grenade at a point you can see within 30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5. Each creature within 5 mètres must make a Dexterity, Constitution, or Wisdom jet de sauvegarde (your choice when you generate the grenade) against your universal force sauvegarde DD. A creature takes dégâts using your Kinetic Combat die + your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice) on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one. The dégâts is force for Dexterity, necrotic for Constitution, or psychic for Wisdom.

Vous pouvez faire additional grenades at higher niveau: three at niveau 5, four at niveau 9, five at niveau 13, and six at niveau 17.

disorienting-detonations.name: Détonations Désorientantes
disorienting-detonations.description:
Path of the Corsair: niveau 18

When a creature fails the jet de sauvegarde against your Force-Empowered Detonators feature, you can spend 2 point de Forces to subject it to the effects of one of the following pouvoir de la Forces: affliction, force blind/deafen, stun, or stun droid. They automatically fail the jet de sauvegarde for the selected power, but the effects only last jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

corsair-munitions.name: Munitions du Corsaire
corsair-munitions.description:
Chemin du Corsaire : niveau 3

Vous pouvez lancer des grenades et poser des mines avec votre bonus d'action, au lieu de votre action. De plus, lorsque vous lancez une grenade, vous pouvez utiliser la Sagesse ou le Charisme au lieu de la Force pour déterminer votre portée de lancement. Enfin, lors de la détermination du DD de sauvegarde d'une charge, d'une grenade, d'une mine, d'un missile ou d'une fusée que vous contrôlez, vous pouvez utiliser votre DD de sauvegarde de force universelle, s'il est supérieur au DD de l'objet.

corsair-weapons.name: Armes du Corsaire
corsair-weapons.description:
Path of the Corsair: niveau 3

You can use the force to quickly learn the use of unfamiliar weapons. When you hold a weapon that you are not proficient in, you can spend 1 point de Force (no action required) to gain maîtrise with that weapon until the end of your next repos long.

De plus, when you throw a grenade, you can use Wisdom or Charisma instead of Strength when determining your throwing range.

scavengers-reach.name: Portée du Charognard
scavengers-reach.description:
Path of the Corsair: niveau 3

You learn the force disarm pouvoir de la Force, which does not count against your total powers known. De plus, you can use Double Strike Force-Empowered Self option to deal kinetic dégâts when you cast it as your action and la cible fails its sauvegarde. Finally, when you cast the force disarm pouvoir de la Force, disarm a blaster weapon, and catch it, you can reload the weapon as a part of the same action.

remote-start.name: Démarrage à Distance
remote-start.description:
Path of the Corsair: niveau 7

You learn to easily detonate primed explosives. As a action bonus on your turn, you can detonate a primed explosive you can see within 60 mètres. Alternatively, if you take the Attack action on your turn and you are wielding a blaster weapon with which you are proficient, vous pouvez choisir to shoot the explosive rather than use your action bonus to detonate it as long as you wouldn't have disavantage on the attack roll.

When you do so, the explosive immediately detonates, and you have avantage on the jet de dégâts you make with that explosive.

disruptive-throw.name: Lancer Disruptif
disruptive-throw.description:
Path of the Forceblade: niveau 13

When you are la cible of a attaque à distance, and the source is within range of your saber throw pouvoir de la Force, you can use your réaction to throw your forceblade at the source of the attack. Make a ranged force attack. En cas de contacter, this attack deals dégâts using your Kinetic Combat die instead of the weapon's dégâts die and you impose disavantage on the triggering attack roll.

twin-saber-throw.name: Lancer de Sabres Jumeaux
twin-saber-throw.description:
Path of the Forceblade: 7th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

When you cast saber throw while wielding your forceblade, you can attack the same target multiple times.

De plus, when you deal dégâts to a creature within 30 mètres of you with your forceblade, you can use your action bonus to teleport to within 5 mètres of cette créature and make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against cette créature. This attack uses your Kinetic Combat die instead of your weapon's dégâts die. You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

forceblade-mastery.name: Maîtrise de la Lame de Force
forceblade-mastery.description:
Path of the Forceblade: niveau 18

You've mastered controlling your forceblade with your mind, using it to keep your enemies at bay. As an action, you can telekinetically control your forceblade and have it strike any number of creatures within 10 mètres of you, spending 1 point de Force per target. Each target must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attaque d'arme rolls with that weapon). On a failed sauvegarde, it takes dégâts using your Kinetic Combat die + half your sentinel niveau (rounded down), is pushed back 10 mètres and knocked à terre.

forceblade-bond.name: Lien de la Lame de Force
forceblade-bond.description:
Path of the Forceblade: niveau 3

You learn how to bond with a light- or vibro-weapon through the Force, making it part of you.

You perform the ritual over the course of 1 hour, which can be done during a repos court. The weapon must be within your reach throughout the ritual, at the conclusion of which you contact the weapon and forge the bond, gaining the following benefits:

  • You can't be disarmed of that weapon while you are conscious.
  • If the weapon is within 60 mètres of you and you can see it, you can summon that weapon as a action bonus on your turn, causing it to travel instantly to you. If you have a free hand, you catch the weapon. Otherwise, it lands at your mètres.
  • You can use Wisdom or Charisma instead of Strength or Dexterity for the attack and jet de dégâtss.

You can have two weapons bonded to you in this way at a time, and you can summon both of them to you with the same action bonus.

phasethrow.name: Lancer de Phase
phasethrow.description:
Path of the Forceblade: niveau 3

You learn the saber throw pouvoir de la Force, which does not count against your total powers known. De plus, you no longer have disavantage on the attack roll with it if you are within 5 mètres of a hostile creature, and you can use the Double Strike Force-Empowered Self options when you cast it as your action and hit a target. Finally, quand vous contactez a creature with the saber throw pouvoir de la Force, you deal additional dégâts equal to half your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of +1) if it doesn't already include that modificateur.

ichor-conjuring.name: Invocation d'Ichor
ichor-conjuring.description:
Path of Sorcellerie : niveaux 3 et 11

You learn to call on the spirits of beasts and grant them ichorous form. Une fois par chacun de vos tours, when you cast a pouvoir de la Force and deal necrotic dégâts to a creature, you can conjure a familiar within 5 mètres of it (no action required). The familiar takes the form of a humanoid or beast made of green, glowing smoke, and it lasts pendant 1 minute, until you dismiss it as a action bonus, until you manifest another spirit, or until you're incapacitated or die.

Your familiar has an AC equal to your universal force sauvegarde DD, 1 point de vie, and immunity to all conditions. If it has to make a jet de sauvegarde, it uses your jet de sauvegarde bonus for the roll. It is the same size as you regardless of its appearance, and it occupies its own space. On your turn, you can mentally command the familiar to move up to 30 mètres in any direction (no action required). If your familiar is ever more than 30 mètres from you at the end of your turn, it is destroyed. While you have a familiar, you gain the following benefits:

  • As a action bonus, you can use your magicks to teleport, swapping places with your familiar at a cost of 15 mètres of your movement, regardless of the distance between the two of you.
  • When you take the Attack action on your turn, any attack you make with that action can originate from your space or the familiar's space. You make this choice for each attack.
  • When a creature that you can see within 5 mètres of your familiar moves at least 5 mètres away from it, you can use your réaction to make an attaque d'opportunité against cette créature as if you were in the familiar's space.

À partir du niveau 11, you can summon your familiar when you deal dégâts with any pouvoir de la Force, instead of just necrotic. De plus, you can summon your familiar quand vous utilisez a Force-Empowered Self option on your turn.

waters-of-life.name: Eaux de la Vie
waters-of-life.description:
Path of Sorcellerie : niveaux 13 et 17

You've learned to absorb the fleeting magicks of your familiar. When your familiar is destroyed by taking dégâts, vous pouvez choisir to grant points de vie temporaires equal to [[/r 2d8]] + your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice) to one friendly creature de votre choix you can see within 30 mètres.

You can use this feature five times. You gain an additional use at niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

stormcaller.name: Invocateur de Tempête
stormcaller.description:
Path of Sorcellerie : niveau 18

You've learned to command the elements to summon a fierce storm in a rayon de 9 mètres around you. As an action, you can gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • You gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed.
  • You have resistance to energy, lightning, and necrotic dégâts.
  • Whenever a hostile creature enters this radius for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it takes 10 lightning dégâts.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

wild-power.name: Puissance Sauvage
wild-power.description:
Path of Sorcellerie : niveau 3

You learn the enfeeble pouvoir de la Force, which does not count against your total powers known. De plus, you can use Wisdom or Charisma as your forcecasting ability for it, and you can use the Double Strike Force-Empowered Self option when you cast it as your action and la cible fails its sauvegarde. Finally, you add your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of one) to jet de dégâtss with it.

natures-vigor.name: Vigueur de la Nature
natures-vigor.description:
Path of Sorcellerie : niveau 7

You've learned to attune your senses with nature. If you spend at least 1 minute meditating while in nature, you gain the following benefits for 1 hour:

  • You ignore difficult terrain caused by nature.
  • You can understand plants within 30 mètres of you. They can telepathically communicate simple ideas to you, including memories from within the past day.
  • You can command plants within 30 mètres of you to create difficult terrain, or other tasks at the GM's discretion (no action required).

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

beastwarden.name: Gardien des Bêtes
beastwarden.description:
Path of Sorcellerie : niveaux 13 et 17

Your bond with your beast companion strengthens, granting the following benefits while your beast companion is within 30 mètres of you:

  • When you cast a pouvoir de la Force cette cibles only yourpersonnelle, and your beast companion is within range, you can also target your beast companion with that power.
  • If you or your beast have darkvision and the other doesn't, the other gains it with the same radius. If you both have darkvision, you both use the larger radius of the two, which then increases by 30 mètres.
  • If you or your beast have avantage on Perception checks and the other doesn't, the other gains avantage on Perception checks. If you both have avantage on Perception checks, when either of you makes a Perception check with avantage, you can reroll one of the dice once.

This radius increases to 60 mètres at niveau 17.

dance-of-death.name: Danse de la Mort
dance-of-death.description:
Performance Practice: niveau 13

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour make a attaque d'arme against any number of creatures within 5 mètres of you, with a separate attack roll for each target. Vous pouvez choisir to deal Sneak Attack dégâts to chaque créature you hit, but you can only roll half your number of Sneak Attack dice per creature.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

master-of-dance.name: Maître de la Danse
master-of-dance.description:
Performance Practice: niveau 17

Your confidence when putting on a show has extended into combat. You add your Charisma modificateur to initiative checks. De plus, any creature who fails a jet de sauvegarde against your Dazzling Step sauvegarde DD has disavantage on the first attack roll they make against you each turn jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

artful-dancer.name: Danseur Agile
artful-dancer.description:
Performance Practice: niveau 3

Your training with music and dancing grants you certain benefits. You gain maîtrise in the Performance skill and one musical instrument de votre choix.

De plus, while you are not wearing armor or wielding a medium or heavy shield, you can add half your Charisma modificateur to your AC as long as it doesn't already include that modificateur.

dazzling-steps.name: Pas Éblouissants
dazzling-steps.description:
Performance Practice: niveau 3

You learn to conduct impressive displays of grace and speed in combat. While you aren't wearing medium or heavy armor or wielding a medium or heavy shield, and you take the Attack action on your turn and attack with a weapon with either the light or finesse properties, your walking speed increases by 10 mètres until the end of the turn, and if you deal Sneak Attack dégâts, you may choose to forgo two of your Sneak Attack dice to make the attack a dazzling step.

Some of your dazzling steps require your target to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the dazzling step's effects. The jet de sauvegarde DD is calculated as follows:

_

Dazzling Step sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Charisma modificateur

_

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.pCVDhJLMXKcqYjwO]{Defensive Step}

You defend yourpersonnelle from further attack. Roll two Sneak Attack dice. You gain points de vie temporaires that last jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour equal to the amount rolled.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.QaovuUqteTxMXKuK]{Mobile Step}

You twist and twirl around la cible. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. A Huge or larger creature automatically succeeds. On a failed sauvegarde, it is pushed back 5 mètres, and you can immediately move into the space it just vacated without provoking attaque d'opportunités.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.ykLS0YLVcNrh7kFZ]{Offensive Step}

Choose another creature that you can see within your reach. The creature must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, roll two Sneak Attack dice. The creature takes dégâts equal to the amount rolled. This dégâts is of the same as your weapon's dégâts.

defensive-step.name: Pas Défensif
defensive-step.description: You defend yourpersonnelle from further attack. Roll two Sneak Attack dice. You gain points de vie temporaires that last jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour equal to the amount rolled.

mobile-step.name: Pas Mobile
mobile-step.description: You twist and twirl around la cible. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde. A Huge or larger creature automatically succeeds. On a failed sauvegarde, it is pushed back 5 mètres, and you can immediately move into the space it just vacated without provoking attaque d'opportunités.

offensive-step.name: Pas Offensif
offensive-step.description: Choose another creature that you can see within your reach. The creature must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, roll two Sneak Attack dice. The creature takes dégâts equal to the amount rolled. This dégâts is of the same as your weapon's dégâts.

flexible-body.name: Corps Flexible
flexible-body.description:
Pratique de performance : niveau 9

Vous êtes capable d'utiliser votre talent acrobatique pour prendre le dessus au combat. Vous pouvez utiliser le bonus d'action accordé par votre action de ruse pour pousser ou faire trébucher une créature. Ce faisant, vous pouvez effectuer un test de Dextérité (Acrobatie) au lieu d'un test de Force (Athlétisme).

De plus, vous ignorez désormais les terrains difficiles, vous pouvez vous déplacer dans les espaces occupés par des créatures hostiles et vous pouvez vous faufiler dans des espaces plus petits sans dépenser de mouvement supplémentaire.

field-surgeon.name: Chirurgien de Campagne
field-surgeon.description:
Physician Pursuit: niveaux 6 et 11

Whenever you expend dés de supériorité to restore points de vie or grant points de vie temporaires to a creature, you can roll an additional die [[/r d6]] and add it to the roll. This die increases to [[/r d8]] at niveau 9, [[/r d10]] at niveau 13, and [[/r d12]] at niveau 17.

De plus, whenever you expend dés de supériorité to restore points de vie or grant points de vie temporaires to a creature, if la créature is la cible of your Critical Analysis, you can instead choose the maximum on both dice. Once you've used this feature, you must finish a short or repos long before you can use it again. À partir du niveau 11, you can use it twice before a rest, but only once on the same turn.

panacea.name: Panacée
panacea.description:
Physician Pursuit: niveau 17

You've developed the formula to concoct a cure-all miracle solution: a panacea. Over the course of 10 minutes, you can expend rare medical supplies worth 1,000 cr to create your panacea in a simple syringe. The panacea retains its potency for 24 hours. As a action bonus, a creature can use the panacea. Alternatively, as an action, they can administer it to another creature within 5 mètres.

La cible has its épuisement niveau reduced by one and regains all of its points de vie. If la cible is diseased, empoisonné, paralysé, or étourdi, the condition ends.

Once you create a panacea, you can't create another until you finish a repos long.

medical-practitioner.name: Praticien Médical
medical-practitioner.description:
Physician Pursuit: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise with biochemist's kits and your choice of the Medicine or Nature skills. De plus, you can't have disavantage on checks you make with them.

remote-healer.name: Guérisseur à Distance
remote-healer.description:
Physician Pursuit: niveau 3

You have learned to deploy medicine from a range. When you use a maneuver targeting an ally that is la cible of your Critical Analysis feature, that maneuver's range becomes 30 mètres.

resuscitate.name: Réanimer
resuscitate.description:
Physician Pursuit: niveau 9

Grâce à vos études de médecine, vous avez appris à retarder une mort apparemment inévitable. En bonus d'action, vous pouvez stabiliser une créature que vous pouvez contacter et qui a 0 point de vie.

De plus, en tant qu'action, vous pouvez vous occuper d'une créature que vous pouvez contacter et qui est morte depuis la fin de votre dernier tour. La créature récupère immédiatement 1 point de vie et se stabilise. Une fois que vous avez utilisé cette fonctionnalité, vous devez effectuer un short ou un repos bien avant de pouvoir l'utiliser à nouveau.

beguiling-presence.name: Présence Envoûtante
beguiling-presence.description:
Poursuite du Politicien : niveau 17

Humanoids within 60 mètres are particularly susceptible to your presence. Humanoids within range have disavantage on jet de sauvegardes against any charm or fear effects that originate from you.

motivating-diplomat.name: Diplomate Motivant
motivating-diplomat.description:
Poursuite du Politicien : niveau 3

When you are la cible of your Critical Analysis feature, you and all allies within 10 mètres of you gain a bonus to their AC equal to half your Critical Analysis modificateur de caractéristique.

silver-tongue.name: Langue d'Argent
silver-tongue.description:
Poursuite du Politicien : niveau 3

Vous apprenez votre choix de deux langues et votre choix de compétence Charisme. De plus, vous ne pouvez pas avoir de désavantage sur les chèques que vous effectuez avec.

force-of-personality.name: Force de la Personnalité
force-of-personality.description:
Poursuite du Politicien : niveau 6

As an action, you suggest a course of activity (limited to a sentence or two) to influence a creature you can see within range that can hear and understand you. Creatures that can't be charmé are immune to this effect. The suggestion must be worded in such a manner as to make the course of action sound reasonable. Asking la créature to stab itpersonnelle, throw itpersonnelle onto a spear, immolate itpersonnelle, or do some other obviously harmful act ends the effect.

La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your maneuver sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible is charmé by you, and it pursues the course of action you described to the best of its ability. The suggested course of action can continue for up to 24 hours. If the suggested activity can be completed in a shorter time, the effect ends when the subject finishes what it was asked to do.

You can also specify conditions that will trigger a special activity during the duration. For example, you might suggest that an officer givers her gun to the first smuggler she meets. If the condition isn't met before the effect ends, the activity isn't performed.

If you or any of your companions dégâts la cible, the effect ends.

You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

reassemble.name: Réassembler
reassemble.description:
Poursuite du Politicien : niveau 9

You may use to a action bonus to call your allies towards you. When you do so, choose a number of creatures that you can see within 60 mètres of you equal to your Critical Analysis modificateur de caractéristique (minimum of one). They can use their réaction to immediately move a number of mètres equal to their speed. This movement does not provoke attaque d'opportunités, and they must end this movement closer to you than they started.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

tireless-spirit.name: Esprit Infatigable
tireless-spirit.description:
Spécialiste prétorien : niveau 10

Lorsque vous lancez un jet d'initiative et qu'il ne vous reste plus aucune utilisation d'Esprit combatif, vous récupérez une utilisation.

rapid-strike.name: Frappe Rapide
rapid-strike.description:
Spécialiste prétorien : niveau 15

Vous apprenez à échanger la précision contre des frappes rapides. Si vous effectuez l'action Attaque à votre tour et avez un avantage sur un jet d'attaque contre l'une des cibles, vous pouvez renoncer à l'avantage de ce jet pour effectuer une attaque d'arme supplémentaire contre cette cible, dans le cadre de la même action. Vous ne pouvez le faire qu'une fois par tour.

strength-before-weakness.name: La Force Avant la Faiblesse
strength-before-weakness.description:
Praetorian Specialist: niveau 18

Your fighting spirit can delay the grasp of death. If you take dégâts that reduces you to 0 points de vie, you can use your réaction to delay falling inconscient, and you can immediately take an extra turn. While you have 0 points de vie during that extra turn, taking dégâts causes death jet de sauvegarde failures as normal, and three death jet de sauvegarde failures can still kill you. When the extra turn ends, you fall inconscient if you still have 0 points de vie.

Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

bonus-proficiency.name: Maîtrise Supplémentaire
bonus-proficiency.description:
Praetorian Specialist: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise in one of the following skills de votre choix: Insight, Lore, Performance, or Persuasion. Alternatively, you learn one language de votre choix.

fighting-spirit.name: Esprit Combaif
fighting-spirit.description:
Spécialiste prétorien : niveau 3

Votre intensité au combat peut vous protéger et vous aider à frapper juste. En bonus d'action à votre tour, vous pouvez donner à votre personnel un avantage sur tous les jets d'attaque d'arme jusqu'à la fin du tour en cours. Ce faisant, vous gagnez également 5 points de vie temporaires. Le nombre de points de vie augmente lorsque vous atteignez certains niveaux dans cette classe, passant à 10 au niveau 10 et 15 au niveau 15.

Vous pouvez utiliser cette fonctionnalité trois fois. Vous regagnez tous les usages dépensés lorsque vous terminez un repos long.

resilient-retainer.name: Serviteur Résilient
resilient-retainer.description:
Praetorian Specialist: niveau 7

Your discipline and attention to detail allow you to excel in social situations. You gain maîtrise in Persuasion.

De plus, your personnelle-control also causes you to gain maîtrise in Wisdom jet de sauvegardes. If you already have this maîtrise, you instead gain maîtrise in Intelligence or Charisma jet de sauvegardes (your choice).

improved-danger-sense.name: Sens du Danger Amélioré
improved-danger-sense.description:
Approche de Pr?cision : niveau 10

While raging, when you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde to take only half dégâts against effects that you can see, such as traps and powers, you are treated as proficient in the sauvegarde, and you instead take no dégâts si vous réussissez on a jet de sauvegarde, and only half dégâts si vous échouez.

calm-within-the-storm.name: Calme dans la Tempête
calm-within-the-storm.description:
Approche de Pr?cision : niveau 14

The precision with which you act during your rage causes you to become a storm of reactive lethality. When you use your Reckless Attack feature, you can make a number of attaque d'opportunités equal to your bonus de maîtrise without using your réaction, and when a creature within 5 mètres of you misses you with an attack, you can use your réaction to make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps using Dexterity against cette créature. You can only take one réaction per turn.

careful-steps.name: Pas Prudents
careful-steps.description:
Approche de Pr?cision : niveau 3

You gain skills that represent your precise movement. You gain maîtrise in your choice of Acrobatics or Stealth. While raging, you have avantage on checks you make with the chosen skill.

focused-rage.name: Rage Focalisée
focused-rage.description:
Approche de Pr?cision : niveau 3

You hone your rage to a razor sharp focus. While raging, quand vous faites a attaque d'arme au corps à corps using Dexterity, you add your rage dégâts to the jet de dégâts. De plus, you can use your Reckless Attack feature to give you avantage on attaque d'arme au corps à corpss using Dexterity during your turn.

battle-anticipation.name: Anticipation du Combat
battle-anticipation.description:
Approche de Pr?cision : niveau 6

While raging, your critical hit range with attaque d'arme au corps à corpss using Dexterity increases by 1.

prey-on-the-weak.name: S'attaquer aux Faibles
prey-on-the-weak.description:
Predator Technique: niveau 11

Quand vous contactez une créature with a attaque d'arme, and la créature is below its point de vie maximum, the next attack roll made against cette créature before the end of your next turn by someone other than you has avantage.

hunting-party.name: Partie de Chasse
hunting-party.description:
Predator Technique: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can use a action bonus to direct one of your companions to strike. When you do so, choose a friendly creature who can see or hear you. That creature can immediately use its réaction to make one attaque d'arme.

You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses of it when you finish a repos long.

on-the-hunt.name: En Chasse
on-the-hunt.description:
Predator Technique: niveau 15

When you use your Predator's Resolve feature, a number of friendly creatures you choose up to your Intelligence modificateur that you can see within 30 mètres of you also gain the benefits of the feature.

mark-of-the-predator.name: Marque du Prédateur
mark-of-the-predator.description:
Predator Technique: niveau 3

Si la cible de votre fonction Carrière du Ranger peut vous voir, un certain nombre de créatures amies que vous choisissez selon votre modificateur d'Intelligence ont un avantage sur les tests de Dextérité (Furtivité) faits pour vous cacher. it.

predators-resolve.name: Résolution du Prédateur
predators-resolve.description:
Predator Technique: niveau 7

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • You have avantage on Constitution jet de sauvegardes.
  • At the start of each of your turns, you gain points de vie temporaires equal to your Constitution modificateur (minimum of one).
  • When you use your Hunting Party feature and la cible of the attack is your Ranger's Quarry, your ally gains a bonus to dégâts on the attack equal to your Ranger's Quarry Damage Die.

Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a short or repos long.

unrelenting-advance.name: Avancée Inlassable
unrelenting-advance.description:
Pugnacity Practice: niveau 13

You have avantage on test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes against effects that would grapple or restrain you. De plus, if you are agrippé or entravé, and you could use your action to attempt to end the effect, you can instead use your action bonus.

razor-focus.name: Focalisation Précise
razor-focus.description:
Pugnacity Practice: niveau 17

You can enter a hyper-focused state of mind pendant 1 minute as a action bonus. You must maintain concentration, as if concentrating on a power. For the duration, each time you successfully deal Sneak Attack dégâts against a creature, you gain two additional Sneak Attack dice, cumulatively, as your attacks become increasingly precise. These additional dice are lost when your focus ends, whether through failing to maintain concentration or after 1 minute.

The first time you use this feature, you suffer no ill effect. If you use this feature again before you finish a repos long, you suffer one niveau of épuisement each time you use it.

blitz-attack.name: Attaque Éclair
blitz-attack.description:
Pugnacity Practice: niveau 3

You've learned ways to use your martial ability to boost your combat performance. When you deal Sneak Attack dégâts, you may choose to forgo two of your Sneak Attack dice to make the attack a blitz attack.

Some of your blitz attacks require your target to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the attack's effects. The jet de sauvegarde DD is as follows:

_

Blitz Attack sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Strength or Dexterity modificateur (your choice)

_

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.dLwhDdiunbMM8OBO]{Demoralizing Attack}

La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it is effrayé of you jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.PvT4VmnqjwB4PgJd]{Diverting Attack}

Roll two of your Sneak Attack dice. The first time la cible would deal dégâts before the start of your next turn, that dégâts is reduced by an amount equal to the resulting roll.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.xzhBu7Ohpf3P0Qw1]{Warmonger's Attack}

If la cible makes an attack against you or an allied creature within 5 mètres of you before the start of your next turn, you can use your réaction to make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against it.

demoralizing-attack.name: Attaque Démoralisante
demoralizing-attack.description: La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it is effrayé of you jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

diverting-attack.name: Attaque de Diversion
diverting-attack.description: Roll two of your Sneak Attack dice. The first time la cible would deal dégâts before the start of your next turn, that dégâts is reduced by an amount equal to the resulting roll.

tools-of-the-trade.name: Outils du Métier
tools-of-the-trade.description:
Pugnacity Practice: niveau 3

You've learned to move swiftly while wielding larger armaments. You gain maîtrise with medium armor and martial vibroweapons. If you are already proficient in medium armor, you instead gain maîtrise in heavy armor. De plus, you can deal Sneak Attack dégâts with any weapon, as long as it does not have the heavy or special properties.

Lastly, you don't need avantage on your attack roll to use your Sneak Attack if no creature other than your target is within 5 mètres of you, as long as la cible of the attack is below its point de vie maximum. All the other rules for the Sneak Attack class feature still apply to you.

warmongers-attack.name: Attaque du Belliciste
warmongers-attack.description: If la cible makes an attack against you or an allied creature within 5 mètres of you before the start of your next turn, you can use your réaction to make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against it.

harmonious-rakatan.name: Rakatan Harmonieux
harmonious-rakatan.description:
Rakatan Commande : niveau 11

Vous pouvez utiliser vos fonctionnalités Focus en utilisant vos points techniques. Lorsque vous faites cela, vos points techniques maximum sont réduits de 1 jusqu'à ce que vous complétiez un repos long.

De plus, vous êtes constamment sous les effets de la technique de pouvoir detect enhancement. En tant qu'action, vous pouvez lancer la technique de pouvoir analyze sans dépenser de points technologiques. Lorsque vous faites cela, l'amélioration detect est supprimée et vous ne pouvez plus le faire tant que vous n'avez pas terminé une position courte ou longue.

tech-mastery.name: Maîtrise Technique
tech-mastery.description:
Rakatan Order: niveau 17

Vous apprenez et pouvez lancer une technique de pouvoir de 5ème niveau une fois par repos sans dépenser de points techniques.

focused-tech.name: Technologie Focalisée
focused-tech.description:
Rakatan Order: niveau 6

You can cast your pouvoir techniques using your focus points. When you do so, your maximum focus points are reduced by 1 until you complete a repos long.

De plus, quand vous utilisez a Focus feature, you gain the following tech enhancements. Each effect costs 1 tech point.

Flurry of Blows. Quand vous contactez avec an attack with Flurry of Blows, you can deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] dégâts of the same type.

Patient Defense. While under the effects of your Patient Defense, when you are hit by an attack, you can use your réaction and roll your Martial Arts die to increase your AC against the attack.

Step of the Wind. While under the effects of your Step of the Wind, you can become immune to the shocked condition, and have each slowed niveau only reduce your speed by 5 mètres, unless it would reduce your speed to 0.

elegant-maneuver.name: Maneuver Élégant
elegant-maneuver.description:
Ruffian Practice: niveau 13

Vous pouvez utiliser un bonus d'action à votre tour pour obtenir un avantage au prochain test de Dextérité (Acrobatie) ou de Force (Athlétisme) que vous effectuez au cours du même tour.

master-duelist.name: Maître Duelliste
master-duelist.description:
Ruffian Practice: niveau 17

Votre maîtrise de la lame vous permet de transformer l'échec en succès au combat. Si vous ratez un jet d'attaque, vous pouvez le relancer avec avantage. Une fois que vous l'avez fait, vous ne pouvez plus utiliser cette fonctionnalité tant que vous n'avez pas terminé un short ou un repos long.

blade-defense.name: Défense de Lame
blade-defense.description: Vous tentez de déterminer la prochaine frappe de votre cible. Lancez deux dés d'attaque sournoise, et la cible doit réaliser un jet de sauvegarde de Charisme. En cas d'échec de la sauvegarde, votre CA augmente du montant le plus élevé lancé sur les dés contre la première attaque qu'il effectue contre vous avant le début de votre prochain tour. Lors d'une sauvegarde réussie, votre CA augmente à la place du montant inférieur.

disarming-strike.name: Frappe Désarmante
disarming-strike.description: You attempt to disarm a creature with your attack. La cible must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde or be forced to drop one item de votre choix that it's holding. If you have a free hand, you can catch the item. Otherwise, it lands at your mètres.

fancy-footwork.name: Jeu de Jambes Agile
fancy-footwork.description: Lancez deux dés d’attaque sournoise. Votre vitesse augmente de 5 fois le résultat le plus élevé des deux dés, et vous ignorez les terrains difficiles jusqu'à la fin de votre tour en cours.

nimble-step.name: Pas Agile
nimble-step.description:
Ruffian Practice: niveau 3

You learn to fluidly strike and maneuver through combat. When you deal Sneak Attack dégâts to a creature, you may choose to forgo two of your Sneak Attack Dice in order to maneuver across the battlefield.

Some of your fancy footworks require your target to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the debilitating strike's effects. The jet de sauvegarde DD is calculated as follows:

_

Nimble Step sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Dexterity modificateur.

_

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.od16cTmbcCNjRtn3]{Blade Defense}

You attempt to determine your target's next strike. Roll two Sneak Attack dice, and la cible must make a Charisma jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, your AC increases by the higher amount rolled on the dice against the first attack it makes against you before the start of your next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, your AC instead increases by the lower amount.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.cB9pV0vAvbiXq35w]{Disarming Strike}

You attempt to disarm a creature with your attack. La cible must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde or be forced to drop one item de votre choix that it's holding. If you have a free hand, you can catch the item. Otherwise, it lands at your mètres.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.9bNPNvyMPmqckMHF]{Fancy Footwork}

Roll two Sneak Attack dice. Your speed increases by 5 x the greater result of the two dice, and you ignore difficult terrain until the end of your current turn.

rakish-audacity.name: Audace du Fanfaron
rakish-audacity.description:
Ruffian Practice: niveau 3

Your unmistakable confidence propels you into battle. Vous pouvez ajouter your Charisma modificateur to your initiative rolls.

De plus, you don't need avantage on your attack roll to use your Sneak Attack if no creature other than your target is within 5 mètres of you, as long as la cible of the attack is within 5 mètres of you. All the other rules for the Sneak Attack class feature still apply to you.

Finally, during your turn, if you make a attaque au corps à corps against a creature, cette créature can't make attaque d'opportunités against you for the rest of your turn.

panache.name: Panache
panache.description:
Ruffian Practice: niveau 9

Your charm becomes extraordinarily beguiling. As an action, you can make a Charisma (Persuasion) check contested by a creature's Wisdom (Insight) check. The creature must be able to hear you, and the two of you must share a language.

Si vous réussissez on the check and la créature is hostile to you, it has disavantage on attack rolls against targets other than you and can't make attaque d'opportunités against targets other than you. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute, until one of your companions attacks la cible or affects it with a power, or until you and la cible are more than 60 mètres apart.

Si vous réussissez on the check and la créature isn't hostile to you, it is charmé by you pendant 1 minute. While charmé, it regards you as a friendly acquaintance. Cet effet ends immediately if you or your companions do anything harmful to it.

ion-pulse.name: Pulse Ionique
ion-pulse.description:
Saboteur Practice: niveau 13

As a action bonus on your turn, you can expend one or more of your tracker droid's Hit Dice to have it emit an pulse of ion energy. Each creature within 5 mètres of your tracker droid must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. A creature takes ion dégâts for each Hit Die expended in this way on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much as on a successful one. The size of the dégâts die equals the size of your tracker droid's Hit Die. Any electronics not being worn or carried within the blast radius are disabled until rebooted.

sabotage.name: Sabotage
sabotage.description:
Saboteur Practice: niveau 17

You gain the ability to sabotage a pouvoir technique in the process of being cast. When a hostile creature casts a pouvoir technique, and you are la cible of the pouvoir technique or within its area of effect, you can use your réaction to force cette créature to make an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a successful sauvegarde, the power is cast as normal.

On a failed sauvegarde, you negate the power's effects, and the caster takes [[/r 1d6]] lightning dégâts per niveau of the power it was casting. De plus, on a failed sauvegarde, the caster's tech focus used to cast the pouvoir technique is overloaded and can't be used to cast pouvoir techniques pendant 1 minute.

At the end of each of the caster's turns, it can repeat the Intelligence jet de sauvegarde. On a success, it can use the tech focus to cast pouvoir techniques again.

Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

powered-ambush.name: Embuscade Alimentée
powered-ambush.description:
Saboteur Practice: niveau 9

If you are hidden from a creature when you cast a power on it, la créature has disavantage on any jet de sauvegarde it makes against the power this turn.

dosage-control.name: Contrôle du Dosage
dosage-control.description:
Sawbones Practice: niveau 13

Your knowledge of medicine allows you to partition and ration healing supplies very effectively, without impacting its potency. Over the course of 1 hour, which can be done during a rest, you can carefully measure and mark out dosages of a medpac within reach. The medpac can now be used twice before it is consumed.

At your DM's discretion, you may be able to use this feature on other pacs, stims, or adrenals, most likely involving an test de caractéristique to succeed.

self-sustain.name: Auto-Suffisance
self-sustain.description:
Sawbones Practice: niveau 17

Vous avez un avantage sur le jet de sauvegardes death.

De plus, lorsque vous êtes stabilisé, vous regagnez 1 point de vie. Une fois que vous avez utilisé cette fonctionnalité, vous ne pouvez plus l'utiliser tant que vous n'avez pas terminé un short ou un repos long.

bleeding-wound.name: Blessure Saignante
bleeding-wound.description: You attempt to create a lingering wound in la cible for one minute. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, at the start of each of la cible's turns, it takes true dégâts equal to one Sneak Attack die and repeats this jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

crippling-pain.name: Douleur Handicapante
crippling-pain.description: You attempt to cause distracting pain in la cible. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it has disavantage on attack rolls jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

debilitating-strike.name: Frappe Affaiblissante
debilitating-strike.description:
Sawbones Practice: niveau 3

You learn to apply your anatomical knowledge in direct combat, in order to hinder your targets. When you deal Sneak Attack dégâts to a creature, you may choose to forgo two of your Sneak Attack Dice in order to hinder la créature, provided they have the appropiate physiology.

Some of your debilitating strikes require your target to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the debilitating strike's effects. The jet de sauvegarde DD is calculated as follows:

_

Debilitating Strike sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Intelligence modificateur.

_

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.LXxXI9uoUX6pAssl]{Bleeding Wound}

You attempt to create a lingering wound in la cible for one minute. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, at the start of each of la cible's turns, it takes true dégâts equal to one Sneak Attack die and repeats this jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.Ori7PE7RvngSXv2m]{Crippling Pain}

You attempt to cause distracting pain in la cible. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it has disavantage on attack rolls jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.JMbGNwqWllRVK0ZW]{Hampering Shot}

You attempt to hamper la cible's movement. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it gains 1 slowed niveau and it makes Dexterity jet de sauvegardes with disavantage until the end of its next turn.

general-practice.name: Pratique Générale
general-practice.description:
Sawbones Practice: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise in Medicine, and you can use your Intelligence modificateur instead of your Wisdom modificateur for checks made with it.

De plus, you can expend one use of a traumakit to help revitalize your wounded allies during a repos court. If you or any friendly creatures within 30 mètres of you regain points de vie at the end of the repos court by spending one or more Hit Dice, each of those creatures regains an extra [[/r 1d6]] points de vie.

The extra points de vie increase when you reach certain niveaus in this class: to [[/r 1d8]] at niveau 9, to [[/r 1d10]] at niveau 13, and to [[/r 1d12]] at niveau 17.

swift-surgery.name: Chirurgie Rapide
swift-surgery.description:
Sawbones Practice: niveau 9

You know how to quickly patch up wounds, given the right tools. You are able to use a traumakit or administer a medpac as a action bonus, and quand vous utilisez a traumakit to stabilize a dying creature, cette créature also regains a number of points de vie equal to your Intelligence modificateur.

hostile-negotiations.name: Négociations Hostiles
hostile-negotiations.description:
Scrapper Practice: niveau 13

You gain maîtrise in Intimidation or Persuasion. De plus, while you are wielding a weapon with which you are proficient, you can't have disavantage on Charisma (Intimidation) and Charisma (Persuasion) checks, and if la cible would make a contested check, they can't have avantage on it.

one-with-the-dark.name: Un Avec le Côté Obscur
one-with-the-dark.description:
Shadow Killer Practice: niveau 13

You learn to partially enter the spirit realm. As an action, you can become invisible as an enhanced effect, along with anything you are wearing or carrying, for 1 hour or until you dismiss this effect (no action required). This invisibility ends early immediately after you deal dégâts to a creature or you force a creature to make a jet de sauvegarde.

Once you use this feature, you can't do so again until you finish a repos long. While you have no remaining uses of this feature, you can expend one of your poison doses from your Venomous feature to use this feature again. When you do so, your maximum doses decreases by 1 until the end of your next repos long.

venomous.name: Venimeux
venomous.description:
Shadow Killer Practice: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You gain maîtrise with the poisoner's kit, and you can apply a poison as a action bonus.

De plus, you learn to create a number of special poison vials. Over the course of a short or repos long, you can create two doses of poison. You must have a poisoner's kit in order to create these doses. Your doses can only be used by you, and they lose their potency at the end of your next short or repos long.

As an action, you can use one of your doses to coat one vibroweapon, one slug cartridge, or one wrist launcher dart. A creature hit by the coated weapon must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Intelligence modificateur), taking [[/r 1d4]] + your Intelligence modificateur poison dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one. Once applied, the poison retains potency pendant 1 minute before drying.

The quantity and dégâts of your doses increases at higher niveaus, to three and [[/r 2d4]] at niveau 5, four and [[/r 3d4]] at niveau 9, five and [[/r 4d4]] at niveau 13, and six and [[/r 5d4]] at niveau 17.

double-tap.name: Double Pression
double-tap.description:
Sharpshooter Practice: niveau 17

You've learned to capitalize when you have the avantage. When you take the Attack action and make an attack with avantage, vous pouvez choisir to forgo the avantage. If you do, you can make an additional attack against la cible or another creature within 5 mètres of it (no action required). Both attacks can benefit from your Sneak Attack dégâts, instead of only one.

back-blast.name: Souffle Arrière
back-blast.description:
Scrapper Practice: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise in all blasters with the burst or rapid property that lack the two-handed property. De plus, when a creature fails a jet de sauvegarde against the burst or rapid property of a weapon you control and with which you are proficient, you can apply your Sneak Attack dégâts to une créature dealt dégâts in this way as long as cette créature didn't have avantage on the sauvegarde.

When you reach niveau 9 in this class, when multiple creatures fail a jet de sauvegarde against the burst property of a weapon you control and with which you are proficient, you can divide your Sneak Attack dice amongst la cibles as you see fit.

brutal-hit.name: Coup Brutal
brutal-hit.description: You attempt to knock la cible à terre while within 15 mètres of it. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde or be knocked à terre.

dark-arts.name: Arts Sombres
dark-arts.description:
Shadow Killer Practice: niveau 3

You learn to combine poison and stealth to perform assassination techniques. When you deal Sneak Attack dégâts to a creature you may choose to forgo two of your Sneak Attack dice to make the attack a dark art.

_

Dark Arts sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Intelligence modificateur

_

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.aHBfa1ZH07NVmOPa]{Envenomed Art}

You attempt to poison la cible. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be empoisonné jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.hSNq5FqW7gtyIHYj]{Hallucinatory Art}

You attempt to blind la cible. La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or be aveuglé jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.RAGAo3IY01Fx2nQk]{Vanishing Art}

You feint to momentarily disappear from your target's purview. La cible must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failure, you can move up to 10 mètres without provoking attaque d'opportunités from la cible.

envenomed-art.name: Art Empoisonné
envenomed-art.description: You attempt to poison la cible. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be empoisonné jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

hallucinatory-art.name: Art Hallucinatoire
hallucinatory-art.description: You attempt to blind la cible. La cible must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or be aveuglé jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.

low-blow.name: Coup Bas
low-blow.description: You attempt to stun la cible while within 15 mètres of it. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be étourdi until the start of its next turn.

shank-shot.name: Tir de Tronche
shank-shot.description: You attempt to hamper la cible while within 15 mètres of it. La cible must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. If it fails, it gains 1 slowed niveau and makes Dexterity jet de sauvegardes with disavantage until the end of its next turn.

upper-hand.name: Avantage
upper-hand.description:
Scrapper Practice: niveau 3

You learn to use underhanded tactics to gain the upper hand. When you deal Sneak Attack dégâts to a creature, you may choose to forgo two of your Sneak Attack Dice in order to perform an upper hand technique.

Some of your upper hand techniques require your target to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the technique's effects. The jet de sauvegarde DD is calculated as follows:

_

Upper Hand sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Charisma modificateur

_

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.g4gArnIja0kXFvp2]{Brutal Hit}

You attempt to knock la cible à terre while within 15 mètres of it. La cible must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde or be knocked à terre.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.Iw8XuUzXZSTG4y3F]{Low Blow}
