You attempt to stun la cible while within 15 mètres of it. La cible must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be étourdi until the start of its next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.QzpHtv6deBiVOSdV]{Shank Shot}

You attempt to hamper la cible while within 15 mètres of it. La cible must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. If it fails, it gains 1 slowed niveau and makes Dexterity jet de sauvegardes with disavantage until the end of its next turn.

vanishing-art.name: Art de la Disparition
vanishing-art.description: You feint to momentarily disappear from your target's purview. La cible must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failure, you can move up to 10 mètres without provoking attaque d'opportunités from la cible.

sleight-of-foot.name: Prestidigitation du Pied
sleight-of-foot.description:
Scrapper Practice: niveau 9

When a creature moves to within 5 mètres of you, you can use your réaction to move up to half your speed away from la créature without provoking attaque d'opportunités. You must end this movement further from la créature than you started.

shades-of-night.name: Ombres de la Nuit
shades-of-night.description:
Shadow Killer Practice: niveau 17

Your familiarity with poisons and the spirit realm has opened up new paths of life and death for you. Your Evasion feature now applies to Constitution jet de sauvegardes as well as Dexterity jet de sauvegardes.

De plus, whenever you create poison using your Venomous feature, you can change the type de dégâts to acid, cold, fire, lightning or necrotic. When you do so, and you deal Sneak Attack dégâts with a weapon coated with your poison, you can also change your Sneak Attack dégâts to the chosen type.

distracting-shot.name: Tir de Distraction
distracting-shot.description:
Sharpshooter Practice: niveau 13

You are able to defend your compatriots from afar. When a friendly creature you can see within your weapon's normal range is la cible of a attaque à distance, or forced to make a jet de sauvegarde, and the source of the effect is within your weapon's normal range, you can use your réaction to make a attaque d'arme à distance against the source. En cas de contacter, instead of dealing dégâts, la cible of your attack has disavantage on the attack roll against your ally, or your ally has avantage on the jet de sauvegarde to resist the effect.

assume-the-position.name: Prendre Position
assume-the-position.description:
Sharpshooter Practice: niveau 3

You don't need avantage on your attack roll to use your Sneak Attack if your target is greater than 30 mètres from you and no enemies are within 5 mètres of you. De plus, standing up from à terre now only costs 5 mètres of movement.

De plus, you gain maîtrise with two martial blasters de votre choix.

disarming-shot.name: Tir Désarmant
disarming-shot.description: You attempt to disarm a creature with your attack. La cible must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde or be forced to drop one item de votre choix that it's holding. The object lands at its mètres.

penetrating-shot.name: Tir Pénétrant
penetrating-shot.description:
You attempt to dégâts another target with the same attack. Choose a second target within 15 mètres of and directly behind your initial target. If the original attack roll would hit the second target, it takes two dice worth of Sneak Attack dégâts.

The dégâts is of the same type dealt by the original attack.

placed-shots.name: Tirs Placés
placed-shots.description:
Sharpshooter Practice: niveau 3

You perfect the art of placing distant shots for maximum effectiveness in debilitating and controlling your enemies. When you deal Sneak Attack dégâts to a creature, you may choose to forgo two of your Sneak Attack dice to make the attack a placed shot.

Some of your placed shots require your target to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the placed shot's effects. The jet de sauvegarde DD is calculated as follows:

_

Placed Shot sauvegarde DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Dexterity modificateur

_

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.zMMq3eiVVvursHRE]{Disarming Shot}

You attempt to disarm a creature with your attack. La cible must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde or be forced to drop one item de votre choix that it's holding. The object lands at its mètres.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.pyRxcxvzCkg8BqBp]{Penetrating Shot}

You attempt to dégâts another target with the same attack. Choose a second target within 15 mètres of and directly behind your initial target. If the original attack roll would hit the second target, it takes two dice worth of Sneak Attack dégâts.

The dégâts is of the same type dealt by the original attack.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.QbRThfP6qBcJirDe]{Suppressive Shot}

You attempt to pin la cible to its location. La cible must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or be effrayé of you until the end of its next turn.

suppressive-shot.name: Tir de Suppression
suppressive-shot.description: You attempt to pin la cible to its location. La cible must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or be effrayé of you until the end of its next turn.

head-shot.name: Tir à la Tête
head-shot.description:
Sharpshooter Practice: niveau 9

Vous êtes à votre niveau le plus mortel lorsque vos ennemis ignorent le danger dans lequel ils se trouvent. Vous avez un avantage aux jets d'attaque contre toute créature qui n'a pas encore pris de tour en combat.

De plus, tout coup que vous infligez contre une créature surprise est un coup critique.

inspiring-surge.name: Sursaut Inspirant
inspiring-surge.description:
Shield Specialist: niveau 10

When you use your Action Surge feature, vous pouvez choisir une créature within 60 mètres of you that is allied with you. That creature can make one attaque d'arme au corps à corps ou à distance with its réaction, provided that it can see or hear you.

bulwark.name: Rempart
bulwark.description:
Shield Specialist: niveau 15

You can extend the benefit of your Indomitable feature to an ally. When you decide to use Indomitable to reroll an Intelligence, a Wisdom, or a Charisma jet de sauvegarde and you aren't incapacitated, vous pouvez choisir one ally within 60 mètres of you that also failed its jet de sauvegarde against the same effect. If cette créature can see or hear you, it can reroll its jet de sauvegarde and must use the new roll.

greater-inspiring-surge.name: Sursaut Inspirant Supérieur
greater-inspiring-surge.description:
Shield Specialist: niveau 18

Vous pouvez choisir two allies within 60 mètres of you, rather than one, when you using your Inspiring Surge feature.

stay-in-formation.name: Rester en Formation
stay-in-formation.description:
Spécialiste du bouclier : niveau 3

Vous pouvez effectuer l'action Garde comme bonus d'action à votre tour.

rallying-cry.name: Cri de Ralliement
rallying-cry.description:
Shield Specialist: niveau 7

When you use your Second Wind feature, vous pouvez choisir up to three allies within 60 mètres of you that can see or hear you. Each ally regains points de vie equal to your fighter niveau.

Vous pouvez choisir an additional ally at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17.

brutal-strikes.name: Frappes Brutales
brutal-strikes.description: The Force flowing through you grants you incredible strength. Your Force-Empowered Strikes and Improved Force-Empowered Strikes jet de dégâtss gain a minimum roll threshold, discussed in chapter 7. De plus, when you spend point de Forces to use your Force-Empowered Strikes feature, you gain points de vie temporaires equal to twice the number of points spent.

precise-reflection.name: Réflexion Précise
precise-reflection.description: Quand vous contactez avec an attack made by the saber reflect power, you can expend point de Forces to deal additional dégâts to la cible, which is the same type as the weapon's dégâts. The additional dégâts is [[/r 1d8]] for each point spent in this way. You can't deal more additional dégâts than the amount shown in the Focused Strikes column of the guardian table.

presence.name: Présence
presence.description:
Shien/Forme Djem So : niveau 15

You gain one of the following features. Choose Precise Reflection for Shien or Brutal Strikes for Djem So.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.72xZod8mzP1D8fiW]{Precise Reflection}

Quand vous contactez avec an attack made by the saber reflect power, you can expend point de Forces to deal additional dégâts to la cible, which is the same type as the weapon's dégâts. The additional dégâts is [[/r 1d8]] for each point spent in this way. You can't deal more additional dégâts than the amount shown in the Focused Strikes column of the guardian table.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.ikyNmVKFSnURBOhE]{Brutal Strikes}

The Force flowing through you grants you incredible strength. Your Force-Empowered Strikes and Improved Force-Empowered Strikes jet de dégâtss gain a minimum roll threshold, discussed in chapter 7. De plus, when you spend point de Forces to use your Force-Empowered Strikes feature, you gain points de vie temporaires equal to twice the number of points spent.

master-of-perseverance.name: Maître de la Persévérance
master-of-perseverance.description:
Shien/Forme Djem So : niveau 20

Your might overwhelms even the most implacable of foes. Your Strength and Constitution scores increase by 2. Your maximum for these scores increases by 2. De plus, you can use your action to gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • You have resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts from unenhanced weapons.
  • Une fois par tour, quand vous contactez with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps using Strength, you can use your Force-Empowered Strikes feature at 1st-niveau without expending point de Forces. You gain points de vie temporaires equal to the extra dégâts dealt.
  • When a creature within 5 mètres of you makes an attack roll against you, you can use your réaction to make a single attaque d'arme with avantage against cette créature. If the attack hits, you impose disavantage on the triggering attack roll.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

blade-barrier.name: Barrière de Lames
blade-barrier.description: On your turn, when you deal melee weapon dégâts that includes your Strength modificateur, you can forgo your Strength modificateur to the jet de dégâts, expend a use of your Channel the Force (no action required), and reduce your speed by half. If you do so, energy and kinetic dégâts you take from weapons before the end of your next turn is reduced by an amount equal to your Strength modificateur. You can not use this feature if you have moved more than half your speed this turn.

falling-avalanche.name: Avalanche Tombante
falling-avalanche.description: On your turn, you can expend a use of your Channel the Force (no action required) and reduce your speed by half to gain avantage on the next test de caractéristique or attack roll you make using Strength before the end of your next turn. You can not use this feature if you have moved more than half your speed this turn.

the-way-of-the-krayt-dragon.name: La Voie du Dragon Krayt
the-way-of-the-krayt-dragon.description:
Shien/Forme Djem So : niveau 3

As a action bonus, you can take a threatening stance for one minute. While in this stance, the first time you hit with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps using Strength each turn, vous pouvez choisir to deal additional dégâts equal to your Strength modificateur. If there is another creature within 5 mètres of the original target and within your reach, you can attempt to deal the additional dégâts to cette créature instead. If the original attack roll would hit the second creature, it takes dégâts equal to your Strength modificateur. The dégâts is of the same type dealt by the original attack.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

aggressive-negotiations.name: Négociations Agressives
aggressive-negotiations.description: You gain maîtrise in Intimidation or Persuasion. De plus, while you are wielding a weapon with which you are proficient, you can't have disavantage on Charisma (Intimidation) and Charisma (Persuasion) checks, and if la cible would make a contested check, they can't have avantage on it.

determination.name: Détermination
determination.description:
Shien/Forme Djem So : niveau 7

You gain one of the following features. Choose Aggressive Negotiations for Shien or Reliable Vigor for Djem So.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.pXWkqYaBM4T0YCXa]{Aggressive Negotiations}

You gain maîtrise in Intimidation or Persuasion. De plus, while you are wielding a weapon with which you are proficient, you can't have disavantage on Charisma (Intimidation) and Charisma (Persuasion) checks, and if la cible would make a contested check, they can't have avantage on it.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.B3rKYEpxP1D2sY8Z]{Reliable Vigor}

If the [[/r d20]] result for a test de Force or jet de sauvegarde is less than your guardian niveau, you can use your guardian niveau in place of the result. You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

reliable-vigor.name: Vigueur Fiable
reliable-vigor.description: Si le résultat [[/r d20]] d'un test de Force ou d'un jet de sauvegarde est inférieur à votre niveau de tuteur, vous pouvez utiliser votre niveau de tuteur à la place du résultat. Vous pouvez utiliser cette fonctionnalité trois fois. Vous gagnez une utilisation supplémentaire au 9ème, 13ème et au niveau 17. Vous récupérez toutes les utilisations dépensées lorsque vous terminez un repos long.

sarlaac-sweep.name: Balayage du Sarlaac
sarlaac-sweep.description:
Forme Shii-Cho : niveau 15

When a creature moves to within 5 mètres of you, you can use your réaction to make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against cette créature. If the attack hits, you can attempt to dégâts another creature within 5 mètres of the original target and within your reach. If the original attack roll would hit the second creature, it takes dégâts equal to your Strength or Dexterity modificateur (your choice). The dégâts is of the same type dealt by the original attack.

master-of-determination.name: Maître de la Détermination
master-of-determination.description:
Forme Shii-Cho : niveau 20

The erratic fluidity of your movement confounds even the most determined of foes. Your Strength or Dexterity and Wisdom or Charisma scores (your choice) increase by 2. Your maximum for these scores increases by 2. De plus, you can use your action to gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • You have resistance to kinetic, energy, and ion dégâts from weapons.
  • Attack rolls made against you can't have avantage.
  • When more than une créature is within 5 mètres of you, you gain a bonus to your Classe d'Armure equal to the number of creatures within 5 mètres of you, up to your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of one).
  • When you use your Sarlaac Sweep feature, you have avantage on the attack roll, and you can apply the bonus dégâts to every creature within 5 mètres of you.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

disarming-slash.name: Entaille Désarmante
disarming-slash.description: Quand vous contactez une créature with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can expend a use of your Channel the Force (no action required) to attempt to disarm la cible, forcing it to drop one item de votre choix that it's holding. The creature must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, it drops the object you choose. If you are within 5 mètres of la cible, and you have a free hand, you can catch the item. Otherwise, the object lands at its mètres.

the-way-of-the-sarlaac.name: La Voie du Sarlaac
the-way-of-the-sarlaac.description:
Forme Shii-Cho : niveau 3

As a action bonus, you can enter a frenetic stance for one minute. While in this stance, the first time you hit a creature with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps on your turn, it has disavantage on the next attaque au corps à corps roll it makes against you before the start of your next turn. De plus, if cette créature is within 5 mètres of you, it must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus de maîtrise + your Strength or Dexterity modificateur). On a failed sauvegarde, it is pushed back 5 mètres, and you can immediately move into the space it just vacated without provoking attaque d'opportunités.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

unpredictable-motion.name: Mouvement Imprévisible
unpredictable-motion.description:
Forme Shii-Cho : niveau 7

While you are wielding a light- or vibro-weapon, attaque d'opportunités against you are made at disavantage.

nemesis.name: Némésis
nemesis.description:
Slayer Technique: niveau 11

When you score a critical hit or reduce a creature to 0 points de vie on your turn, you can use your action bonus to force une créature de votre choix that you can see within 30 mètres of you to make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature becomes effrayé of you pendant 1 minute. At the end of each of la créature's turns it repeats this jet de sauvegarde, ending the effect on a success.

slayers-counter.name: Contre du Tueur
slayers-counter.description:
Slayer Technique: niveau 15

If la cible of your Ranger's Quarry feature forces you to make a jet de sauvegarde, you can use your réaction to make one attaque d'arme against it. You make this attack immediately before making the jet de sauvegarde. If your attack hits, you automatically succeed on the jet de sauvegarde, in addition to the attack's normal effects.

mark-of-the-slayer.name: Marque du Tueur
mark-of-the-slayer.description:
Slayer Technique: niveau 3

You immediately learn if la cible of your Ranger's Quarry feature has any dégâts immunities, resistances, or vulnerabilities and what they are. De plus, the first time you hit la cible of your Ranger's Quarry feature with a attaque d'arme each turn, it takes extra dégâts equal to your Ranger's Quarry Damage Die. The dégâts is of the same type as the weapon's dégâts.

slayers-pride.name: Fierté du Tueur
slayers-pride.description:
Slayer Technique: niveau 3

You have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against being effrayé.

supernatural-defense.name: Défense Surnaturelle
supernatural-defense.description:
Slayer Technique: niveau 7

Whenever la cible of your Ranger's Quarry forces you to make a jet de sauvegarde, or whenever you make an test de caractéristique to escape cette cibles grapple, you can use your réaction and roll your Ranger's Quarry Damage Die, adding it to the roll.

system-override.name: Contournement Système
system-override.description:
Slicer Pursuit: niveau 17

You know how to quickly activate anti-tech subroutines you have encoded into your wristpad. You can cast the diminish tech and tech override powers at niveau 3 without expending tech points. If la cible is la cible of your Critical Analysis, you have avantage on the techcasting test de caractéristique for these powers.

You can use this feature three times. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

hackers-disposition.name: Disposition du Hacker
hackers-disposition.description:
Slicer Pursuit: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise with slicer's kits and in the Technology skill. De plus, you can't have disavantage on checks you make with them.

potent-programming.name: Programmation Puissante
potent-programming.description:
Slicer Pursuit: niveau 6

When a creature succeeds on a jet de sauvegarde against an at-will pouvoir technique you cast that deals dégâts, la créature takes half the power's dégâts, but suffers no additional effects of the power.

redirect-error.name: Erreur de Redirection
redirect-error.description:
Slicer Pursuit: niveau 9

When la cible of your Critical Analysis feature casts a pouvoir technique that affects an area, you can use your réaction to cause that power to instead affect an area in a 10-foot-radius sphere centered on the caster.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a repos long before you can use it again.

unhindered-charge.name: Charge Sans Entrave
unhindered-charge.description:
Sokan Form: niveau 15

Wen you move at least 10 mètres before making a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you deal additional dégâts equal to your Strength modificateur.

unwavering-self.name: Soi Inébranlable
unwavering-self.description:
Sokan Form: niveaux 7 et 15

Si vous échouez a Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution jet de sauvegarde, you can reroll the die. You must use the new roll.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a repos long before you can use it again. At niveau 15 you can use this feature twice between repos longs.

master-of-persistence.name: Maître de la Persistance
master-of-persistence.description:
Sokan Form: niveau 20

You are an unrelenting force on the field of battle. Your Strength and Wisdom or Charisma scores (your choice) increase by 2. Your maximum for these scores increases by 2. De plus, you can use your action to gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • You have resistance to kinetic, energy, and ion dégâts from weapons.
  • You ignore effects that would reduce your speed.
  • Une fois par tour, when you push a creature, you can move up to 10 mètres as a part of this push without provoking attaque d'opportunités. If you end this movement within 5 mètres of cette créature, you can make one attaque d'arme au corps à corps (no action required).

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you complete a repos long.

high-ground-defense.name: Défense de la Hauteur
high-ground-defense.description: When an opponent within 5 mètres of you makes a attaque au corps à corps against you, you can use your réaction and expend a use of your Channel the Force to move to another space within 5 mètres of cette créature without provoking attaque d'opportunités, imposing disavantage on the roll. If the attack misses, you can attempt to shove la créature up to 10 mètres away from you as a part of that same réaction.

the-way-of-the-varactyl.name: La Voie du Varactyle
the-way-of-the-varactyl.description:
Sokan Form: niveau 3

As a action bonus, you can enter an unyielding stance for one minute. While in this stance, you have avantage on test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to shove, trip, and avoid being moved, and you ignore difficult terrain. De plus, une fois par tour, quand vous contactez with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can attempt to shove la cible up to 10 mètres away from you (no action required).

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you complete a repos long.

circle-of-shelter.name: Cercle d'Abri
circle-of-shelter.description:
Forme Soresu : 7th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You learn to fend off strikes directed at you or other creatures nearby. If you or a creature you can see within 5 mètres of you is hit by an attack, you can use your réaction to ward la créature if you're wielding a melee weapon or a shield. Roll [[/r 1d8]] and add the number rolled to la cible's AC against that attack. If the attack still hits, la cible has resistance against the attack's dégâts.

You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

master-of-resilience.name: Maître de la Résilience
master-of-resilience.description:
Forme Soresu : niveau 20

Your presence on the field of battle is an inspiration to your allies. Your Constitution and Wisdom or Charisma scores (your choice) increase by 2. Your maximum for those scores increases by 2. De plus, you can use your action to gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • You have resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts from unenhanced weapons.
  • When you use the saber reflect pouvoir de la Force, you can make a single attaque au corps à corps on an enemy within 5ft of you as a part of that same réaction.
  • You have avantage on Dexterity jet de sauvegardes, as do your allies within 30 mètres of you.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

advancing-defender.name: Défenseur Avançant
advancing-defender.description: When you cast the saber reflect power, you can expend a use of your Channel the Force to move up to 10 mètres as a part of that same réaction. This movement does not provoke attaque d'opportunités.

the-way-of-the-mynock.name: La Voie du Mynock
the-way-of-the-mynock.description:
Forme Soresu : niveau 3

As a action bonus, you can enter a defensive stance for one minute. As a part of this action bonus, and as a action bonus on each of your turns, you can cast the saber ward power. When you do so, you have a number of special réactions equal to your bonus de maîtrise that you can only use to cast the saber reflect pouvoir de la Force.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

stalkers-flurry.name: Rafale du Traqueur
stalkers-flurry.description:
Stalker Technique: niveau 11

Si vous avez un avantage sur une attaque d'arme contre une cible à votre tour, vous pouvez renoncer à cet avantage pour effectuer immédiatement une attaque d'arme supplémentaire contre la même cible en guise de bonus d'action.

concealment.name: Dissimulation
concealment.description:
Stalker Technique: 7th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You've become adept at evading creatures that rely on darkvision. While in darkness, you are invisible to any creature that relies on darkvision to see you in that darkness.

De plus, quand vous contactez a creature with a attaque d'arme à distance while hidden, you can force cette créature to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature's speed is reduced to 0 jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a short or repos long.

stalkers-dodge.name: Esquive du Traqueur
stalkers-dodge.description:
Stalker Technique: niveau 15

Whenever a creature attacks you and does not have avantage, you can use your réaction to impose disavantage on la créature's attack roll against you. You can use this feature before or after the attack roll is made, but it must be used before the outcome of the roll is determined.

accomplished-ambusher.name: Embuscade Accomplie
accomplished-ambusher.description:
Stalker Technique: niveau 3

When you take the Attack action against a creature that is surprised, you can make one additional attack against cette créature as a part of that action.

mark-of-the-stalker.name: Marque du Traqueur
mark-of-the-stalker.description:
Stalker Technique: niveau 3

While you are hidden from la cible of your Ranger's Quarry feature, the first attack roll you make each round against cette créature does not automatically reveal your presence to cette créature. Make a Dexterity (Stealth) check contested by your target's Wisdom (Perception) check. On a success, you remain hidden. If you are less than 30 mètres from your target, the Dexterity (Stealth) check is made with disavantage.

greater-signature-maneuver.name: Maneuver Signature Supérieur
greater-signature-maneuver.description:
Tactical Specialist: niveau 10

Vous pouvez choisir a second signature maneuver.

maneuver-adept.name: Adepte des Maneuvres
maneuver-adept.description:
Tactical Specialist: niveau 10

Une fois par tour, your dés de supériorité rolls gain a minimum roll threshold, discussed in chapter 7.

maneuver-mastery.name: Maîtrise des Maneuvres
maneuver-mastery.description:
Spécialiste tactique : niveau 18

Une fois par tour, lorsque vous lancez un dé de supériorité, vous pouvez à la place choisir le maximum.

maneuver-versatility.name: Polyvalence des Maneuvres
maneuver-versatility.description:
Spécialiste tactique : niveau 3

Vous pouvez utiliser chaque manœuvre deux fois par tour, au lieu d'une.

De plus, choisissez deux manœuvres que vous connaissez. Les manœuvres choisies comptent pour vous comme des manœuvres générales. Vous pouvez choisir une autre manœuvre au 5ème, 9ème, 13ème et au niveau 17. À chaque fois que vous gagnez un niveau dans cette classe, vous pouvez remplacer une de ces manœuvres par une autre manœuvre que vous connaissez.

signature-maneuver.name: Maneuver Signature
signature-maneuver.description:
Spécialiste tactique : niveau 3

Vous choisissez une manœuvre que vous connaissez dans cette classe comme manœuvre de signature. Chaque fois que vous utilisez cette manœuvre, vous pouvez l’utiliser sans dépenser de dé de supériorité. Vous ne pouvez utiliser cette fonctionnalité qu'une seule fois par tour.

know-your-enemy.name: Connaître Son Ennemi
know-your-enemy.description:
Tactical Specialist: niveau 7

If you spend at least 1 minute observing or interacting with another creature outside combat, you can learn certain information about its capabilities compared to your own. The GM tells you if la créature is your equal, superior, or inferior in regard to two of the following characteristics de votre choix:

  • Strength score
  • Dexterity score
  • Constitution score
  • Classe d'Armure
  • Current points de vie
  • Total class niveaus (if any)
  • Fighter class niveaus (if any)

all-out-attack.name: Attaque Tous Azimuts
all-out-attack.description:
Tactician Pursuit: niveau 17

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour initiate an all-out attack. Choose a number of allies up to your Critical Analysis modificateur de caractéristique within 60 mètres who can see or hear you. The chosen allies may then immediately use their réaction to make one attaque d'arme against a target de votre choix. You may choose la cible for each attack separately.

Once you use this feature, you cannot use it again until you finish a short or repos long.

battle-display.name: Déploiement de Combat
battle-display.description:
Tactician Pursuit: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise in martial blasters and martial vibroweapons.

tactical-mastery.name: Maîtrise Tactique
tactical-mastery.description:
Tactician Pursuit: niveau 3

You learn to better command your allies to victory from afar. Your Critical Analysis range is increased to 90 mètres.

fire-as-one.name: Ne Faire Qu'Un
fire-as-one.description:
Tactician Pursuit: niveau 6

You can focus your target down with the help with an ally. Once per round, whenever la créature that is la cible of your Critical Analysis feature is attacked by someone other than you, you can use your réaction to make one attaque d'arme against them.

battlefield-survey.name: Reconnaissance du Champ de Bataille
battlefield-survey.description:
Tactician Pursuit: niveau 9

You become a master at leading your allies around in a battlefield you have studied. When you spend 10 minutes observing an area that is within 120 mètres from you, or by using a detailed map, select a number of creatures up to your Critical Analysis modificateur de caractéristique. You and those selected allies ignore unenhanced difficult terrain, and have avantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks in that area.

quantum-entanglement.name: Intrication Quantique
quantum-entanglement.description:
Teleportation Technique: niveau 11

When you use your Personal Teleporter feature, you can place the portal that you would normally place within 5 mètres of you in a place you can see within your Personal Teleporter's range. If that space is occupied by a Huge or smaller creature or a Medium or smaller unsecured object, it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. An object automatically fails this jet de sauvegarde, and a creature can choose to fail. On a failed sauvegarde, a Medium or smaller creature or object falls through the portal, immediately appearing in a space within 5 mètres of the linked portal and falling à terre. A Large or Huge creature instead falls à terre without moving.

personal-teleporter.name: Téléporteur Personnel
personal-teleporter.description:
Teleportation Technique: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, 17th, and niveau 20

You can use portable teleporters as a action bonus, instead of an action.

De plus, while you are wielding a tech focus, you can use your action bonus to create a pair of linked portals: one portal appears in a space within 5 mètres of you, and the other portal appears in an unoccupied space you can see up to 30 mètres away. These portals last jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, and they are large enough to accommodate Medium and smaller creatures and objects. Portals take the appearance of an elongated, shimmering mirror, and looking through a portal, a creature can see through the linked portal as if looking through a window. A creature or object who passes through a portal immediately appears in a space within 5 mètres of the linked portal. You can use your réaction to end your portals early. If a creature is partially within your portals, it is shunted back to the space it previously occupied and it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your a tech sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, it takes energy dégâts equal to your scout niveau + your Intelligence modificateur. You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long. At the beginning of each of your turns while you have a pair of portals active, you can expend a use of this feature to extend the duration of the portals jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour (no action required). The distance at which you can create portals increases at higher niveaus. It increases to 60 mètres at niveau 5, 90 mètres at niveau 9, 150 mètres at niveau 13, 300 mètres at niveau 17, and 1,000 mètres at niveau 20.

reprisal.name: Représaille
reprisal.description:
Teleportation Technique: niveau 15

When you would be affected by a weapon or pouvoir technique that requires a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde or attack roll and would affect only you, you can use your réaction to instantaneously create a pair of portals to redirect that power to another target within 30 mètres. If the weapon or power required a melee or attaque à distance roll, make a melee or ranged tech attack roll against the new target, as appropriate. If it required a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, the new target must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

mark-of-the-teleporter.name: Marque du Téléporteur
mark-of-the-teleporter.description:
Teleportation Technique: niveau 3

On your turn, when you deal dégâts to la cible of your Ranger's Quarry, and either you, your weapon, or the source of your dégâts have passed through your portals on this turn, when you roll below half the maximum on a dégâts die, you can treat the roll as if you'd rolled half the maximum on the dégâts die. You can only affect a number of dice up to half your Intelligence modificateur (minimum of one) in this way.

residual-warp.name: Distorsion Résiduelle
residual-warp.description:
Technique de téléportation : niveau 7

Lorsque vous utilisez votre fonction de téléporteur personnel, vous pouvez placer votre portail dans un endroit que vous avez visité au cours des 10 dernières minutes, à condition que vous puissiez vous en souvenir, par opposition à un endroit que vous pouvez voir. Cet endroit doit toujours être à portée de votre téléporteur.

matter-over-mind.name: La Matière sur l'Esprit
matter-over-mind.description:
Teras Kasi Order: niveau 11

You tap into the greater power of your focus. While both your Forredari Stance and your Steel Hands Form are active, you gain the following benefits:

  • Dancing Dragonsnake. When you take force, lightning, or necrotic dégâts, you can use your réaction to deflect it. When you do so, the dégâts you take is reduced by [[/r 1d10]] + your focus modificateur de caractéristique + your monk niveau.
  • Aryx Slash. Une fois par chacun de vos tours, quand vous contactez a target with an unarmed strike or monk weapon, you can roll a Martial Arts die and deal additional psychic dégâts equal to the amount rolled.
  • Piercing Gaze. When you would make an Insight check against a creature you know to wield the Force, you can use your focus modificateur de caractéristique for the roll, and you are considered to have expertise in the Insight skill. If you would already have expertise in the check, you instead have avantage on the roll.

spitting-rawl.name: Crachat du Rawl
spitting-rawl.description:
Teras Kasi Order: niveau 17

You have learned to harness your strikes in a blistering fury. On your turn, when a creature takes dégâts from you three times, you can make up to three additional unarmed strikes against la créature (no action required). The first additional unarmed strike costs 1 focus point and deals [[/r 1d12]] additional psychic dégâts on a hit, and each unarmed strike after the first costs 1 additional focus point and deals [[/r 1d12]] additional psychic dégâts on a hit, cumulatively.

forredari-stance.name: Posture Forredari
forredari-stance.description:
Teras Kasi Order: niveau 3

Your honed focus allows you to enter a stance of mental fortification and power. You can use your action bonus to enter this stance. When you do so, you unleash a flurry of blows on creatures de votre choix that you can see within 10 mètres of you. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or take the weapon's normal dégâts.

This stance lasts pendant 1 minute. While you are in this stance, you gain the following benefits:

  • Death Weave. When you reduce a creature to 0 points de vie, you gain points de vie temporaires equal to your focus modificateur de caractéristique + half your monk niveau.
  • Gundark Slap. Une fois par chacun de vos tours, quand vous contactez a creature with an unarmed strike or a monk weapon, vous pouvez choisir to make it unable to take réactions jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.
  • Sleeping Krayt. You can use your focus modificateur de caractéristique instead of Strength whenever you would make a test de Force or a Strength jet de sauvegarde. De plus, you have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against being charmé or effrayé.

These effects end early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

While you have no remaining uses of this feature, you can instead expend 1 focus point to use it. When you do so, your maximum focus points are reduced by 1 until you complete a repos long.

steel-hands-form.name: Forme des Mains d'Acier
steel-hands-form.description:
Teras Kasi Order: niveau 6

You can draw upon your focus to utilize an array of practiced techniques to strike your opponents with precision and power. You can use your action bonus to enter this stance, and when you do so, you can also enter your Forredari Stance as a part of this same action bonus. This form lasts pendant 1 minute. While you are in this stance, you gain the following benefits:

  • Charging Wampa. Once per round, when you are forced to make a jet de sauvegarde against a pouvoir de la Force, your vitesse de déplacement increases by 10 mètres jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.
  • Nexu Grin. When a creature you can see within 10 mètres of you casts a pouvoir de la Force that requires a force attack roll against you or an an allied creature, you can use your réaction and expend 1 focus point to impose disavantage on the attack roll. If the attack misses, and the higher of the two [[/r d20]] rolls would also miss, la créature cannot cast that pouvoir de la Force again until it completes a short or repos long.
  • Screaming Squill. Une fois par tour, quand vous contactez a creature that is concentrating on a pouvoir de la Force and it makes a Constitution jet de sauvegarde to maintain concentration, the DD for the check equals your focus sauvegarde DD, unless the DD for the Constitution jet de sauvegarde would be higher.

These effects end early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

While you have no remaining uses of this feature, you can instead expend 1 focus point to use it. When you do so, your maximum focus points are reduced by 1 until you complete a repos long.

primal-avatar.name: Avatar Primordial
primal-avatar.description:
Totem Specialist: niveau 10

You learn a third totem. De plus, the bonus dégâts of your Totemic Might feature increases to [[/r 1d8]]. Lastly, you have avantage on Lore checks you make about tribal cultures.

spirit-guide.name: Guide Spirituel
spirit-guide.description:
Spécialiste des totems : niveau 15

Vous pouvez invoquer chacun de vos totems deux fois, au lieu d'une. Vous regagnez tous les usages dépensés lorsque vous terminez un short ou un repos long.

blessing-of-the-tree-of-light.name: Bénédiction de l'Arbre de Lumière
blessing-of-the-tree-of-light.description:
Totem Specialist: niveau 18

You learn how to share your totem's power with your allies. When you use your Totemic Might feature, vous pouvez choisir one willing creature you can see within 60 mètres of you. The chosen creature also gains the benefits of your Totemic Might feature. If you are incapacitated or killed, this effect immediately ends for both of you.

totem-creation.name: Création de Totem
totem-creation.description:
Spécialiste des totems : niveau 3

Vous avez appris à créer de puissants talismans imprégnés de Force. Vos totems peuvent prendre la forme de sceaux peints directement sur votre équipement, ou de décorations attachées à celui-ci, comme bon vous semble. Quelle que soit la forme qu’ils prennent, vous seul pouvez en bénéficier. Vous apprenez deux totems de votre choix, qui sont détaillés sous "Totems" ci-dessous. Lorsque vous terminez une mise en pension longue, vous pouvez remplacer un totem que vous connaissez par un autre.

Lorsque vous terminez une mise en pension longue, vous pouvez contacter un nombre d'armes, d'armures ou de boucliers égal au nombre de totems que vous connaissez, en apposant un totem différent sur chaque objet. Votre totem reste apposé jusqu'à ce que vous ayez terminé une longue période de repos, et un objet ne peut porter qu'un seul totem à la fois. Vous devez manier ou porter l'objet pour bénéficier d'un totem qui y est apposé.

Chaque totem peut être invoqué pour accorder un effet. Une fois que vous avez invoqué un totem de cette manière, vous ne pouvez plus le faire tant que vous n'avez pas terminé un short ou un repos long.

totemic-might.name: Puissance Totémique
totemic-might.description:
Totem Specialist: niveau 3

You can channel the power of your Force awareness temporarily. As a action bonus, you can gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute. You can invoke a totem as a part of this same action bonus.

  • Your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift doubles. If it would already double, it instead triples.
  • You have avantage on test de Forces and Strength jet de sauvegardes.
  • Your attaque d'armes deal an extra [[/r 1d6]] dégâts.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. You can use this feature twice. Vous regagnez tous expended uses of it when you finish a repos long.

guardian-spirit.name: Esprit Gardien
guardian-spirit.description:
Totem Specialist: niveau 7

You learn to invoke your totems to protect your allies. When another creature you can see within 60 mètres of you is hit by an attack roll, you can use your réaction to grant a bonus to la créature's AC against that attack. The bonus equals 1 + your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of +2).

pass-the-blade.name: Passer la Lame
pass-the-blade.description:
Trakata Form: niveau 15

When a creature misses you with an attack, you gain points de vie temporaires equal to your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of one), and you add your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of one) to the first attaque d'arme au corps à corps and jet de dégâtss you make against cette créature before the end of your next turn.

master-of-deception.name: Maître de la Tromperie
master-of-deception.description:
Trakata Form: niveau 20

Your skill with a lightweapon is both mesmerizing and confounding. Your Dexterity and Wisdom or Charisma scores (your choice) increase by 2. Your maximum for these scores increases by 2. De plus, you can use your action to gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • You have resistance to kinetic, energy, and ion dégâts from weapons.
  • Your attack rolls can't suffer from disavantage.
  • Whenever a creature misses you with a attaque au corps à corps, it takes 5 energy dégâts.
  • Whenever a creature hits you with a attaque au corps à corps, it takes dégâts equal to half of the dégâts you take from the attack.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

the-way-of-the-monkey-lizard.name: La Voie du Lézard-Singe
the-way-of-the-monkey-lizard.description:
Trakata Form: niveau 3

As a action bonus, you can enter a confusing stance for one minute. As a part of this action bonus, and as a action bonus on each of your turns, when you take the Dodge action, you can make one attaque d'arme au corps à corps against a creature within range. De plus, quand vous faites this attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can flourish your weapon to attempt to distract your target. Make a Dexterity (Escamotage) check contested by a Wisdom (Perception) check of la cible of your attack. On a success, you make this attack roll with avantage.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

unbalancing-block.name: Bloc Déséquilibrant
unbalancing-block.description: When you are hit with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, and you are wielding a lightweapon with which you are proficient, you can use your réaction and expend a use of your Channel the Force to add your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of +1) to your AC for that attack, potentially causing the attack to miss you.

duplicitous-force.name: Force Duplicite
duplicitous-force.description:
Trakata Form: niveau 7

Lorsque vous effectuez un test de Dextérité (Escamotage), vous gagnez un bonus à ce test égal à votre modificateur de Sagesse ou de Charisme (au choix, au minimum un).

experimental-infusion.name: Infusion Expérimentale
experimental-infusion.description:
Triage Technique: niveau 11

When you target a creature with your Ranger's Quarry, you can grant one of the following additional effects de votre choix:

  • Adrenaline/Tranquilizer. The creature's vitesse de déplacement is doubled until the end of its next turn. Alternatively, it gains a niveau of slowed until the end of its next turn.
  • Focus/Dizziness. The creature has either avantage or disavantage (your choice) on the first test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde it makes within the next minute.
  • Toughen/Weaken. The creature gains points de vie temporaires equal to your scout niveau, which last pendant 1 minute. Alternatively, la créature must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a failure, it takes psychic dégâts equal to your scout niveau and it can't regain points de vie jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

You can use each feature once. You regain any expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.

double-dose.name: Double Dose
double-dose.description:
Technique de triage : 7e, 9e, 13e et niveau 17

Votre application de médicaments n'interfère pas avec votre propre capacité à vous remettre d'une blessure. Lorsque vous restaurez des points de vie ou accordez des points de vie temporaires à une autre créature dotée d'un pouvoir technique ou d'une caractéristique de classe, vous récupérez le même nombre de points de vie ou gagnez le même nombre de points de vie temporaires.

Vous pouvez utiliser cette fonctionnalité trois fois. Vous gagnez une utilisation supplémentaire au 9ème, 13ème et au niveau 17. Vous récupérez toutes les utilisations dépensées lorsque vous terminez un repos long.

cure-all.name: Panacée
cure-all.description:
Triage Technique: niveau 15

Your healing becomes even more potent. When you restore points de vie to a creature as a action bonus using your Mark of Triage feature, you can also end one of the following conditions afflicting it: aveuglé, assourdi, diseased, paralysé, or empoisonné.

mark-of-triage.name: Marque de Triage
mark-of-triage.description:
Triage Technique: niveau 3

You learn new ways to use your Ranger's Quarry.

  • While a hostile creature is la cible of your Ranger's Quarry, you always know any conditions it is suffering from, and you know at roughly what percentage its current points de vie is relative to its maximum. De plus, if la cible is within 60 mètres of you, when it is forced to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde, you can use your réaction to force it to make the roll with disavantage. Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.
  • While a friendly creature is la cible of your Ranger's Quarry, you have avantage on Wisdom (Medicine) checks made to stabilize it. De plus, if la cible is within 60 mètres of you, you can use your action bonus and roll your Ranger's Quarry and either restore points de vie equal to the amount rolled, or grant points de vie temporaires equal to the amount rolled. Once a friendly creature has benefited from this ability, they can not do so again until they complete a short or repos long.

triage-training.name: Entraînement au Triage
triage-training.description:
Triage Technique: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise in the Medicine skill.

De plus, when you would use your action to make an test de caractéristique to stabilize a creature, expend a use of a traumakit, or use a medpac, you can instead use your action bonus.

luck-of-the-fool.name: Chance du Fou
luck-of-the-fool.description:
Trickster Order: niveau 11

You always seem to get a lucky bounce at the right moment. When you make an test de caractéristique, an attack roll, or a jet de sauvegarde and have disavantage, you can spend 2 focus points to instead have avantage for that roll.

comic-frenzy.name: Frénésie Comique
comic-frenzy.description:
Ordre du Trickster : niveau 17

Vous obtenez la possibilité de réaliser un nombre écrasant d'attaques contre un groupe d'ennemis. Lorsque vous utilisez votre Rafale de coups, vous pouvez effectuer jusqu'à trois attaques supplémentaires avec (jusqu'à un total de cinq attaques Rafale de coups), à condition que chaque attaque Rafale de coups cible une créature différente ce tour-ci.

bumbling-technique.name: Technique Maladroite
bumbling-technique.description:
Trickster Order: niveau 3

Your martial arts technique mixes combat training with the precision of a dancer and the antics of a jester. You gain maîtrise in Performance.

De plus, you learn how to twist and turn quickly. Whenever you use your action bonus to make an unarmed strike, creatures you hit can't make attaque d'opportunités against you, and your speed increases by 10 mètres jusqu'à la fin de votre tour.

clumsy-sway.name: Bascule Maladroite
clumsy-sway.description:
Trickster Order: niveau 6

You can move in sudden, swaying ways. You gain the following benefits.

Leap to Your Feet. When you're à terre, you can stand up by spending 5 mètres of movement, rather than half your speed.

Redirect Attack. When a creature misses you with a attaque au corps à corps roll, you can spend 1 focus point as a réaction to cause that attack to hit une créature de votre choix, other than the attacker, that you can see within 5 mètres of you.

experimental-overrides.name: Contournements Expérimentaux
experimental-overrides.description:
Ingénierie instable : niveau 14

Vous obtenez un minimum de contrôle sur vos surtensions. Chaque fois que vous lancez un jet sur la table Unstable Engineering Surge et utilisez l'un de vos remplacements, vous pouvez choisir l'un ou l'autre total.

modified-tinkercannon.name: Canon Bricolé Modifié
modified-tinkercannon.description:
Unstable Engineering: 3rd, 9th, and niveau 17

You learn to enhance your tinker's implements with unstable science, modifying them into a harness with a cannon. Over the course of a repos long, you can modify your tinker's implements to create a tinkercannon. You must have tinker's implements in order to perform this modification.

Whenever you cast a pouvoir technique of niveau 1 or higher while wielding your tinkercannon, you risk unexpected complications. Your GM can have you roll a [[/r d20]]. If you roll a 1, roll on the Unstable Engineering Surge table to create a random effect.

De plus, your tinkercannon come equipped with four overrides, and they gain more at higher niveaus, as shown in the Modification Slots column of the engineer table. Each time you trigger an Unstable Engineering Surge, you can use an override to reroll the percentile dice. You must use the new result, you can only do this once per surge, and each time you do so in excess of your bonus de maîtrise (resetting on a repos long) your maximum tech points is reduced by 1 until you complete a repos long. Vous regagnez tous expended overrides when you complete a repos long.

unstable-volley.name: Salve Instable
unstable-volley.description:
Unstable Engineering: 3rd, 9th, and niveau 17

While wielding your tinkercannon, as a action bonus you can expend one use of your Potent Aptitude to launch a volley of unstable energy at a surface located within 30 mètres of you that you can see. This energy adheres to the surface pendant 1 minute, after which it erupts. As a part of this action bonus, or as a action bonus on a following turn, you can cause the energy to erupt early. Each creature within 5 mètres of it must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. A creature takes [[/r 1d6]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successfu one.

The range at which you can launch your volley increases to 60 mètres at niveau 9, and 120 mètres at niveau 17.

This dégâts increases when you reach certain niveaus in this class, increasing to [[/r 2d6]] at niveau 5, [[/r 3d6]] at niveau 11, and [[/r 4d6]] at niveau 17.

engineering-bombardment.name: Bombardement d'Ingénierie
engineering-bombardment.description:
Unstable Engineering: niveau 18

The harmful energies of your pouvoir techniques and class features intensify. When you roll dégâts for a pouvoir technique or class feature and roll the highest number possible on any of the dice, you can roll it again and use both results. You can only use this ability once per pouvoir technique or class feature.

creative-destruction.name: Destruction Créative
creative-destruction.description:
Unstable Engineering: niveau 6

Vous pouvez ajouter your governing modificateur de caractéristique (minimum of +1) to any dégâts you deal with pouvoir techniques and class features that don't already include that modificateur. If the pouvoir technique or class feature would dégâts multiple creatures, you can only deal this additional dégâts to one of them.

If you choose to deal this additional dégâts, your GM can have you roll on the Unstable Engineering Surge table.

amplified-auras.name: Auras Amplifiées
amplified-auras.description:
Vonil/Ishu Form: 7th, 11th, and niveau 17

Une fois par chacun de vos tours, vous pouvez choisir an ally within 10 mètres of you. While the chosen ally is within 10 mètres of you, your auras emit from that ally as if you were standing in that ally's space. A creature in the area of more than one instance of your auras is affected only once.

At niveau 11, the chosen ally must be within 30 mètres of you to benefit from this feature. At niveau 17, the chosen ally must be within 60 mètres.

shield.name: Bouclier
shield.description:
When your companion is hit by a attaque d'arme while within 10 mètres of you, you can use your réaction and expend a use of your Channel the Force to attempt to divert the attack. When you do so, the dégâts your companion takes from the attack is reduced by [[/r 1d10]] + your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice) + your guardian niveau.

At niveau 11, your companion must be within 30 mètres of you to benefit from this feature. At niveau 17, your companion must be within 60 mètres.

smite.name: Châtiment
smite.description:
Une fois par tour, when your companion is within 10 mètres of you and it hits a creature with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can expend a use of your Channel the Force and expend point de Forces to have your companion deal additional dégâts to la cible, which is the same type as the weapon's dégâts. The additional dégâts is [[/r 1d8]] for each point spent in this way. You can't deal more additional dégâts than the amount shown in the Focused Strikes column of the guardian table.

At niveau 11, your companion must be within 30 mètres of you to benefit from this feature. At niveau 17, your companion must be within 60 mètres.

the-way-of-the-hydra.name: La Voie de l'Hydre
the-way-of-the-hydra.description:
Vonil/Ishu Form: niveau 3

As a action bonus, you can enter a synchronized stance with your companion pendant 1 minute, as long as your companion is within 10 mètres of you. While in this stance, une fois par tour, quand vous contactez a creature with an attack, your companion has avantage on the next attack it makes against the same target before the end of your next turn. De plus, une fois par tour, when your companion hits a creature with an attack, you have avantage on the next attack you make against the same target before the end of your next turn.

Cet effet ends early if either you or your companion are incapacitated or die, or if your companion is ever more than 10 mètres away from you. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you complete a repos long.

At niveau 11, your companion must be within 30 mètres of you to benefit from this feature. At niveau 17, your companion must be within 60 mètres.

rebuttal.name: Réfutation
rebuttal.description: When your companion takes the Help action and helps you, you gain points de vie temporaires equal to your guardian niveau that last jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. When you take the Help action and help your companion, it gains points de vie temporaires equal to your guardian niveau that last until the start of its next turn.

takedown.name: Mise à Terre
takedown.description: When your companion takes the Help action and helps you, you have avantage on the next two test de caractéristiques or attack rolls you make before the start of your next turn, instead of only one. When you take the Help action and help your companion, your companion has avantage on the next two test de caractéristiques or attack rolls it makes before the start of its next turn, instead of only one.

teamwork.name: Travail d'Équipe
teamwork.description:
Vonil/Ishu Form: niveau 15

You gain one of the following features. Choose Takedown for Vonil or Rebuttal for Ishu.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.eepEY1v2oMkGSWlz]{Takedown}

When your companion takes the Help action and helps you, you have avantage on the next two test de caractéristiques or attack rolls you make before the start of your next turn, instead of only one. When you take the Help action and help your companion, your companion has avantage on the next two test de caractéristiques or attack rolls it makes before the start of its next turn, instead of only one.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.Y0FyqlJ5Zuyecwqi]{Rebuttal}

When your companion takes the Help action and helps you, you gain points de vie temporaires equal to your guardian niveau that last jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. When you take the Help action and help your companion, it gains points de vie temporaires equal to your guardian niveau that last until the start of its next turn.

master-of-unity.name: Maître de l'Unité
master-of-unity.description:
Vonil/Ishu Form (Companion): niveau 20

You and your companion are a paragon of harmony. Your Strength or Dexterity (your choice) and Constitution scores increase by 2. Your maximum for those scores increases by 2. De plus, you can use your action to gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute, as long as your companion is within 60 mètres of you:

  • You and your companion have resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts.
  • Neither you nor your companion can have disavantage on attack rolls.
  • Both you and your companion's critical hit ranges increase by 1.

Cet effet ends early if either you or your companion are incapacitated or die, or if your companion is ever more than 60 mètres away from you. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you complete a repos long.

raid-planning.name: Planification de Raid
raid-planning.description:
Approche du chef de guerre : niveau 10

Vous apprenez à stimuler la volonté de combat de vos alliés, les incitant à vous suivre dans la mêlée. Pendant une longue période de repos, vous racontez des sagas, chantez des chants de bataille et prononcez des discours inspirants. A la fin du repos long, choisissez jusqu'à 5 créatures capables de vous entendre et de vous comprendre (qui peuvent inclure votre personnel) pour ajouter votre modificateur de Charisme (minimum de +1) à leur prochain test d'Initiative, et un bonus de 10 pieds à leur vitesse lors de leur premier tour de combat.

war-chant.name: Chant de Guerre
war-chant.description:
Warchief Approach: niveau 14

You have memorized the litanies, songs, and chants of your people and their dedication to war. When you enter a rage on your turn, you can enter a commanding rage for one minute. When you do so, during this turn and at the start of each of your turns, you have a number of special réactions equal to your bonus de maîtrise you can only use for your Commanding Rage feature. When you use Commanding Rage with these special réactions, they do not count against your uses of that feature. You can only use one réaction per turn. De plus, during this rage, when an enemy within 10 mètres of you makes an attack roll against an ally, you can use your réaction to reduce the attack by an amount equal to your Charisma modificateur.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a repos long before you can use it again.

commanding-rage.name: Rage Commandante
commanding-rage.description:
Warchief Approach: niveau 3

You become more aware of your allies, and their intent when fighting at your side. While you are raging, when an ally within 10 mètres of you makes an attack roll against an enemy, you can use your réaction to grant avantage to that attack and add your rage dégâts bonus to the jet de dégâts, if the attack hits.

You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.

savage-diplomat.name: Diplomate Sauvage
savage-diplomat.description:
Warchief Approach: niveau 3

Your path necessitates that you build relationships with others, for the betterment of your tribe or yourpersonnelle. You gain maîtrise in one of the following skills de votre choix: Persuasion or Intimidation. Vous pouvez choisir to learn one language in place of the skill maîtrise.

inspiring-presence.name: Présence Inspirante
inspiring-presence.description:
Warchief Approach: niveau 6

Your mere presence on the battlefield rallies your allies. When you rage, choose up to 3 allies that you can see within 30 mètres of you. Each creature gains points de vie temporaires equal to half your berserker niveau + your Charisma modificateur (minimum of +1).

at-will-barrier.name: Barrière à Volonté
at-will-barrier.description:
Voie d'équilibre : niveau 10

Vos pouvoirs universels à volonté accordent un petit coup de pouce à votre barrière de force. Lorsque vous lancez un pouvoir universel à volonté, la barrière regagne 1 point de vie. Vous ne pouvez pas restaurer votre barrière au-dessus de la moitié de ses points de vie maximum de cette manière.

improved-suppression.name: Suppression Améliorée
improved-suppression.description:
Way of Balance: niveau 14

When you cast a pouvoir de la Force that requires you to make an test de caractéristique as a part of casting that power, such as sever force or force suppression, you add your bonus de maîtrise to that test de caractéristique.

force-barrier.name: Barrière de Force
force-barrier.description:
Way of Balance: niveau 3

You can weave the Force around yourpersonnelle for protection. When you cast a universal power of niveau 1 or higher, you can simultaneously manipulate the Force to create a barrier on yourpersonnelle that lasts until you finish a repos long. The barrier has points de vie equal to twice your consular niveau + your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice). Your barrier can never have points de vie greater than twice your consular niveau + your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice).

Whenever you take dégâts, the barrier takes the dégâts instead. If this dégâts reduces the barrier to 0 points de vie, you take any remaining dégâts.

While the barrier has 0 points de vie, it can't absorb dégâts, but its power remains. Whenever you cast a universal power of niveau 1 or higher, the barrier regains a number of points de vie equal to twice the niveau of the power.

Once you create the barrier, you can't create it again until you finish a repos long.

life-eternal.name: Vie Éernelle
life-eternal.description:
Voie de confluence : niveau 10

Vous pouvez utiliser votre puissante connexion à la Force pour continuer à vous battre lorsque d'autres tomberaient. Lorsque vous êtes réduit à 0 point de vie mais pas carrément tué, vous pouvez dépenser 5 points de Forces pour passer à 1 point de vie à la place.

interconnectedness.name: Interconnexion
interconnectedness.description:
Way of Confluence: niveaux 14 et 17

When you cast a niveau 5 or lower pouvoir de la Force that deals dégâts or restores points de vie and targets only une créature, the power can instead target two creatures within range and within 5 mètres of each other.

You can use this feature five times. You gain an additional use at niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

dynamic-attachment.name: Attachement Dynamique
dynamic-attachment.description:
Way of Confluence: niveau 18

While you have points de vie temporaires, you have resistance against the dégâts of pouvoir de la Forces, and your pouvoir de la Forces ignore resistances.

manipulate-life-force.name: Manipuler la Force Vitale
manipulate-life-force.description:
Way of Confluence: niveau 3

Lorsque vous réduisez une créature hostile à 0 point de vie avec un pouvoir de la Force, ou redonnez des points de vie à une créature avec 0 point de vie avec un pouvoir de la Force, vous gagnez des points de vie temporaires égaux à la moitié votre niveau consulaire + votre modificateur de Sagesse ou de Charisme (au choix, minimum un).

empowered-connection.name: Connexion Renforcée
empowered-connection.description:
Way of Confluence: niveau 6

While you have points de vie temporaires, you can add half your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of one) to any dégâts or healing you do with pouvoir de la Forces that doesn't already include that modificateur.

boundless-vitality.name: Vitalité Débordante
boundless-vitality.description:
Way of Endurance: niveau 10

When you take dégâts, you can use your réaction and expend a point de Force to regain health equal to [[/r 1d8]] + your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of one) as long as the dégâts would not reduce your points de vie to 0.

This die increases when you reach certain niveaus in this class: to [[/r 1d10]] at niveau 13, and to [[/r 1d12]] at niveau 17.

retaliation-strike.name: Frappe de Représailles
retaliation-strike.description:
Way of Endurance: 6th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You learn to turn an opponent's aggression back on them. When you deal dégâts with a pouvoir de la Force or a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, if you took dégâts since the start of your last turn, you deal an extra [[/r 1d6]] dégâts. The dégâts is the same type as the power or weapon's dégâts.

This die increases when you reach certain niveaus in this class: to [[/r 1d8]] at niveau 9, to [[/r 1d10]] at niveau 13, and to [[/r 1d12]] at niveau 17.

unrelenting-resilience.name: Résilience Inlassable
unrelenting-resilience.description:
Voie d'endurance : niveau 14

Lorsque vous utilisez votre fonction Boundless Vitality tout en vous concentrant sur un pouvoir de la Force, vous pouvez ajouter le résultat du jet au jet de sauvegarde de Constitution conçu pour maintenir la concentration.

De plus, lorsque vous êtes réduit à 0 point de vie mais que vous n'êtes pas tué sur le coup pendant que Soutenu par la Force est actif, vous pouvez passer à 1 point de vie à la place. Vous ne pouvez plus utiliser cette fonctionnalité tant que vous n'avez pas terminé un dépôt long.

the-force-unleashed.name: La Force Déchaînée
the-force-unleashed.description:
Way of Endurance: niveau 18

As an action, vous pouvez choisir a point within 60 mètres. Each creature de votre choix within 30 mètres of that point must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 5d10]] force dégâts and suffers 1 niveau of épuisement. On a successful sauvegarde, a creature takes half dégâts and does not suffer épuisement.

For chaque créature that fails this jet de sauvegarde, a friendly creature within 30 mètres of them can regain points de vie equal to the amount of dégâts dealt. A friendly creature can only gain this benefit une fois par tour.

You can use this feature un nombre de fois égal à your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, a minimum of once). Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

upheld-by-the-force.name: Soutenu par la Force
upheld-by-the-force.description:
Way of Endurance: niveau 3

The Force flowing through your body strengthens you, granting the following benefits:

  • Your point de vie maximum increases by 3, and it increases by 1 again whenever you gain a niveau in this class.
  • Your base AC becomes 13 + your Constitution modificateur.
  • When you make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps as a part of a pouvoir de la Force you cast, you can use Wisdom or Charisma (your choice) instead of Strength for the attack and jet de dégâtss.

De plus, as an action, you can gain resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts pendant 1 minute. Cet effet lasts until you end it as a action bonus, you are incapacitated, or you don armor other than a shield. You can use this feature twice. Vous regagnez tous expended uses of it when you finish a short or repos long.

blistering-rebuke.name: Réprimande Brûlante
blistering-rebuke.description:
Way of Lightning: 10th, 13th, and niveau 17

When a creature within 5 mètres of you that you can see hits you with an attack, you can use your réaction to cause la créature to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes [[/r 1d10]] plus your consular niveau lightning dégâts, is pushed back 10 mètres, and becomes shocked until the end of their next turn. On a successful sauvegarde, la créature takes half as much dégâts and isn't moved or shocked.

You can use this feature four times. You gain an additional use at niveaux 13 et 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

electric-attunement.name: Harmonie Électrique
electric-attunement.description:
Way of Lightning: niveau 14

Vous gagnez la résistance to lightning dégâts, and pouvoir de la Forces you cast ignore resistance to lightning dégâts.

unlimited-power.name: Puissance Illimitée
unlimited-power.description:
Way of Lightning: niveau 18

Vous pouvez augmenter the power of your simpler lightning pouvoir de la Forces. When you cast a pouvoir de la Force of 1st through niveau 6 that deals lightning dégâts, you can deal maximum dégâts with that power.

You can use this feature with no adverse effects un nombre de fois égal à your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, a minimum of once). If you use this feature beyond this before you finish a repos long, you take [[/r 2d12]] true dégâts for each niveau of the power, immediately after you cast it. Each time you use this feature again before finishing a repos long, the dégâts increases by [[/r 1d12]].

shocking-affinity.name: Affinité Électrisante
shocking-affinity.description:
Way of Lightning: niveau 3

When you cast a pouvoir de la Force that deals lightning dégâts, you can use Wisdom or Charisma as your forcecasting ability for it.

De plus, when you cast a dégâts-dealing pouvoir de la Force that requires a force attack or jet de sauvegarde, you can cause that power to instead deal lightning dégâts. If the power would call for a jet de sauvegarde other than Dexterity, it instead calls for a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. If

you hit with the power, or la cible fails the power's jet de sauvegarde, affected creatures become shocked jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a short or repos long.

potent-lightning.name: Éclair Puissant
potent-lightning.description:
Way of Lightning: niveau 6

You add your governing modificateur de caractéristique (minimum of +1) to any dégâts you deal with pouvoir de la Forces that deal lightning dégâts that don't already include that modificateur.

guarding-weapon.name: Arme de Garde
guarding-weapon.description:
Way of Manipulation: niveau 10

You can direct your animated weapons to absorb dégâts while your Saber Storm is activate. When you take dégâts, you can use your réaction to expend a number of point de Forces up to your bonus de maîtrise to have your animated weapon intercept it, and reduce that dégâts to you by an amount equal to five times the number of points spent.

saber-storm.name: Tempête de Sabre
saber-storm.description:
Way of Manipulation: 3rd, 5th, 11th, and niveau 17

You learn to deftly control your weapons utilizing the Force. As an action, you can initiate your Saber Storm. When you do so, select a light- or vibro-weapon within 5 mètres that is not worn or carried by a conscious creature other than you, and use the Force to cause it to levitate, acting as an extension of your will pendant 1 minute. When you activate this feature, you can cause the weapon to move up to 10 mètres and make a melee force attack against a creature within 5 mètres of it. En cas de contacter, la cible takes [[/r 1d8]] + your forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique dégâts. The type is of the normal dégâts dealt by the weapon. The weapon then returns to your side.

Your weapon moves with you, and while Saber Storm is active and you have a weapon animated, on each of your turns you can use an action to move a weapon up to 10 mètres and repeat the attack against a creature within 5 mètres of it. The weapon then returns to your side. Your Saber Storm ends early if you are incapacitated. At any time, you can end this feature and return the animated weapon to your hand.

De plus, while your Saber Storm is active, and at least one animated weapon is within 5 mètres of you, you gain the following benefits:

  • Vous gagnez un bonus to your AC equal to your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of +1) if it doesn't already include that modificateur.
  • Vous gagnez un bonus to any Constitution jet de sauvegarde you make to maintain your concentration on a power. The bonus equals your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of +1).

Cette aptitude can animate more than one weapon when you reach higher niveaus: two weapons at niveau 5, three weapons at niveau 11, and four weapons at niveau 17. When you use your action to attack with your weapons, you can direct them at the same target or at different ones. Make a separate attack roll for each weapon.

At niveau 5, the distance your weapon can travel increases to 20 mètres. This distance increases to 30 mètres at niveau 11, and 40 mètres at niveau 17.

You can use this feature twice. Vous regagnez tous expended uses of it when you finish a short or repos long.

isolate.name: Isolement
isolate.description:
Way of Manipulation: niveau 14

When you deal dégâts to a creature while Saber Storm is active, and cette créature fails a Constitution jet de sauvegarde to maintain concentration on a pouvoir de la Force, you can steal and redirect the power. Until the end of your next turn, either you or la créature who failed the Constitution jet de sauvegarde gain the effects of the power (your choice).

sapping-storm.name: Tempête Épuisante
sapping-storm.description:
Mode de manipulation : niveau 18

Lorsque vous réduisez une créature hostile à 0 point de vie pendant que Tempête de Sabre est active, vous gagnez un point de Force temporaire égal à votre modificateur de Sagesse ou de Charisme (au choix, au minimum un). Ces points de Forces temporaires ne peuvent pas dépasser votre modificateur de Sagesse ou de Charisme (au choix), et lorsque vous dépenseriez un point de Force alors que vous disposez de points de Forces temporaires, les points de Forces temporaires sont dépensés en premier. À la fin de Sabre Storm, vous perdez tout point de Forces temporaire restant.

deceptive-strike.name: Frappe Trompeuse
deceptive-strike.description:
Mode de manipulation : niveau 6

Lorsque vous lancez un pouvoir de la Force avec une portée de contact pendant que Saber Storm est actif, votre arme animée peut se déplacer jusqu'à sa portée et délivrer la puissance comme si elle l'avait lancé.

enduring-focus.name: Focalisation Endurante
enduring-focus.description:
Way of Negation: niveau 10

You can casually deflect attacks while channeling your power. While you are concentrating on a pouvoir de la Force, you have a +2 bonus to your AC and all jet de sauvegardes.

De plus, you can extend your Force Deflection to a creature within 5 mètres of you when they fail a jet de sauvegarde.

force-deflection.name: Déviation de Force
force-deflection.description:
Way of Negation: 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

Quand vous échouez a jet de sauvegarde, you can use your réaction to gain a bonus to that jet de sauvegarde equal to your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of +1).

You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

conflux.name: Conflux
conflux.description:
Way of Negation: niveau 14
