When you use your Force Deflection feature, you can cause a ripple in the Force to expand from you. Up to three creatures de votre choix that you can see within 60 mètres of you each take force dégâts equal to half your consular niveau.

tutaminis-mastery.name: Maîtrise de Tutaminis
tutaminis-mastery.description:
Voie de négation : niveau 18

Lorsque vous utilisez une option d'incantation renforcée par la Force, vous pouvez dépenser une surtension pour l'utiliser sans dépenser de points de Forces supplémentaires.

power-surge.name: Surtension
power-surge.description:
Way of Negation: niveau 6

You learn to simultaneously limit a creature's pouvoir de la Forces and store that power within yourpersonnelle to later strengthen your damaging pouvoir de la Forces.

You can store a maximum number of power surges equal to your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of one). Whenever you successfully end a pouvoir de la Force with a power such as force suppression or sever force, or use your Force Shield or Force Deflection features to successfully avoid an attack or succeed on a jet de sauvegarde, you gain one power surge, as you redirect the flow of the Force into yourpersonnelle.

Une fois par tour, when you deal dégâts to a creature or object with a pouvoir de la Force, you can spend one power surge to deal extra dégâts to cette cible. The extra dégâts is of the same type as the power's dégâts, and it equals half your consular niveau.

Whenever you finish a repos long, your number of power surges resets to one. If you end a repos court with no power surges, you gain one power surge.

delicate-potency.name: Puissance Délicate
delicate-potency.description:
Mode de suggestion : 10e, 13e et niveau 17

Vos pouvoirs mentaux sont particulièrement puissants. Lorsque vous lancez l'un des cloud mind, dominate mind, mass coerce mind et dominate monster, vous pouvez choisir de traiter le pouvoir comme s'il était lancé à votre niveau de puissance maximum.

Vous pouvez utiliser cette fonctionnalité quatre fois. Vous gagnez un usage supplémentaire aux niveaux 13 et 17. Vous regagnez tous les usages dépensés lorsque vous terminez un repos long.

delayed-effect.name: Effet Retardé
delayed-effect.description:
Mode de suggestion : niveau 14

Lorsque vous lancez un pouvoir de la Force, vous pouvez retarder les effets du pouvoir de la Force jusqu'à un nombre de rounds égal à la moitié de votre niveau consulaire. Si vous le faites, le pouvoir prend immédiatement effet au début de votre tour, une fois le nombre de tours spécifié écoulé.

Une fois que vous avez utilisé cette fonctionnalité, vous ne pouvez plus l'utiliser tant que vous n'avez pas terminé un repos long.

cloak-of-fright.name: Cape d'Effroi
cloak-of-fright.description: Each creature de votre choix that is within 60 mètres must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD or become effrayé pendant 1 minute. A creature can repeat the jet de sauvegarde at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itpersonnelle on a success.

cloak-of-invisibility.name: Cape d'Invisibilité
cloak-of-invisibility.description: You and everything you are wearing or carrying become invisible to creatures de votre choix. If you dégâts a creature or affect it with a pouvoir de la Force, it can make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD. On a success, you are no longer invisible to cette créature.

cloak-of-memory.name: Cape de Mémoire
cloak-of-memory.description:
Creatures that see you or any allies within 30 mètres of you during this time cannot recall your physical appearances, your mannerisms, or any other identifying features.

Creatures that interact with you must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD once the interaction ends. Vous pouvez choisir to exclude a creature from this effect. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature forgets all details of the interaction, rationalizing any of its outcomes.

subtle-presence.name: Présence Subtile
subtle-presence.description:
Way of Suggestion: niveau 18

You've learned how to weave the Force around you in a cloak de votre choix. As an action, you can focus the Force for 10 minutes. For the duration, you gain your choice of one of the following effects.

You can use each feature once. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.pqHVFtabBkkTOJVJ]{Cloak of Fright}

Each creature de votre choix that is within 60 mètres must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD or become effrayé pendant 1 minute. A creature can repeat the jet de sauvegarde at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itpersonnelle on a success.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.JUIYByM1R6zC0mRY]{Cloak of Invisibility}

You and everything you are wearing or carrying become invisible to creatures de votre choix. If you dégâts a creature or affect it with a pouvoir de la Force, it can make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD. On a success, you are no longer invisible to cette créature.

@UUID[Compendium.sw5e.archetypefeatures.Item.UAh792LGtu54HoOI]{Cloak of Memory}

Creatures that see you or any allies within 30 mètres of you during this time cannot recall your physical appearances, your mannerisms, or any other identifying features.

Creatures that interact with you must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD once the interaction ends. Vous pouvez choisir to exclude a creature from this effect. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature forgets all details of the interaction, rationalizing any of its outcomes.

subtle-control.name: Contrôle Subtil
subtle-control.description:
Way of Suggestion: niveau 3

You can befuddle a creature's mind with nothing but a gesture. As an action, you can cause a creature you can see within 30 mètres to make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, you can force la créature to believe or forget a single aspect of a conversation, observation or encounter it had that you were present for in the past 10 minutes. Whether la créature succeeds or fails their jet de sauvegarde, you can't use this feature on them again until you finish a repos long.

De plus, creatures who attempt to detect your use of the Force have disavantage on test de caractéristiques to do so, and if a creature has the sense force or force sight power active, they must succeed on a universal forcecasting test de caractéristique against your universal force sauvegarde DD in order to notice your usage of the Force, your alignment within the Force, or how strong your connection to the Force is.

out-of-mind.name: Hors de l'Esprit
out-of-mind.description:
Way of Suggestion: niveau 6

You can erase yourpersonnelle from a single creature's sight momentarily. As a action bonus, choose a creature within 60 mètres of you that you are aware of. That creature must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, you become invisible to cette créature pendant 1 minute, or until you deal dégâts to it.

Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a short or repos long.

ionized-weave.name: Tissage Ionisé
ionized-weave.description:
Voie de la Technologie : niveau 10

When you cast a dégâts-dealing pouvoir de la Force that requires a force attack or jet de sauvegarde, you can spend point de Forces to cause that power to instead deal ion dégâts. The number of point de Forces equals half the power's niveau (round down, minimum of one). If the power would call for a jet de sauvegarde other than Dexterity, it instead calls for a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde.

fundamentals-of-mechu-deru.name: Fondamentaux du Mechu-Deru
fundamentals-of-mechu-deru.description:
Voie de la Technologie : 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You've dabbled in adapting your use of the Force, melding it with technology. You gain maîtrise in the Technology skill, as well as simple blasters. When you cast a pouvoir de la Force that calls for a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, and you are wielding a blaster with which you are proficient, you can instead make a attaque d'arme à distance.

De plus, you've learned to manipulate the Force to be able to manipulate technology when it couldn't previously. When you cast a pouvoir de la Force that could not affect droids or constructs, vous pouvez choisir to have it affect droids or constructs. If it would affect multiple targets, you must expend additional uses of this feature for each additional target. You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

force-circuitry.name: Circuits de Force
force-circuitry.description:
Voie de la Technologie : niveau 14

Lorsque vous utilisez votre action pour lancer un pouvoir de la Force, et que vous utilisez votre fonction Fondamentaux du Mechu-deru dans le cadre de ce lancement, vous pouvez utiliser votre bonus d'action pour lancer l'une des techniques de pouvoir. vous savez, tant que ce pouvoir a un temps d'incantation de 1 action ou un bonus d'action.

mechu-deru-mastery.name: Maîtrise du Mechu-Deru
mechu-deru-mastery.description:
Voie de la Technologie : niveau 18

Vous pouvez lancer un pouvoir technique de 5e niveau de votre choix à son niveau de base. Le pouvoir compte pour vous comme un pouvoir de la Force universel, et vous n’avez pas besoin de point de Forces pour lancer ce pouvoir. Une fois que vous l'avez fait, vous ne pouvez plus le faire tant que vous n'avez pas terminé un dépôt long.

size-matters-not.name: La Taille n'a Pas d'Importance
size-matters-not.description:
Way of Telekinetics: niveau 10

You can manipulate creatures of Huge size or smaller with your pouvoir de la Forces and Way of Telekinetics features.

De plus, quand vous utilisez your action to cast a pouvoir de la Force, you can use a action bonus to fly up to 10 mètres without provoking attaque d'opportunités.

mighty-blast.name: Explosion Puissante
mighty-blast.description:
Way of Telekinetics: 6th, 11th, and niveau 17

Your pouvoir de la Forces batter and blast your enemies with the strength of a hurricane. When you cast a pouvoir de la Force of niveau 1 or higher that deals force or kinetic dégâts, une créature de votre choix dégâtsd by that power must make a Strength jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD or be knocked à terre.

Cette aptitude can affect additional creatures when you reach higher niveaus: two creatures at niveau 11 and three creatures at niveau 17.

repulsing-wave.name: Vague de Répulsion
repulsing-wave.description:
Way of Telekinetics: niveaux 14 et 17

When you are dealt dégâts by a creature within 5 mètres of you, you can use your réaction to deal force dégâts to la créature equal to your consular niveau + your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of +1). If the attacker is Huge or smaller, it must also make a Strength jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, the attacker is pushed in a straight line up to 20 mètres away from you.

You can use this feature five times. You gain an additional use at niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a short or repos long.

my-ally-is-the-force.name: Mon Alliée est la Force
my-ally-is-the-force.description:
Way of Telekinetics: niveau 18

You can manipulate creatures of Gargantuan size or smaller with your pouvoir de la Forces and Way of Telekinetics features.

De plus, whenever a pouvoir de la Force you cast pushes or pulls a creature, you can increase the distance of that push or pull by an additional 20 mètres.

staggering-stratagem.name: Stratagème Étourdissant
staggering-stratagem.description:
Way of Telekinetics: niveau 3

Your potency with the telekinetic power of the Force heightens. You can manipulate creatures of Large size or smaller with your pouvoir de la Forces and Way of Telekinetics features. De plus, une fois par tour, when you deal force or kinetic dégâts to a Large or smaller creature with a pouvoir de la Force or class feature, vous pouvez choisir to either push it up to 10 mètres away from you or pull it up to 10 mètres closer to you.

blessed-healer.name: Guérisseur Béni
blessed-healer.description:
La Voie du Sage : niveau 10

Les pouvoirs de guérison que vous lancez sur les autres vous guérissent également. Lorsque vous lancez un pouvoir de la Force qui redonne des points de vie à une créature autre que vous, vous récupérez des points de vie égaux à 2 + le niveau du pouvoir.

preserve-life.name: Préserver la Vie
preserve-life.description:
Way of the Sage: 6th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

As an action, you can channel the Force and evoke healing energy that restores a number of points de vie equal to five times your consular niveau. Choose any creatures within 30 mètres of you, and divide those points de vie among them. Cette aptitude can restore a creature to no more than half its point de vie maximum. Cette aptitude has no effect on droids or constructs.

You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

blessed-by-the-force.name: Béni par la Force
blessed-by-the-force.description:
La Voie du Sage : niveau 14

Vous gagnez la capacité de surmonter des blessures graves. En guise de bonus d'action lorsqu'il vous reste moins de la moitié de vos points de vie, vous pouvez regagner un nombre de points de vie égal à la moitié de votre point de vie maximum.

Une fois que vous avez utilisé cette fonctionnalité, vous ne pouvez plus l'utiliser avant d'avoir terminé une mise en pension longue.

supreme-healing.name: Guérison Suprême
supreme-healing.description:
La Voie du Sage: niveau 18

Lorsque vous lanceriez normalement un ou plusieurs dés pour restaurer des points de vie avec un pouvoir, vous utilisez plutôt le nombre le plus élevé possible pour chaque dé. Par exemple, au lieu de restaurer [[/r 2d6]] points de vie à une créature, vous restaurez 12.

disciple-of-life.name: Disciple de la Vie
disciple-of-life.description:
Way of the Sage: niveau 3

When you cast a pouvoir de la Force that restores points de vie, you can use Wisdom or Charisma as your forcecasting ability for it.

De plus, whenever you use a pouvoir de la Force of niveau 1 or higher to restore points de vie to a creature, la créature regains extra points de vie equal to 2 + the power's niveau.

visions-of-the-past.name: Visions du Passé
visions-of-the-past.description:
Voie du Voyant : niveau 10

You can call up visions of the past that relate to an object you hold or your immediate surroundings. You spend at least 1 minute in meditation, then receive dreamlike, shadowy glimpses of recent events. You can meditate in this way for a number of minutes equal to your Wisdom score and must maintain concentration during that time, as if you were casting a pouvoir de la Force. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a short or repos long.

Object Reading. Holding an object as you meditate, you can see visions of the object's previous owner. After meditating pendant 1 minute, you learn how the owner acquired and lost the object, as well as the most recent significant event involving the object and that owner. If the object was owned by another creature in the recent past (within a number of days equal to your Wisdom score), you can spend 1 additional minute for each owner to learn the same information about cette créature.

Area Reading. As you meditate, you see visions of recent events in your immediate vicinity (a room, street, tunnel, clearing, or the like, up to a 50-foot cube), going back a number of days equal to your Wisdom score. For each minute you meditate, you learn about one significant event, beginning with the most recent. Significant events typically involve powerful emotions, such as battles and betrayals, marriages and murders, births and funerals. However, they might also include more mundane events that are nevertheless important in your current situation.

powerful-mind.name: Esprit Puissant
powerful-mind.description:
Voie du Voyant : 6th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17

You can use your force abilities to read a creature's thoughts. You can then use your access to la créature's mind to command it.

As an action, choose une créature that you can see within 60 mètres of you. That creature must make a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde against your universal force sauvegarde DD. If la créature succeeds on the jet de sauvegarde, you can't use this feature on it again until you finish a repos long. If la créature fails its sauvegarde, you can read its surface thoughts (those foremost in its mind, reflecting its current emotions and what it is actively thinking about) when it is within 60 mètres of you. Cet effet lasts pendant 1 minute. During that time, you can use your action to end this effect and cast the coerce mind pouvoir de la Force at its base niveau on la créature without expending point de Forces. La cible automatically fails its jet de sauvegarde against the power.

You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

shielded-thoughts.name: Pensées Protégées
shielded-thoughts.description:
Voie du Voyant : niveau 14

Your thoughts can't be read by telepathy or other means unless you allow it. You also have resistance to psychic dégâts, and whenever a creature deals psychic dégâts to you, cette créature takes the same amount of dégâts that you do.

clarity-of-vision.name: Clarté de Vision
clarity-of-vision.description:
Voie du Voyant : niveau 18

Les visions de vos rêves s'intensifient et brossent dans votre esprit une image plus précise de ce qui est à venir. Vous lancez trois d20 pour votre fonction Force Visions, au lieu de deux.

force-visions.name: Visions de Force
force-visions.description:
Voie du Voyant : niveau 3

Glimpses of the future begin to press in on your awareness. When you finish a repos long, roll two d20s and record the numbers rolled. You can replace any attack roll, jet de sauvegarde, or test de caractéristique made by you or a creature that you can see with one of these foretelling rolls. You must choose to do so before the roll, and you can replace a roll in this way only une fois par tour. Each foretelling roll can be used only once. When you finish a repos long, you lose any unused foretelling rolls.

you-have-that-power-too.name: Tu As Aussi Ce Pouvoir
you-have-that-power-too.description:
Way of Tutelage: 10th, 11th, and niveau 17

The bond between you and your companion has strengthened. When your companion is within 10 mètres of you, and either you or your companion casts a pouvoir de la Force that would affect only one of you, you can instead have it affect both.

At niveau 11, your companion must be within 30 mètres of you to benefit from this feature. At niveau 17, your companion must be within 60 mètres.

got-your-back.name: Je Couvre Tes Arrières
got-your-back.description:
Way of Tutelage: niveaux 14 et 17

Une fois par tour, when your companion is within 10 mètres of you, and both you and your companion have to make a jet de sauvegarde to resist the same effect, either you or your companion can choose to have disavantage on the sauvegarde. If either of you do so, the other of the two of you gains avantage on the sauvegarde. You can use this feature before or after you both make the jet de sauvegarde, but you must do so before the GM says whether the sauvegarde succeeds or fails.

At niveau 17, your companion must be within 60 mètres of you to benefit from this feature.

now-i-am-the-master.name: Maintenant, Je Suis le Maître
now-i-am-the-master.description:
Way of Tutelage: niveau 18

Your companion has learned almost all that it can from you. As an action on its turn, your companion can take the lead, gaining the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • It gains points de vie temporaires equal to twice its niveau.
  • Une fois par tour, when it deals dégâts or restores points de vie, it can roll an additional die.
  • It gains resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts.

Cet effet ends early if your companion is incapacitated or dies. Once your companion has used this feature, it can't use it again until it finishes a repos long.

strength-flows-from-the-force.name: La Force Émane de la Force
strength-flows-from-the-force.description:
Way of Tutelage: niveau 6

When you cast a power that affects only your companion, vous pouvez choisir to treat the power as if cast at your Max Power Niveau.

You can use this feature un nombre de fois égal à your bonus de maîtrise, as shown in the consular table. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you finish a repos long.

one-with-the-force.name: Un Avec la Force
one-with-the-force.description:
Whills Order: niveau 11

You learn how to enter a trance, preparing to unleash yourpersonnelle upon your enemy. While in this trance, you can still talk and move. If you stay in the trance for at least one minute, when you roll initiative, you can make a attaque d'arme à distance on a number of creatures up to your focus modificateur de caractéristique (a minimum of one) within 30 mètres of you when you were in this trance.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

guided-strikes.name: Frappes Guidées
guided-strikes.description:
Whills Order: niveau 17

Your first attaque d'arme à distance and your first attaque d'arme au corps à corps each turn deal additional dégâts equal to your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, a minimum of +1).

flurry-of-light.name: Rafale de Lumière
flurry-of-light.description:
Whills Order: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise in blaster pistols, blaster rifles, ion pistols, ion rifles, and the lightbow, which are your Whills weapons and are monk weapons for you. When you are wielding a Whills weapon, you gain the following benefits:

  • Your Whills weapons count as melee weapons for you, and quand vous faites a attaque d'arme au corps à corps with them, you deal kinetic dégâts equal to your Martial Arts Damage Die.
  • When you would make an unarmed strike using your Martial Arts action bonus or as a part of your Flurry of Blows, you can instead attack with a Whills weapon you are wielding. You roll a [[/r d4]] in place of the normal dégâts of your Whills weapon when attacking in this way. This die changes as you gain monk niveaus, as shown in the Martial Arts column of the monk table.
  • When you would make a attaque d'arme à distance with a Whills weapon, you can instead reload the weapon.

the-force-is-with-you.name: Que la Force Soit Avec Toi
the-force-is-with-you.description:
Whills Order: niveau 6

As you channel the Force through you, you gain the following benefits:

  • You can use your Stunning Strike feature quand vous contactez with a attaque d'arme à distance while you are wielding a Whills weapon.
  • Vous pouvez dépenser up to 3 focus points to reduce partial cover by one step (from three-quarters to half or half to one-quarter). If you reduce la cible below one-quarter cover, you ignore cover bonuses entirely. At niveau 17, you can spend 3 focus points to ignore total cover, as long as your target is not hidden from you.
  • Quand vous contactez une créature with a Whills weapon, cette créature has disavantage on attaque d'opportunités against you jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

phasestorm.name: Tempête de Phase
phasestorm.description:
Forme Ysannanite : niveau 15

Vous pouvez utiliser votre action pour dart across the battlefield, striking up to six such creatures that you can see within 30 mètres. You immediately move to chaque créature in succession without provoking attaque d'opportunités, after which you return to the space in which you started. Each creature must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with your weapon). A creature takes normal weapon dégâts on a failed sauvegarde, or half as much on a successful one. If you are wielding separate weapons in each hand with which you are proficient, a creature makes this sauvegarde with disavantage, and takes additional dégâts equal to your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of one) on a failed sauvegarde if the dégâts doesn't already include that modificateur.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

master-of-the-unorthodox.name: Maître de l'Hétérodoxe
master-of-the-unorthodox.description:
Forme Ysannanite : niveau 20

You've mastered the unity between blaster and blade. Your Dexterity and Wisdom or Charisma scores (your choice) increase by 2. Your maximum for these scores increases by 2. De plus, you can use your action to gain the following benefits pendant 1 minute:

  • You have resistance to kinetic, energy, and ion dégâts from weapons.
  • Quand vous contactez une créature with a attaque d'arme à distance, you have avantage on the next attaque d'arme au corps à corps you make against cette créature. Quand vous contactez une créature with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you have avantage on the next attaque d'arme à distance you make against cette créature.
  • When you roll below half the maximum on a dégâts die, you can treat the roll as if you'd rolled half the maximum on the dégâts die. You can only affect a number of dice up to half your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, rounded up, minimum of one) in this way.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

force-empowered-shots.name: Tirs Renforcés par la Force
force-empowered-shots.description: Une fois par tour, quand vous contactez a creature with a attaque d'arme à distance, you can expend a use of your Channel the Force and expend point de Forces to deal additional dégâts to la cible, which is the same type as the weapon's dégâts. The additional dégâts is [[/r 1d8]] for each point spent in this way. You can't deal more additional dégâts than the amount shown in the Focused Strikes column of the guardian table.

the-way-of-the-yerdua.name: La Voie du Yerdua
the-way-of-the-yerdua.description:
Forme Ysannanite : niveau 3

As a action bonus, you can take a meditative stance pendant 1 minute, granting you supreme accuracy as you guide your shots to their target through the Force. While in this stance, you add your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice, minimum of +1) to one attaque d'arme à distance and jet de dégâts you make each turn. De plus, when making a attaque d'arme à distance while you are within 5 mètres of a hostile creature, you do not have disavantage on the attack roll.

Cet effet ends early if you are incapacitated or die. Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

improved-force-empowered-shots.name: Tirs Renforcés par la Force Améliorés
improved-force-empowered-shots.description:
Forme Ysannanite : niveau 7

Your familiarity with blaster weapons has granted you greater insight into their function and usage. Une fois par chacun de vos tours, drawing or stowing a blaster no longer requires your object interaction. De plus, you no longer require a free hand to reload.

At niveau 11, une fois par tour, quand vous contactez a creature with a attaque d'arme à distance, la créature takes an extra [[/r 1d8]] dégâts. If you also use your Force-Empowered Shots with an attack, you add this dégâts to the extra dégâts of your Force-Empowered Shots. The dégâts is the same type as the weapon's dégâts.

feral-ferocity.name: Férocité Sauvage
feral-ferocity.description:
Zoologist Pursuit: niveau 17

You have learned how to push your beast beyond its limits. If your beast is within 30 mètres of you and can see or hear you, you can command it to enter a furious state. While raging, your beast gains the following benefits:

  • Your beast has avantage on test de Forces and Strength jet de sauvegardes if it is size Medium or larger.
  • Your beast has avantage on test de Dextérités and Dexterity jet de sauvegardes if it is size Small or smaller.
  • When your beast hits with an attack, it deals bonus dégâts equal to your Critical Analysis ability modifer.
  • Your beast has resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts.

Your beast's furious state lasts pendant 1 minute. It ends early if your beast is knocked inconscient. You can end your beast's furious state as a action bonus.

Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a repos long.

wilderness-expert.name: Expert de la Nature Sauvage
wilderness-expert.description:
Zoologist Pursuit: niveau 3

You gain maîtrise in Dressage, and you have avantage on Wisdom (Dressage) checks. De plus, you can't have disavantage on Wisdom (Dressage) checks.

vicious-hunting.name: Chasse Vicieuse
vicious-hunting.description:
Zoologist Pursuit: niveau 6

Your beast companion's strikes count as enhanced for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to unenhanced attacks and dégâts. De plus, when your beast makes an attack roll, test de caractéristique, or jet de sauvegarde, you may expend a dé de supériorité and apply the benefits of a maneuver you know from this class, as if you had taken the action yourpersonnelle.

bestial-agility.name: Agilité Bestiale
bestial-agility.description:
Zoologist Pursuit: niveau 9

Your beast's reflexes and agility allow it to move with a burst of speed. When your beast moves on its turn in combat, it can double its speed until the end of the turn. Once its used this feature, it can't use it again until it moves 0 mètres on one of its turns.
